recipes.name: uc_approval_workflow
recipes.description: Sequential approval chain: manager then admin (configurable). Sends approval notifications, handles approve/deny/return-for-info responses, enforces timeout reminders at halfway marks and escalates on full timeout. High-privilege requests always route through human review regardless of auto-rules. Emergency urgency uses shortened timeouts.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_approval_workflow","title":"Approval Workflow","description":"Sequential approval chain: manager then admin (configurable). Sends approval notifications, handles approve/deny/return-for-info responses, enforces timeout reminders at halfway marks and escalates on full timeout. High-privilege requests always route through human review regardless of auto-rules. Emergency urgency uses shortened timeouts.","capability_summary":"Level 1 (manager) \u2192 Level 2 (admin) routing with timeout reminders, escalation, and human-review gating on high-privilege requests.","category":"workflow","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"access.request.received"},"description":"Fires when uc_intake_triage emits a new request. Also wakes on a polling cadence to scan in-flight requests for timeouts."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"High-privilege requests always require human review before final approval regardless of other rules. Every approval/denial is an explicit human decision \u2014 no auto-advance."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-approver response-time statistics (to surface bottleneck approvers in reports). Approval/denial rates by resource and requestor. Escalation patterns."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"access.request.received","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming request from uc_intake_triage."},{"event_type":"access.request.approved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { request_id, requestor_email, resource, access_level, manager_decision, admin_decision, total_cycle_time }. Consumed by downstream provisioning agents."},{"event_type":"access.request.denied","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { request_id, denied_by, denial_reason, level }. Consumed by compliance dashboards or alternative-workflow suggesters."},{"event_type":"access.request.escalated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { request_id, original_approver, escalation_target, hours_pending, urgency }. Consumed by SLA dashboards and management alert workflows."}],"error_handling":"Escalation target unknown \u2192 route directly to admin with note. Both levels timeout \u2192 flag manual review with severity='critical'. Duplicate approval response after escalation \u2192 accept first valid chronologically; log duplicate. Messages delivery failure \u2192 retry once; if it still fails, write the approval context to `pending_notifications.json` so nothing is lost.","input_schema":[{"name":"timeout_hours","type":"number","default":48,"min":4,"max":168,"description":"Standard-urgency approval timeout. Urgent halves it; emergency uses 4h."},{"name":"require_human_review_for_high_privilege","type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"Forces admin-level / production / sensitive resource requests through explicit human review regardless of other rules."}],"sample_input":{"timeout_hours":"{{param.aq_timeout_hours}}","require_human_review_for_high_privilege":"{{param.aq_require_human_review_for_high_privilege}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"a1","type":"start","label":"access.request.received"},{"id":"a2","type":"action","label":"Notify manager; wait for decision or timeout"},{"id":"a3","type":"decision","label":"Manager decision?"},{"id":"a4","type":"action","label":"Halfway \u2192 reminder; full \u2192 escalate"},{"id":"a5","type":"action","label":"Notify admin (with manager decision)"},{"id":"a6","type":"decision","label":"Admin decision?"},{"id":"a7","type":"event","label":"Emit approved / denied / escalated"},{"id":"a8","type":"action","label":"Notify requestor of final status"},{"id":"a9","type":"end","label":"Workflow closed"}],"edges":[{"source":"a1","target":"a2"},{"source":"a2","target":"a3"},{"source":"a3","target":"a4","variant":"no","label":"Timed out"},{"source":"a3","target":"a5","variant":"yes","label":"Approved"},{"source":"a3","target":"a7","variant":"no","label":"Denied"},{"source":"a4","target":"a5"},{"source":"a5","target":"a6"},{"source":"a6","target":"a7"},{"source":"a7","target":"a8"},{"source":"a8","target":"a9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_audit_reporting
recipes.description: Compile audit digests and compliance reports. Daily summary: requests received, approved, denied, escalated, expired, average time-to-approval. Weekly summary identifies bottleneck approvers. On-demand compliance report shows grants within a date range with full approval chains and justifications. Default daily end-of-day + weekly Monday — final cadence at trigger step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_audit_reporting","title":"Audit & Reporting","description":"Compile audit digests and compliance reports. Daily summary: requests received, approved, denied, escalated, expired, average time-to-approval. Weekly summary identifies bottleneck approvers. On-demand compliance report shows grants within a date range with full approval chains and justifications. Default daily end-of-day + weekly Monday \u2014 final cadence at trigger step.","capability_summary":"Daily + weekly audit digests; on-demand compliance reports.","category":"reporting","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 18 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 6:00 PM (plus a weekly Monday summary) \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Aggregate statistics (approval rates, average cycle times, resource frequency). Bottleneck-approver detection via rolling response-time averages. Trend data for quarterly compliance reporting."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"access.audit.digest_delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { date, requests_received, approved, denied, escalated, expired, average_cycle_time_hours }. Consumed by compliance aggregators or monthly governance reporters."}],"error_handling":"Audit DB unreadable \u2192 reconstruct from in-flight buffer and emit partial digest with a gap note. Disabling not recommended for regulated industries."}],"sample_input":{"audit_enabled":"{{param.aq_audit_enabled}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"Reporting tick"},{"id":"r2","type":"action","label":"Read audit DB for the reporting window"},{"id":"r3","type":"action","label":"Aggregate counts + cycle times; detect bottlenecks"},{"id":"r4","type":"action","label":"Compose digest"},{"id":"r5","type":"event","label":"Emit access.audit.digest_delivered"},{"id":"r6","type":"action","label":"Deliver digest via Messages"},{"id":"r7","type":"end","label":"Digest delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"r1","target":"r2"},{"source":"r2","target":"r3"},{"source":"r3","target":"r4"},{"source":"r4","target":"r5"},{"source":"r5","target":"r6"},{"source":"r6","target":"r7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_intake_triage
recipes.description: Poll the configured inbox for new access request emails, parse structured fields, validate completeness, deduplicate against recent requests, classify privilege level, and create the immutable audit record. Emits the received event to kick off the approval workflow. Default polling cadence every 10 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_intake_triage","title":"Request Intake & Triage","description":"Poll the configured inbox for new access request emails, parse structured fields, validate completeness, deduplicate against recent requests, classify privilege level, and create the immutable audit record. Emits the received event to kick off the approval workflow. Default polling cadence every 10 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Email intake, parsing, dedup, audit record creation, high-privilege classification.","category":"ingestion","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"*/10 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 10 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["email"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Processed email message IDs for dedup. Per-resource frequency stats. Common malformed-request patterns learned over time to improve extraction."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"access.request.received","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { request_id, requestor_email, requested_resource, access_level, urgency, manager_email, requires_manual_review }. Consumed by uc_approval_workflow."}],"error_handling":"email auth failure \u2192 notify user, skip this cycle. Rate limit \u2192 backoff. Audit write failure \u2192 buffer in memory, never advance to approval workflow without the record. Malformed email \u2192 best-effort extraction, reply with template. External sender \u2192 log 'rejected_external', notify security admin.","input_schema":[{"name":"approval_levels","type":"enum","options":["manager_only","manager_then_admin","manager_admin_security","single_approver"],"default":"manager_then_admin","description":"Shape of the approval chain the intake primes; drives how many levels the audit record anticipates."},{"name":"access_level_scheme","type":"text","description":"Organization's access-level vocabulary (e.g., 'Read-only, Write, Admin' or 'Viewer, Editor, Owner'). Used to classify the requested level and flag high-privilege tiers."}],"sample_input":{"approval_levels":"{{param.aq_approval_levels}}","access_level_scheme":"{{param.aq_access_level_scheme}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"i1","type":"start","label":"Polling tick"},{"id":"i2","type":"connector","label":"Search email for access-request emails","connector":"email"},{"id":"i3","type":"decision","label":"New unprocessed emails?"},{"id":"i4","type":"action","label":"Parse fields + dedupe + classify privilege"},{"id":"i5","type":"action","label":"Write audit record (status=pending_manager)"},{"id":"i6","type":"event","label":"Emit access.request.received"},{"id":"i7","type":"end","label":"Queued for approval workflow"}],"edges":[{"source":"i1","target":"i2"},{"source":"i2","target":"i3"},{"source":"i3","target":"i4","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"i3","target":"i7","variant":"no","label":"None"},{"source":"i4","target":"i5"},{"source":"i5","target":"i6"},{"source":"i6","target":"i7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_daily_reconciliation
recipes.description: Pull yesterday's finance platform transactions + matching bank statement lines, classify each as matched / partial / unmatched, and write discrepancies to the spreadsheet ledger. Default daily Mon-Fri 6:00 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_daily_reconciliation","title":"Reconciliation Sync","description":"Pull yesterday's finance platform transactions + matching bank statement lines, classify each as matched / partial / unmatched, and write discrepancies to the spreadsheet ledger. Default daily Mon-Fri 6:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Daily finance platform \u2194 bank-feed matching with discrepancy logging to Sheets.","category":"operations","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 6 * * 1-5","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default Mon-Fri 6:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["finance","spreadsheet"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`reconciliation_state.json` \u2014 last-sync timestamp, unmatched-item history keyed by (vendor, amount, date), recurring-pattern ledger. Patterns memorize after 3+ consistent observations."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"reconciliation.discrepancy.found","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { entry_id, source (xero|bank), vendor, amount, date, reference, status (PARTIAL_MATCH|UNMATCHED_BANK|UNMATCHED_XERO), confidence }. Emitted per discrepancy logged to the ledger."},{"event_type":"reconciliation.cycle.complete","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { date, processed_count, matched_count, discrepancy_count, discrepancy_total }. Emitted once per daily cycle after state is persisted."}],"error_handling":"finance platform auth failure \u2192 skip cycle, do not bump last_sync. finance platform 429 \u2192 Retry-After. Sheets 404 \u2192 fallback to local CSV. Recurring-pattern auto-match applies before writing to the ledger.","input_schema":[{"name":"tracker_spreadsheet_id","type":"text","description":"spreadsheet ID of the reconciliation ledger. Two tabs required: Discrepancies (appended to) and Summary (updated with daily totals)."},{"name":"date_tolerance_days","type":"enum","options":["1","2","3","5"],"default":"2","description":"Business-day tolerance for matching a bank entry to a finance platform entry by date. Amount always exact; date is fuzzy."}],"sample_input":{"tracker_spreadsheet_id":"{{param.aq_tracker_sheet}}","date_tolerance_days":"{{param.aq_date_tolerance}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"d1","type":"start","label":"Daily tick"},{"id":"d2","type":"action","label":"Load state + recurring patterns"},{"id":"d3","type":"connector","label":"Fetch finance platform txns + bank statements","connector":"xero"},{"id":"d4","type":"action","label":"Match (amount exact, date \u00b1tol, ref fuzzy)"},{"id":"d5","type":"action","label":"Apply recurring-pattern auto-match"},{"id":"d6","type":"connector","label":"Append discrepancies + update Summary","connector":"spreadsheet"},{"id":"d7","type":"event","label":"Emit reconciliation.discrepancy.found per row"},{"id":"d8","type":"action","label":"Persist updated state"},{"id":"d9","type":"event","label":"Emit reconciliation.cycle.complete"},{"id":"d10","type":"end","label":"Ledger up to date"}],"edges":[{"source":"d1","target":"d2"},{"source":"d2","target":"d3"},{"source":"d3","target":"d4"},{"source":"d4","target":"d5"},{"source":"d5","target":"d6"},{"source":"d6","target":"d7"},{"source":"d7","target":"d8"},{"source":"d8","target":"d9"},{"source":"d9","target":"d10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_discrepancy_alerts
recipes.description: Route each discrepancy produced by the sync to the messaging channel with tiered urgency — individual alerts for high-value items, review requests for low-confidence partials, grouped summary for low-value noise, @-mention escalation when the daily total crosses the escalation threshold. Default same tick as uc_daily_reconciliation — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_discrepancy_alerts","title":"Discrepancy Alerting","description":"Route each discrepancy produced by the sync to the messaging channel with tiered urgency \u2014 individual alerts for high-value items, review requests for low-confidence partials, grouped summary for low-value noise, @-mention escalation when the daily total crosses the escalation threshold. Default same tick as uc_daily_reconciliation \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Tiered messaging alerting on reconciliation discrepancies with grouping and escalation.","category":"notifications","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"reconciliation.cycle.complete"},"description":"Fires after every uc_daily_reconciliation cycle. Event-triggered \u2014 cadence is driven by the sync's trigger."},"connectors":["messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Alert dedupe log \u2014 prevents duplicate messaging posts for the same discrepancy across same-day retries. Tracks escalation state so a second 5K+ breach in the same day doesn't re-@-mention."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"reconciliation.cycle.complete","direction":"listen","description":"Consumed from uc_daily_reconciliation \u2014 provides the full discrepancy set for this tick."},{"event_type":"reconciliation.alert.sent","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { entry_id, tier (individual|grouped|escalation), slack_ts }. Emitted per messaging post for downstream tracking."}],"error_handling":"messaging unreachable \u2192 queue payloads in `pending_slack.json`, retry on next cycle. Never silently drop. Duplicate-alert suppression honored via dedupe log.","input_schema":[{"name":"alert_threshold","type":"enum","options":["100","250","500","1000","5000"],"default":"500","description":"Individual alerts fire for any single discrepancy at or above this amount."},{"name":"escalation_threshold","type":"enum","options":["2500","5000","10000","25000"],"default":"5000","description":"When the daily total of unmatched amounts crosses this, the messaging post includes an @-mention to the finance lead."},{"name":"confidence_review_cutoff","type":"enum","options":["Never auto-accept","85","90","95"],"default":"90","description":"Partial matches below this confidence score trigger a messaging review request."}],"sample_input":{"alert_threshold":"{{param.aq_alert_threshold}}","escalation_threshold":"{{param.aq_escalation_threshold}}","confidence_review_cutoff":"{{param.aq_confidence_cutoff}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"a1","type":"start","label":"Cycle complete event"},{"id":"a2","type":"action","label":"Partition: high-value / low-confidence / low-value / auto-matched"},{"id":"a3","type":"decision","label":"Daily total > escalation threshold?"},{"id":"a4","type":"connector","label":"Post individual alerts (formatted messaging layout)","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"a5","type":"connector","label":"Post grouped low-value summary","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"a6","type":"connector","label":"Post escalation with @-mention","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"a7","type":"event","label":"Emit reconciliation.alert.sent per post"},{"id":"a8","type":"end","label":"Alerts delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"a1","target":"a2"},{"source":"a2","target":"a3"},{"source":"a3","target":"a6","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"a3","target":"a4","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"a4","target":"a5"},{"source":"a5","target":"a7"},{"source":"a6","target":"a7"},{"source":"a7","target":"a8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_weekly_email_summary
recipes.description: Compile the week's reconciliation ledger into a formatted HTML email — match rate, outstanding discrepancies by age, top 10 largest unmatched items, trend vs last week — and send to the finance distribution list. Default Friday 5:00 PM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_email_summary","title":"Weekly Email Summary","description":"Compile the week's reconciliation ledger into a formatted HTML email \u2014 match rate, outstanding discrepancies by age, top 10 largest unmatched items, trend vs last week \u2014 and send to the finance distribution list. recipes.name: uc_monthly_report
recipes.description: For each active client, compile the month's work (items, hours, SLA compliance), run a quick site health check, generate 1–3 improvement recommendations, and send as an HTML retainer report. Default 1st of month at 09:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_monthly_report","title":"Monthly Report","description":"For each active client, compile the month's work (items, hours, SLA compliance), run a quick site health check, generate 1\u20133 improvement recommendations, and send as an HTML retainer report. recipes.name: uc_request_intake
recipes.description: Polls email for new messages from registered client addresses, classifies request vs non-request vs ambiguous, assigns priority and SLA, and logs a tracked work item with an acknowledgment reply. Default every 5 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_request_intake","title":"Request Intake","description":"Polls email for new messages from registered client addresses, classifies request vs non-request vs ambiguous, assigns priority and SLA, and logs a tracked work item with an acknowledgment reply. Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Inbox-to-work-item pipeline with priority, SLA, and client acknowledgment.","category":"automation","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"*/5 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["email"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"conditional","context":"Ambiguous classifications are flagged for manual review rather than auto-created with a guessed priority."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-client request patterns: typical request types, average hours, acceptance-rate of ambiguous classifications. recipes.name: uc_sla_scan
recipes.description: Scans open work items for SLA risk (within 4 hours) and breach (already past). Alerts the agency via Messages and, for 21+ day breaches, sends the client a check-in. Default weekly — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_sla_scan","title":"SLA Scan","description":"Scans open work items for SLA risk (within 4 hours) and breach (already past). Alerts the agency via Messages and, for 21+ day breaches, sends the client a check-in. recipes.name: uc_work_execution
recipes.description: For each new work item, check the complexity gate and either apply the change via codebases (commit, reply, close) or flag for manual review. Out-of-retainer requests are logged as scope escalations with a client-facing estimate offer.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_work_execution","title":"Work Execution","description":"For each new work item, check the complexity gate and either apply the change via codebases (commit, reply, close) or flag for manual review. Out-of-retainer requests are logged as scope escalations with a client-facing estimate offer.","capability_summary":"Codebase edits within a complexity gate, with commit and completion reply.","category":"automation","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"retainer.request.received"},"description":"Fires whenever uc_request_intake creates a work item."},"connectors":["codebases","email"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"conditional","context":"Changes above the complexity gate are escalated for manual review before any repo write."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Estimation calibration: learn the delta between estimated and actual hours per client and per request type to tighten future estimates."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"retainer.request.received","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming work items from uc_request_intake."},{"event_type":"retainer.work.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { work_item_id, client_id, commit_hash, actual_hours }."},{"event_type":"retainer.work.escalated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { work_item_id, client_id, reason: 'complexity' | 'scope' }."}],"error_handling":"Repo not registered \u2192 status=blocked, Messages alert, do not guess repo. Merge conflict \u2192 status=blocked, Messages alert. Codebases unreachable \u2192 queue on `pending_execution.json`, retry next cycle. Change above complexity gate \u2192 status=flagged, Messages alert; do NOT partially apply.","input_schema":[{"name":"complexity_gate","type":"enum","options":["text_only","simple","any"],"default":"simple","description":"Changes above this tier are flagged for manual review rather than auto-applied. text_only = content text only; simple = + image swaps; any = everything except clearly out-of-retainer feature work."}],"sample_input":{"complexity_gate":"{{param.aq_complexity_gate}}"},"tool_hints":["gmail_send","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"w1","type":"start","label":"retainer.request.received"},{"id":"w2","type":"decision","label":"Within complexity gate?"},{"id":"w3","type":"connector","label":"Apply change + commit","connector":"codebases"},{"id":"w4","type":"action","label":"Flag for manual review"},{"id":"w5","type":"connector","label":"Reply with completion","connector":"email"},{"id":"w6","type":"event","label":"Emit retainer.work.completed /.escalated"},{"id":"w7","type":"end","label":"Work item closed"}],"edges":[{"source":"w1","target":"w2"},{"source":"w2","target":"w3","variant":"yes","label":"Within gate"},{"source":"w2","target":"w4","variant":"no","label":"Escalate"},{"source":"w3","target":"w5"},{"source":"w4","target":"w6"},{"source":"w5","target":"w6"},{"source":"w6","target":"w7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_analyze_contract
recipes.description: Pulls an incoming contract (email tags/folders or webhook), extracts text, identifies the contract type, and runs the six-pass structured analysis: key terms, financials, obligations, risk assessment, red flags, market comparison. Produces the structured record that downstream capabilities publish and alert on.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_analyze_contract","title":"Contract Intake and Analysis","description":"Pulls an incoming contract (email tags/folders or webhook), extracts text, identifies the contract type, and runs the six-pass structured analysis: key terms, financials, obligations, risk assessment, red flags, market comparison. Produces the structured record that downstream capabilities publish and alert on.","capability_summary":"Six-pass analysis producing a structured review record per contract.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/10 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default poll email every 10 minutes for labelled contracts \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step. Webhook upload also supported for instant processing."},"connectors":["email"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Review is triggered when the contract type can't be confidently classified, when extracted text is suspiciously short, or when the document is an amendment referencing an original the agent does not have. Clear-cut reviews ship without a review gate."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Counterparty history: prior reviews for the same counterparty inform market-comparison baselines (e.g., 'this counterparty's SaaS contracts typically have 3% escalation; this one has 7%'). Clause-pattern library grows over time."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"contract.review.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { contract_id, type, parties, risk_level, red_flag_count, analysis: { key_terms, financials, obligations, risks, red_flags, market_comparison }, key_dates[] }. Consumed by uc_publish_and_alert."}],"error_handling":"Unsupported format / encrypted PDF / OCR-needed \u2192 notify sender via email with the specific reason, log the status, halt. email attachment fetch failure \u2192 retry up to 3x with backoff; on persistent failure, log and alert. Extraction yields minimal text \u2192 flag ocr_needed, never analyze a partial document. Duplicate submission within 24h \u2192 confirm with sender before re-running.","input_schema":[{"name":"contract_types","type":"text","description":"Which contract types the team reviews most often \u2014 informs which clause patterns and risk factors the analysis emphasizes."},{"name":"risk_tolerance","type":"enum","options":["conservative","moderate","aggressive"],"default":"moderate","description":"Conservative flags anything non-standard; moderate flags unfavorable + missing protections; aggressive only flags critical risks."}],"sample_input":{"contract_types":"{{param.aq_contract_types}}","risk_tolerance":"{{param.aq_risk_tolerance}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","gmail_search","gmail_get_attachment","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"a1","type":"start","label":"Contract received (email tags/folders or webhook)"},{"id":"a2","type":"connector","label":"Download + extract text","connector":"email"},{"id":"a3","type":"decision","label":"Valid format + extractable?"},{"id":"a4","type":"action","label":"Log intake + identify contract type"},{"id":"a5","type":"action","label":"Pass 1-3: key terms / financials / obligations"},{"id":"a6","type":"action","label":"Pass 4-6: risk / red flags / market comparison"},{"id":"a7","type":"event","label":"Emit contract.review.completed"},{"id":"a8","type":"error","label":"Notify sender of format/encryption/OCR issue"},{"id":"a9","type":"end","label":"Analysis record ready"}],"edges":[{"source":"a1","target":"a2"},{"source":"a2","target":"a3"},{"source":"a3","target":"a4","variant":"yes","label":"Valid"},{"source":"a3","target":"a8","variant":"no","label":"Invalid"},{"source":"a4","target":"a5"},{"source":"a5","target":"a6"},{"source":"a6","target":"a7"},{"source":"a7","target":"a9"},{"source":"a8","target":"a9","variant":"error"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_deadline_reminders
recipes.description: Daily scan of all tracked contract deadlines — renewal dates, termination notice windows, obligation due dates, warranty expirations. Sends tiered reminders at 30 / 14 / 7 days via email (to submitter + configured recipients) and messaging (to the legal channel). Duplicate-suppressed via per-deadline reminder flags. Default daily morning; final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_deadline_reminders","title":"Deadline Reminder Sweep","description":"Daily scan of all tracked contract deadlines \u2014 renewal dates, termination notice windows, obligation due dates, warranty expirations. Sends tiered reminders at 30 / 14 / 7 days via email (to submitter + configured recipients) and messaging (to the legal channel). Duplicate-suppressed via per-deadline reminder flags. Default daily morning; final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"30/14/7 day deadline reminders across every tracked contract.","category":"notifications","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 8:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["email","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-deadline reminder flags prevent duplicate sends. Historical reminder-response patterns can surface deadlines that consistently get ignored (signal for escalation tuning)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"contract.deadline.approaching","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { contract_id, deadline_kind, days_remaining, tier }. Emitted per deadline per tier transition \u2014 downstream escalation automations can subscribe."}],"error_handling":"email send failure \u2192 queue for next sweep; don't mark the reminder sent. messaging failure \u2192 queue in `data/pending_slack.json`. Corrupted deadline file \u2192 re-initialize; note historical reminder state lost; future deadlines continue to track normally.","input_schema":[{"name":"reminder_recipients","type":"text","description":"Comma-separated additional email recipients for deadline reminders (besides the original submitter)."}],"sample_input":{"reminder_recipients":"{{param.aq_reminder_recipients}}"},"tool_hints":["gmail_send","http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"d1","type":"start","label":"Daily sweep tick"},{"id":"d2","type":"action","label":"Load contract_deadlines.json"},{"id":"d3","type":"action","label":"Filter to deadlines within 30d; select tier"},{"id":"d4","type":"decision","label":"Tier already sent?"},{"id":"d5","type":"connector","label":"gmail_send + messaging reminder","connector":"email"},{"id":"d6","type":"action","label":"Mark tier sent; emit deadline.approaching"},{"id":"d7","type":"end","label":"Sweep complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"d1","target":"d2"},{"source":"d2","target":"d3"},{"source":"d3","target":"d4"},{"source":"d4","target":"d5","variant":"no","label":"Not sent"},{"source":"d4","target":"d7","variant":"yes","label":"Already sent"},{"source":"d5","target":"d6"},{"source":"d6","target":"d7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_publish_and_alert
recipes.description: Converts the structured review record into a knowledge base pages with full sections, sends the email summary to the submitter, and fires a messaging alert when red flag count meets the high-risk threshold. Updates the contract log and deadline tracker.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_publish_and_alert","title":"knowledge base Publish and Risk Alert","description":"Converts the structured review record into a knowledge base pages with full sections, sends the email summary to the submitter, and fires a messaging alert when red flag count meets the high-risk threshold. Updates the contract log and deadline tracker.","capability_summary":"knowledge base pages + email summary + threshold-gated messaging alert.","category":"reporting","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"contract.review.completed"},"description":"Fires whenever uc_analyze_contract completes. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["knowledge_base","email","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"When risk_level is CRITICAL and the submitter is an external party, route the outbound email summary through a quick review before send \u2014 internal submitters ship immediately."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"contract.review.completed","direction":"listen","description":"Upstream analysis record incoming."},{"event_type":"contract.risk.high_flagged","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { contract_id, risk_level, red_flag_count, top_flags[], notion_url }. Emitted when the high-risk threshold (3+ flags OR any CRITICAL) is crossed \u2014 downstream escalation personas can subscribe."}],"error_handling":"knowledge base 429 \u2192 backoff per Retry-After (up to 3x); on persistent failure, save full analysis to `data/reports/{id}.json` and queue for later knowledge base upload. knowledge base 401 \u2192 emit persona_error, save locally, halt until credentials refresh. messaging channel_not_found \u2192 fall back to DM the legal lead from the configured recipient list; never fail the whole workflow. email recipient bounce \u2192 flag the email in `data/error_log.json` and alert via the messaging channel.","input_schema":[{"name":"legal_team_channel","type":"text","description":"messaging channels for high-risk alerts (e.g., #legal-review)."},{"name":"high_risk_threshold","type":"number","default":3,"description":"Number of red flags that triggers the messaging alert + priority email formatting."}],"sample_input":{"legal_team_channel":"{{param.aq_legal_team_channel}}","high_risk_threshold":3},"tool_hints":["http_request","gmail_send","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"p1","type":"start","label":"review.completed received"},{"id":"p2","type":"connector","label":"Create knowledge base pages + append analysis blocks","connector":"knowledge_base"},{"id":"p3","type":"connector","label":"gmail_send summary to submitter","connector":"email"},{"id":"p4","type":"decision","label":"High-risk (3+ flags)?"},{"id":"p5","type":"connector","label":"messaging alert to legal channel","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"p6","type":"action","label":"Update contract_log + deadline tracker"},{"id":"p7","type":"event","label":"Emit contract.risk.high_flagged (conditional)"},{"id":"p8","type":"end","label":"Report published, stakeholders notified"}],"edges":[{"source":"p1","target":"p2"},{"source":"p2","target":"p3"},{"source":"p3","target":"p4"},{"source":"p4","target":"p5","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"p4","target":"p6","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"p5","target":"p7"},{"source":"p7","target":"p6"},{"source":"p6","target":"p8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_ingest_documents
recipes.description: Watch cloud storage for new and updated documents. Extract text, run AI analysis (summary, tags, category, entities, action items, relationships, confidence), deduplicate, and create-or-update structured knowledge base pages. Maintain the local search index. Default every 10 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_ingest_documents","title":"Drive Document Ingestion","description":"Watch cloud storage for new and updated documents. Extract text, run AI analysis (summary, tags, category, entities, action items, relationships, confidence), deduplicate, and create-or-update structured knowledge base pages. Maintain the local search index. Default every 10 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Drive \u2192 knowledge base with full structured metadata and local search index.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/10 * * * *"},"description":"Default every 10 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["storage","knowledge_base"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"conditional","context":"Documents with confidence < 0.5 are published with status 'Needs Review' and surfaced in the weekly digest for human triage."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-folder sync timestamps, category/tag frequency counters, entity occurrence tracking across the corpus, relationship graph between documents."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"knowledge.document.ingested","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { file_id, notion_page_id, title, category, tags, confidence, word_count, relationships[] }. Emitted per processed file."},{"event_type":"knowledge.index.rebuilt","direction":"emit","description":"Emitted when `data/document_index.json` was corrupted and rebuilt from the knowledge base databases."}],"error_handling":"Drive 401 \u2192 halt until refresh-token succeeds. Drive 403 on a folder \u2192 skip that folder, continue others. Drive 429 \u2192 60s backoff, halve batch. knowledge base 429 \u2192 500ms inter-request spacing. knowledge base validation error \u2192 simplified page; persist body locally if still failing. Non-text PDFs \u2192 minimal page with 'Requires OCR' status. Rapid successive edits \u2192 2-minute debounce to the latest version. Corrupted index \u2192 rebuild from knowledge base and emit knowledge.index.rebuilt.","input_schema":[{"name":"monitored_folders","type":"text","description":"Comma-separated list of Drive folder IDs to monitor recursively."},{"name":"analysis_depth","type":"enum","options":["fast","balanced","deep"],"default":"balanced","description":"Fast: title + 2-sentence summary + top 3 tags. Balanced: + key entities + action items. Deep: + relationships + open questions + cross-document links."},{"name":"excluded_patterns","type":"text","description":"Comma-separated folder names or filename prefixes to skip (e.g. `HR, [DRAFT], [PRIVATE]`)."},{"name":"tag_policy","type":"enum","options":["fixed_taxonomy","ai_freeform","hybrid"],"default":"hybrid","description":"Fixed: AI picks only from user taxonomy. Freeform: AI invents as needed. Hybrid: AI picks from taxonomy but may add new tags flagged for review."}],"sample_input":{"monitored_folders":"{{param.aq_monitored_folders}}","analysis_depth":"{{param.aq_analysis_depth}}","excluded_patterns":"{{param.aq_excluded_patterns}}","tag_policy":"{{param.aq_tag_policy}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"d1","type":"start","label":"Polling tick"},{"id":"d2","type":"connector","label":"List modified Drive files","connector":"storage"},{"id":"d3","type":"action","label":"Filter excluded + supported types"},{"id":"d4","type":"connector","label":"Export text / download PDF","connector":"storage"},{"id":"d5","type":"action","label":"AI analyze (summary/tags/entities/relationships/confidence)"},{"id":"d6","type":"connector","label":"Dedup query + create or update knowledge base pages","connector":"knowledge_base"},{"id":"d7","type":"action","label":"Update local index + sync state"},{"id":"d8","type":"event","label":"Emit knowledge.document.ingested"},{"id":"d9","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"d1","target":"d2"},{"source":"d2","target":"d3"},{"source":"d3","target":"d4"},{"source":"d4","target":"d5"},{"source":"d5","target":"d6"},{"source":"d6","target":"d7"},{"source":"d7","target":"d8"},{"source":"d8","target":"d9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_search_queries
recipes.description: Listen for messages. Parse `/search`, `/find`, `/recent`, `/stats`, `/categories` commands. Score against the local index (title, tags, entities, category, summary, with recency boost) and return top 5 with Drive links. Default polling every 2 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_search_queries","title":"Natural-Language Search","description":"Listen for messages. Parse `/search`, `/find`, `/recent`, `/stats`, `/categories` commands. Score against the local index (title, tags, entities, category, summary, with recency boost) and return top 5 with Drive links. Default polling every 2 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Chat-based semantic search with inline Drive links.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/2 * * * *"},"description":"Default every 2 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Query log with clicked-result tracking \u2014 enables query reformulation hints and 'you searched this before' callouts over time."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"knowledge.search.answered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { query, result_count, top_result_file_id, response_time_ms }. Emitted per answered query."}],"error_handling":"messaging 401 \u2192 halt; emit persona.error. messaging 400 message-too-long \u2192 split into \u22642 messages. messaging 429 \u2192 respect retry_after. Index missing \u2192 rebuild from knowledge base before responding.","input_schema":[{"name":"search_top_n","type":"number","default":5,"min":3,"max":10,"description":"Max results returned per query."},{"name":"min_score","type":"number","default":0.3,"description":"Minimum composite score to include a result."}],"sample_input":{"search_top_n":5,"min_score":0.3},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"messaging poll"},{"id":"s2","type":"connector","label":"getUpdates","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"s3","type":"decision","label":"Command detected?"},{"id":"s4","type":"action","label":"Score against local index"},{"id":"s5","type":"action","label":"Format top N with Drive links"},{"id":"s6","type":"connector","label":"sendMessage reply","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"s7","type":"event","label":"Emit knowledge.search.answered"},{"id":"s8","type":"end","label":"Query handled"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4","variant":"yes"},{"source":"s3","target":"s8","variant":"no","label":"No command"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5"},{"source":"s5","target":"s6"},{"source":"s6","target":"s7"},{"source":"s7","target":"s8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_weekly_report
recipes.description: Compile weekly knowledge-base metrics — docs added, updated, category breakdown, new tags, top contributors, low-confidence flags, highlighted new documents — and post to the messaging channel. Default Friday 5pm — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_report","title":"Weekly Growth Digest","description":"Compile weekly knowledge-base metrics \u2014 docs added, updated, category breakdown, new tags, top contributors, low-confidence flags, highlighted new documents \u2014 and post to the messaging channel. Default Friday 5pm \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Weekly messaging digest of corpus growth, contributor activity, and review flags.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 17 * * 5"},"description":"Default Friday 17:00 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Rolling 4-week corpus stats; new-tag emergence over time; low-confidence backlog that carries week-to-week until humans triage it."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"knowledge.report.generated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { period, total_docs, docs_added, docs_updated, category_breakdown, low_confidence_count, top_contributors[] }. Emitted after each weekly digest ships."}],"error_handling":"messaging channel_not_found \u2192 resolve by name via conversations.list; if still missing, save report locally and emit persona.error. messaging 429 \u2192 queue in `data/pending_slack.json`, retry next cycle. recipes.name: uc_research_report
recipes.description: User-invoked research pipeline: accept a topic + scope, ground findings in user reference sources, search complementary angles, synthesize with confidence levels, store in the knowledge base, deliver via configured channels. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default manual + optional webhook.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_research_report","title":"Research Report","description":"User-invoked research pipeline: accept a topic + scope, ground findings in user reference sources, search complementary angles, synthesize with confidence levels, store in the knowledge base, deliver via configured channels. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default manual + optional webhook.","capability_summary":"End-to-end research report with source grounding, confidence scoring, and multi-channel delivery.","category":"research","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Default manual \u2014 final cadence (manual / webhook / scheduled digest) set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["knowledge_base","email","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Deep-scope reports and reports whose overall confidence is Low surface a review gate before delivery. Standard and Quick auto-deliver when confidence \u2265 Medium."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Topic frequency, per-source reliability trend, recurring requester preferences, quality self-assessment score per report. Informs angle decomposition and source weighting for future runs."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"research.report.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { research_id, topic, scope, sources_count, confidence, kb_page_id }. Emitted after successful knowledge-base write + at least one delivery channel success."},{"event_type":"research.quality.degraded","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { research_id, reason (insufficient_sources|stale_data|auth_failure), sources_count, scope }. Downstream remediation workflows subscribe."},{"event_type":"research.delivery.failed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { research_id, channel, error }. Emitted per channel that fails; fallback local report path included."}],"error_handling":"Insufficient sources vs. scope floor \u2192 downgrade confidence and label the caveat in exec summary. recipes.description: Weekly synthesis of AI ecosystem developments grounded in user reference sources. Per-subdomain angle coverage, impact-scored findings, cross-session trend awareness. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Monday 9am.

recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_detect_and_distribute","title":"Detect + Distribute","description":"Poll CMS for new posts and schedule platform-tuned captions via Buffer. recipes.name: uc_pre_meeting_reminder
recipes.description: Scans the meeting state each day for bookings starting in the next 24 hours and sends a threaded reminder email with prep, plus a messaging ping tagging the assigned rep. Default daily 08:00 UTC — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_pre_meeting_reminder","title":"Pre-meeting Reminder","description":"Scans the meeting state each day for bookings starting in the next 24 hours and sends a threaded reminder email with prep, plus a messaging ping tagging the assigned rep. recipes.name: uc_audio_production
recipes.description: On approved script, synthesize each segment via TTS, stitch with 300ms silences via ffmpeg, verify duration, and deliver the MP3 for final review. On approval, save hook/voice/pacing preferences to memory.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_audio_production","title":"Audio Production","description":"On approved script, synthesize each segment via TTS, stitch with 300ms silences via ffmpeg, verify duration, and deliver the MP3 for final review. On approval, save hook/voice/pacing preferences to memory.","capability_summary":"TTS synthesis \u2192 ffmpeg concat \u2192 final MP3 with duration verification.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"briefing.script_approved"},"description":"Fires when uc_script_draft emits an approved script. Event trigger \u2014 not user-configurable at adoption."},"connectors":["voice_generation","desktop"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Human reviews the final MP3. Approve \u2192 save approvals to memory. Reject (audio quality) \u2192 regenerate affected segments only, re-stitch. Reject (script issue) \u2192 return to uc_script_draft."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Approved voice pairings per style, pacing deltas (actual vs target), production-time distributions for capacity planning."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"briefing.script_approved","direction":"listen","description":"Script JSON ready for TTS."},{"event_type":"briefing.audio_produced","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { mp3_path, actual_duration_sec, failed_segment_count }. Emitted after ffmpeg stitches; before final review."},{"event_type":"briefing.published","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { mp3_path, duration_sec, style, voice_pairing }. Emitted after final approval."}],"error_handling":"TTS 401/403 \u2192 save script, halt for credential refresh. TTS 429 \u2192 60s pause or offer shortening. Single segment failure \u2192 mark failed in manifest, continue. FFmpeg missing \u2192 emit persona.error with install instructions, deliver segments individually. Concat incompatible \u2192 re-encode segments to uniform 44.1kHz mono 128kbps. Duration >25% off target \u2192 log + surface.","input_schema":[{"name":"segment_silence_ms","type":"number","default":300,"min":100,"max":1000,"description":"Silence inserted between segments for pacing."},{"name":"intro_music_path","type":"text","description":"Optional intro audio concatenated before the briefing."}],"sample_input":{"segment_silence_ms":300,"intro_music_path":""},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write","run_command"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"a1","type":"start","label":"briefing.script_approved received"},{"id":"a2","type":"connector","label":"TTS synthesize per segment","connector":"tts_provider"},{"id":"a3","type":"connector","label":"ffmpeg concat with silences","connector":"ffmpeg_local"},{"id":"a4","type":"action","label":"Verify duration within \u00b110%"},{"id":"a5","type":"event","label":"Emit briefing.audio_produced (review gate)"},{"id":"a6","type":"decision","label":"Approved?"},{"id":"a7","type":"action","label":"Save memory + emit briefing.published"},{"id":"a8","type":"end","label":"Briefing delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"a1","target":"a2"},{"source":"a2","target":"a3"},{"source":"a3","target":"a4"},{"source":"a4","target":"a5"},{"source":"a5","target":"a6"},{"source":"a6","target":"a2","variant":"no","label":"Re-gen segments"},{"source":"a6","target":"a7","variant":"yes","label":"Approve"},{"source":"a7","target":"a8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_script_draft
recipes.description: Distill any source (pasted text, file, URL, upstream agent output) into a structured two-host script: headline finding, key facts, tensions, implications, open questions, then turn-by-turn segments with strict pacing. Human approves before any audio synthesis. Manual trigger — user supplies the source on demand.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_script_draft","title":"Script Drafting","description":"Distill any source (pasted text, file, URL, upstream agent output) into a structured two-host script: headline finding, key facts, tensions, implications, open questions, then turn-by-turn segments with strict pacing. Human approves before any audio synthesis. Manual trigger \u2014 user supplies the source on demand.","capability_summary":"Source \u2192 distilled outline \u2192 two-host script, reviewed before TTS spend.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 user provides a source to turn into a briefing."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Human reviews the outline + script + cast before any TTS call. Approve / reject-with-comments / approve-with-edits. Max 3 rejection rounds per run \u2014 after that, suggest a style change."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Approved hook patterns, approved transition phrases, approved voice pairings, pacing deltas (user typically wants briefings N seconds shorter/longer), rejected phrases (dropped after 3 rejections)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"briefing.script_draft","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { title, target_duration_minutes, segment_count, host_cast, source_ref }. Emitted when a draft is ready for review."},{"event_type":"briefing.script_approved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { script_json_ref, word_count, estimated_duration_minutes }. Consumed by uc_audio_production."}],"error_handling":"Source <500 words \u2192 ask user whether to proceed. Source >30,000 words \u2192 per-section outline first, then merge. Source paywalled/fetch failed \u2192 ask user to paste text. No clear headline finding \u2192 surface to user before writing. 3 rejections in a row \u2192 propose a style change.","input_schema":[{"name":"briefing_style","type":"enum","options":["casual","formal","news","executive"],"default":"casual","description":"Picks host roles: casual (curious explainer + sharp questioner), formal (domain expert + skeptical reviewer), news (anchor + reporter), executive (strategic summarizer + operational realist)."},{"name":"target_duration_minutes","type":"number","default":7,"min":3,"max":20,"description":"Target runtime. Script auto-shrinks if it exceeds target by >20%."},{"name":"briefing_intent","type":"textarea","description":"Free-text hints: what to emphasize, what to downplay, tone adjustments, audience. The persona reads this each run."}],"sample_input":{"briefing_style":"{{param.aq_briefing_style}}","target_duration_minutes":"{{param.aq_target_duration}}","briefing_intent":"{{param.aq_briefing_intent}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write","http_request"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"Manual: receive source"},{"id":"s2","type":"action","label":"Validate length + load memory"},{"id":"s3","type":"action","label":"Distill: headline/facts/tensions/implications/open questions"},{"id":"s4","type":"action","label":"Cast hosts + pick voices"},{"id":"s5","type":"action","label":"Write structured segments (one idea per turn)"},{"id":"s6","type":"event","label":"Emit briefing.script_draft (review gate)"},{"id":"s7","type":"decision","label":"Approved?"},{"id":"s8","type":"event","label":"Emit briefing.script_approved"},{"id":"s9","type":"end","label":"Handoff to audio production"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5"},{"source":"s5","target":"s6"},{"source":"s6","target":"s7"},{"source":"s7","target":"s5","variant":"no","label":"Reject (rewrite)"},{"source":"s7","target":"s8","variant":"yes","label":"Approve"},{"source":"s8","target":"s9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_generate_and_curate
recipes.description: Conceive a unique art concept, generate via image AI, save to the in-app 2D gallery, present for human approval. On approval tags update + memory saves; on rejection the asset is deleted and rejection patterns update. Default daily 10:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_generate_and_curate","title":"Generate + Curate","description":"Conceive a unique art concept, generate via image AI, save to the in-app 2D gallery, present for human approval. On approval tags update + memory saves; on rejection the asset is deleted and rejection patterns update. Default daily 10:00 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Autonomous concept \u2192 generation \u2192 gallery \u2192 human curation loop with memory learning.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 10 * * *"},"description":"Default daily 10:00 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["image_generation"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every generated image requires explicit human approve/reject. Rejection triggers immediate deletion from gallery + disk. Approval saves the full prompt and palette to memory with high importance."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Approved: title, full prompt, art style, palette, composition notes, tagged 'approved'. Rejected: prompt, concept details, rejection reason, category (theme/style/color/composition/general), tagged 'rejected'. 3+ same-category rejections elevate to hard exclusion in future negative prompts."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"art.concept.generated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { asset_id, title, theme, style, palette, prompt, file_path }. Pre-review informational event."},{"event_type":"art.concept.approved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { asset_id, title, file_path, prompt, palette, style }. Emitted only after human approval."}],"error_handling":"API auth failure \u2192 emit persona.error, skip cycle. Rate limit \u2192 wait for next scheduled run. Generation timeout \u2192 cancel, skip. Content-policy rejection \u2192 rephrase once; else skip + log. Gallery save fail \u2192 emit persona.error, no review item created. Overlapping pending review \u2192 skip cycle. 3 consecutive failures \u2192 Messages alert.","input_schema":[{"name":"art_subject","type":"textarea","description":"Free-text description of subject matter, themes, and mood. Examples: 'fantasy landscapes with magical creatures', 'abstract geometric art inspired by architecture'."},{"name":"art_style","type":"enum","options":["digital_painting","watercolor","oil_painting","minimalist_vector","surrealist","photorealistic","pixel_art","ink_illustration","mixed_media"],"default":"digital_painting","description":"Visual style for generated artwork. Refined over time from feedback."},{"name":"color_mood","type":"enum","options":["vibrant_warm","cool_and_muted","monochrome","pastel","earth_tones","neon_and_bold","dark_and_moody","any"],"default":"vibrant_warm","description":"Color mood guidance for the palette."},{"name":"dimensions","type":"enum","options":["1024x1024","1024x768","1280x720","768x1024","512x512"],"default":"1024x1024","description":"Image width \u00d7 height. Larger = more credits."},{"name":"variations_per_run","type":"number","default":1,"min":1,"max":4,"description":"Variations generated per cycle; best one is filed."},{"name":"concept_history_depth","type":"number","default":50,"min":10,"max":200,"description":"How many past concepts to dedup against."}],"sample_input":{"art_subject":"{{param.aq_art_subject}}","art_style":"{{param.aq_art_style}}","color_mood":"{{param.aq_color_mood}}","dimensions":"{{param.aq_dimensions}}","variations_per_run":1,"concept_history_depth":50},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"g1","type":"start","label":"Schedule tick"},{"id":"g2","type":"decision","label":"Pending review exists?"},{"id":"g3","type":"action","label":"Load memory + conceive unique concept"},{"id":"g4","type":"connector","label":"Generate via image AI","connector":"image_ai"},{"id":"g5","type":"action","label":"Save to gallery + emit generated"},{"id":"g6","type":"action","label":"Submit review item with gallery_image_ref"},{"id":"g7","type":"decision","label":"Human approves?"},{"id":"g8","type":"action","label":"Update tags + save approval memory"},{"id":"g9","type":"event","label":"Emit art.concept.approved"},{"id":"g10","type":"action","label":"Delete asset + file + save rejection memory"},{"id":"g11","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"g1","target":"g2"},{"source":"g2","target":"g11","variant":"yes","label":"Skip (pending review)"},{"source":"g2","target":"g3","variant":"no"},{"source":"g3","target":"g4"},{"source":"g4","target":"g5"},{"source":"g5","target":"g6"},{"source":"g6","target":"g7"},{"source":"g7","target":"g8","variant":"yes","label":"Approve"},{"source":"g7","target":"g10","variant":"no","label":"Reject"},{"source":"g8","target":"g9"},{"source":"g9","target":"g11"},{"source":"g10","target":"g11"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_experiment_watch
recipes.description: Check every in-flight experiment against sample-size + duration guardrails and the significance threshold. Classify as RUNNING, WINNER, LOSER, or INCONCLUSIVE and prepare promote/revert/archive proposals for human review. Default weekly — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_experiment_watch","title":"In-Flight Experiment Significance Watch","description":"Check every in-flight experiment against sample-size + duration guardrails and the significance threshold. Classify as RUNNING, WINNER, LOSER, or INCONCLUSIVE and prepare promote/revert/archive proposals for human review. Default weekly \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Significance gating + promote/revert/archive proposals for in-flight experiments.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default weekly Monday 09:00 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step. Shared across all three capabilities via trigger_composition: shared."},"connectors":["analytics"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every promote_winner, revert_to_control, and archive_experiment action goes through manual_review before the backend is called. Severity=warning (live-traffic change) for promotions and reverts; severity=info for archives. Approval executes; rejection records a learning and skips."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`experiments_state.json` \u2014 in-flight experiment ledger with start_date, control copy, variant copy, target metric, per-arm counters. Used for significance math and longitudinal analysis."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"cro.experiment.winner_detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: experiment_id, page_url, category, lift, p_value. Emitted when an experiment passes guardrails and the variant significantly beats control."},{"event_type":"cro.experiment.loser_detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: experiment_id, page_url, category, lift, p_value. Emitted when the variant significantly loses to control."},{"event_type":"cro.experiment.inconclusive","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: experiment_id, page_url, category, weeks_running. Emitted when an experiment is archived after 4 weeks without reaching significance."},{"event_type":"cro.experiment.winner_promoted","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: experiment_id, variant_copy, final_lift. Emitted after the user approves promotion and the backend confirms rollout to 100%."},{"event_type":"cro.experiment.loser_reverted","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: experiment_id, reason. Emitted after the user approves revert and the backend confirms control restoration."}],"error_handling":"Backend 401/403 \u2192 halt deployment actions, prompt re-auth. 429 / 5xx \u2192 retry once, then defer the approved action to `pending_actions.json`. Zero conversions in an arm \u2192 mark RUNNING; wait for data. Split imbalance > 20% \u2192 flag SUSPICIOUS, do not promote even when significant. Negative variant lift but 'winning' statistically \u2192 math bug, do not act; log.","input_schema":[{"name":"min_sample_size","type":"number","default":1000,"min":100,"max":100000,"description":"Minimum visitors per arm before significance is computed. Lower = faster but noisier."},{"name":"min_duration_days","type":"number","default":7,"min":1,"max":60,"description":"Minimum experiment duration before a winner can be called, regardless of sample size."},{"name":"significance_threshold","type":"number","default":0.05,"min":0.01,"max":0.1,"description":"p-value threshold for the two-proportion z-test. 0.05 is the scientific default."}],"sample_input":{"min_sample_size":"{{param.aq_min_sample_size}}","min_duration_days":"{{param.aq_min_duration_days}}","significance_threshold":0.05},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"w1","type":"start","label":"Weekly tick (shared)"},{"id":"w2","type":"action","label":"Load experiments_state.json"},{"id":"w3","type":"connector","label":"Fetch per-arm counts from backend","connector":"cro_backend"},{"id":"w4","type":"action","label":"Apply sample-size + duration gates"},{"id":"w5","type":"action","label":"Compute z-test, classify RUNNING/WINNER/LOSER/INCONCLUSIVE"},{"id":"w6","type":"action","label":"Prepare promote / revert / archive proposals"},{"id":"w7","type":"action","label":"Submit each for manual_review"},{"id":"w8","type":"connector","label":"Execute approved actions on backend","connector":"cro_backend"},{"id":"w9","type":"event","label":"Emit winner_promoted / loser_reverted / inconclusive"},{"id":"w10","type":"end","label":"Experiment watch section ready for combined briefing"}],"edges":[{"source":"w1","target":"w2"},{"source":"w2","target":"w3"},{"source":"w3","target":"w4"},{"source":"w4","target":"w5"},{"source":"w5","target":"w6"},{"source":"w6","target":"w7"},{"source":"w7","target":"w8"},{"source":"w8","target":"w9"},{"source":"w9","target":"w10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_variant_proposals
recipes.description: Identify underperforming pages (conversion rate > 15% below baseline) and generate up to max_new_variants_per_run hypotheses per page. Each carries category, expected lift, and target metric. Routed through human review; approved ones deploy to the experimentation backend. Default weekly — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_variant_proposals","title":"New Variant Proposals","description":"Identify underperforming pages (conversion rate > 15% below baseline) and generate up to max_new_variants_per_run hypotheses per page. Each carries category, expected lift, and target metric. Routed through human review; approved ones deploy to the experimentation backend. Default weekly \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Memory-filtered variant hypotheses for underperforming pages, human-gated deployment.","category":"strategy","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default weekly Monday 09:00 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["analytics"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every proposed variant goes through manual_review before deployment (severity=info; the proposal has not yet served traffic). Approved proposals deploy to the backend; rejected ones persist as category learnings in `variant_patterns.json`."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`variant_patterns.json` \u2014 accept/reject counts per category (headline, cta, hero_copy, section_reorder, social_proof, urgency, benefits) plus per-category historical lift outcomes. Drives memory-informed filtering (skip categories rejected 3+ times unless expected lift > 30%; favor categories accepted 3+ times).","learning_threshold":3},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"cro.variant.proposed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: proposal_id, page_url, category, expected_lift, hypothesis. Emitted per new hypothesis at generation time."},{"event_type":"cro.experiment.started","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: experiment_id, page_url, variant_copy, target_metric. Emitted after user approval and successful backend deployment."},{"event_type":"cro.page.underperforming","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: page_url, current_cr, baseline_cr, magnitude. Emitted when a page's conversion rate drops > 15% below its 4-week baseline."}],"error_handling":"Analytics fetch failure \u2192 skip proposal generation this run; do NOT propose blind. analytics missing flag \u2192 mark `blocked_missing_flag` and surface the requirement to the user. Excluded page matched \u2192 never propose; skip silently. More than max_new_variants_per_run pages flagged \u2192 take top N by magnitude of baseline deviation.","input_schema":[{"name":"max_new_variants_per_run","type":"number","default":3,"min":1,"max":10,"description":"Cap on new variant proposals per run to avoid interaction effects on the same page."},{"name":"target_pages","type":"text","description":"Comma-separated URL paths allowed for experimentation (e.g. `/, /pricing, /features`). Pages NOT in this list are never touched. Legal/checkout pages should be excluded."}],"sample_input":{"max_new_variants_per_run":"{{param.aq_max_variants}}","target_pages":"{{param.aq_target_pages_intent}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"v1","type":"start","label":"Weekly tick (shared)"},{"id":"v2","type":"connector","label":"Pull 7-day analytics + 4-week baseline","connector":"cro_backend"},{"id":"v3","type":"action","label":"Flag pages > 15% below baseline (within target list)"},{"id":"v4","type":"action","label":"Load variant_patterns memory"},{"id":"v5","type":"action","label":"Generate hypotheses, apply memory filter, cap at N"},{"id":"v6","type":"event","label":"Emit cro.variant.proposed per hypothesis"},{"id":"v7","type":"action","label":"Submit each for manual_review"},{"id":"v8","type":"connector","label":"Deploy approved variants to backend","connector":"cro_backend"},{"id":"v9","type":"event","label":"Emit cro.experiment.started"},{"id":"v10","type":"end","label":"Proposals section ready for combined briefing"}],"edges":[{"source":"v1","target":"v2"},{"source":"v2","target":"v3"},{"source":"v3","target":"v4"},{"source":"v4","target":"v5"},{"source":"v5","target":"v6"},{"source":"v6","target":"v7"},{"source":"v7","target":"v8"},{"source":"v8","target":"v9"},{"source":"v9","target":"v10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_weekly_report
recipes.description: Compose and deliver the combined weekly CRO briefing — executive summary, in-flight experiments table, significant results, new proposals, inconclusive archives. Delivered regardless of review outcomes so the user always has visibility. Default weekly — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_report","title":"Combined CRO Report","description":"Compose and deliver the combined weekly CRO briefing \u2014 executive summary, in-flight experiments table, significant results, new proposals, inconclusive archives. Delivered regardless of review outcomes so the user always has visibility. recipes.name: uc_daily_digest
recipes.description: Posts a messaging summary of the last 24 hours: issues auto-resolved, issues escalated, issues auto-closed, issues still stale — with links to notable tickets in each bucket. Default daily 9 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_daily_digest","title":"Support Digest","description":"Posts a messaging summary of the last 24 hours: issues auto-resolved, issues escalated, issues auto-closed, issues still stale \u2014 with links to notable tickets in each bucket. links.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * recipes.name: uc_stale_triage
recipes.description: Polls Jira for issues open past the stale threshold. Classifies state, gauges reporter sentiment, searches knowledge base + local KB for matching solutions, posts high-confidence resolutions, escalates angry + P1/P2 reporters to engineering management, and auto-closes abandoned issues. Default 15-min polling — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_stale_triage","title":"Stale Issue Triage & Resolution","description":"Polls Jira for issues open past the stale threshold. Classifies state, gauges reporter sentiment, searches knowledge base + local KB for matching solutions, posts high-confidence resolutions, escalates angry + P1/P2 reporters to engineering management, and auto-closes abandoned issues. Default 15-min polling \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Stale-issue classification + sentiment-routed auto-resolution, escalation, and abandoned-issue cleanup.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/15 * * * *"},"description":"Default every 15 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["jira","knowledge_base","messaging"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"slack","description":"Primary alerts channel for auto-resolution notifications and sentiment alerts."},{"type":"slack","description":"Escalation channel for angry + P1/P2 issues requiring immediate engineering attention."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Solutions scoring 60-79 on confidence are logged for human review but not posted. Angry + P1/P2 issues bypass auto-resolution and route directly to manual_review with full context for the on-call engineering manager."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"data/solutions_kb.json grows with every confirmed resolution: symptom patterns, solution steps, source issue key, times_confirmed counter, confidence score. Rejected solutions decrement confidence. Reporter sentiment history per reporter email accumulates over cycles to improve future classification."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"issue.triage.auto_resolved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: issue key, solution source (knowledge base pages URL or local KB entry id), confidence score, reporter sentiment at time of posting."},{"event_type":"issue.triage.escalated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: issue key, priority, sentiment score, escalation recipient, full context summary."},{"event_type":"issue.triage.auto_closed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: issue key, reason (abandoned / silently_resolved / confirmation_timeout), days inactive."},{"event_type":"issue.triage.error","direction":"emit","description":"Emitted on Jira 401, repeated messaging failures, or corrupted state files. Triggers credential refresh or admin alerts downstream."}],"error_handling":"Jira 429 \u2192 respect Retry-After, resume next cycle. Comment post failure \u2192 log-only, no same-cycle retry.
