recipes.name: uc_morning_digest
recipes.description: Consume curated BI saved queries/cards, compute deltas against the prior run, flag direction-aware anomalies, deliver plain-English digest with deep links. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default weekday 8am.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_morning_digest","title":"Morning BI Digest","description":"Consume curated BI saved queries/cards, compute deltas against the prior run, flag direction-aware anomalies, deliver plain-English digest with deep links. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default weekday 8am.","capability_summary":"Weekday digest of saved BI queries with direction-aware anomaly flagging and deep links.","category":"analytics","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * 1-5","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default weekday 8:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["bi","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-query snapshots `{value, timestamp, label}` \u2014 the prior two retained to survive skipped runs. Feeds WoW delta calculations and anomaly thresholding."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"bi.digest.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { date, status (green|yellow|red), num_metrics, num_anomalies }."},{"event_type":"bi.anomaly.flagged","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { query_id, label, value, prior_value, percent_delta, direction }. Per bad-direction breach; downstream alerting workflows subscribe."}],"error_handling":"Every metric failed \u2192 emit user_message + abort the run. recipes.name: uc_domain_scan
recipes.description: Generate lookalike domain variants (typosquat, homoglyph, TLD, combosquat, subdomain abuse via CT logs), resolve each via DNS, and detect newly registered domains through delta-comparison against the known-domains ledger. Emits an event per new detection; deeper analysis runs in the next capability. Default cadence daily 06:00 UTC — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_domain_scan","title":"Domain Scan","description":"Generate lookalike domain variants (typosquat, homoglyph, TLD, combosquat, subdomain abuse via CT logs), resolve each via DNS, and detect newly registered domains through delta-comparison against the known-domains ledger. Emits an event per new detection; deeper analysis runs in the next capability. Default cadence daily 06:00 UTC \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Daily variant generation, DNS resolution, and new-registration detection against a persistent ledger.","category":"monitoring","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 6 * * *","timezone":"UTC"},"description":"Default daily 06:00 UTC \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Known-domains ledger (domains + last-seen state). Scan-progress checkpoint for resumable batches. Variant generation cache keyed by brand config \u2014 regenerated only when brand settings change."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"brand.domain.new","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { domain, resolved_ip, generation_method, detected_at }. Consumed by uc_threat_analysis for deep scoring."}],"error_handling":"DNS timeout \u2192 mark DNS_UNRESOLVED, retry next cycle. Interrupted scan \u2192 resume from checkpoint. Massive variant lists processed in daily batches of 2K; highest similarity first.","input_schema":[{"name":"brand_name","type":"text","description":"The exact brand name used to generate lookalike variants (drives typosquat, homoglyph, combosquat mutations)."},{"name":"primary_domain","type":"text","description":"Your main website domain. Used as the reference for content similarity comparison and for excluding your own domain from threat flagging."},{"name":"monitored_tlds","type":"text","description":"Country-code TLDs to monitor in addition to the defaults (.com,.net,.org,.io,.co,.app,.dev,.xyz,.info,.biz,.online,.site,.tech). Comma-separated."}],"sample_input":{"brand_name":"{{param.aq_brand_name}}","primary_domain":"{{param.aq_primary_domain}}","monitored_tlds":"{{param.aq_monitored_tlds}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"Daily scan tick"},{"id":"s2","type":"action","label":"Load brand config + allow-list + known-domains"},{"id":"s3","type":"action","label":"Generate variant list (typosquat / homoglyph / TLD / combosquat)"},{"id":"s4","type":"action","label":"Batch DNS resolution (50/batch)"},{"id":"s5","type":"decision","label":"Resolved AND not in known-domains?"},{"id":"s6","type":"event","label":"Emit brand.domain.new per new detection"},{"id":"s7","type":"action","label":"Update known-domains ledger"},{"id":"s8","type":"end","label":"Scan cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5"},{"source":"s5","target":"s6","variant":"yes","label":"New"},{"source":"s5","target":"s7","variant":"no","label":"Known"},{"source":"s6","target":"s7"},{"source":"s7","target":"s8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_threat_analysis
recipes.description: For each newly detected domain, run full analysis: WHOIS lookup, DNS record enumeration, HTTP content fetch, Certificate Transparency check, hosting attribution. Score on five factors (similarity / content / email / infrastructure / recency) for a 1-10 total, classify, and track in knowledge base. For score 7+: immediate messaging alert and drafted registrar + hosting abuse reports with UDRP citation. Score 4-6: bundled daily digest. Humans submit the drafted reports.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_threat_analysis","title":"Threat Analysis & Alerting","description":"For each newly detected domain, run full analysis: WHOIS lookup, DNS record enumeration, HTTP content fetch, Certificate Transparency check, hosting attribution. Score on five factors (similarity / content / email / infrastructure / recency) for a 1-10 total, classify, and track in knowledge base. For score 7+: immediate messaging alert and drafted registrar + hosting abuse reports with UDRP citation. Score 4-6: bundled daily digest. Humans submit the drafted reports.","capability_summary":"Deep analysis + 1-10 threat scoring + messaging alerts + drafted abuse reports per new detection.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"brand.domain.new"},"description":"Fires per new detection from uc_domain_scan. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["security","knowledge_base","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Score 7+ findings surface to humans as explicit alerts. Drafted abuse reports are advisory \u2014 humans review and file. Score 4-6 batched to daily digest; humans mark status in knowledge base."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-domain analysis history, threat-pattern observations (frequent mutation types), registrar response times (from abuse report outcomes)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"brand.domain.new","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming detection from uc_domain_scan."},{"event_type":"brand.threat.detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { domain, threat_score, category, has_mx, has_ssl, hosting_provider, registrar }. Emitted for score 7+ findings. Consumed by incident response / legal / WAF orchestration."},{"event_type":"brand.abuse.drafted","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { domain, registrar_report_path, hosting_report_path, evidence_summary }. Emitted when abuse reports are drafted (score 7+ with content mimicry)."},{"event_type":"brand.threat.resolved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { domain, resolution_method, days_to_resolve }. Emitted when a previously flagged domain is confirmed taken down or reclassified as benign in a subsequent scan."}],"error_handling":"WHOIS unavailable \u2192 continue DNS-only, mark WHOIS=unavailable. Privacy-protected WHOIS \u2192 +0.5 infrastructure suspicion. HTTP unreachable \u2192 score on domain/DNS factors only. Cloudflare/bot-blocked \u2192 retry with varied UA. knowledge base outage \u2192 queue to pending_notion.json. messaging outage \u2192 queue to pending_slack.json; fallback channel if configured. Common-word brand \u2192 raise alert threshold to 8+.","input_schema":[{"name":"alert_threshold","type":"number","default":7,"min":5,"max":10,"description":"Minimum threat score that triggers an immediate messaging alert and abuse report drafting. Raise to 8+ for brands that are common English words."}],"sample_input":{"alert_threshold":"{{param.aq_alert_threshold}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"t1","type":"start","label":"brand.domain.new received"},{"id":"t2","type":"connector","label":"WHOIS + full DNS + HTTP content + crt.sh","connector":"whoisxml"},{"id":"t3","type":"action","label":"Compute 1-10 threat score + category"},{"id":"t4","type":"connector","label":"Upsert knowledge base entry","connector":"knowledge_base"},{"id":"t5","type":"decision","label":"Score >= alert threshold?"},{"id":"t6","type":"action","label":"Draft registrar + hosting abuse reports"},{"id":"t7","type":"connector","label":"Post messaging alert to #brand-protection","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"t8","type":"event","label":"Emit brand.threat.detected / brand.abuse.drafted"},{"id":"t9","type":"end","label":"Analysis complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"t1","target":"t2"},{"source":"t2","target":"t3"},{"source":"t3","target":"t4"},{"source":"t4","target":"t5"},{"source":"t5","target":"t6","variant":"yes","label":"High threat"},{"source":"t5","target":"t9","variant":"no","label":"Below threshold"},{"source":"t6","target":"t7"},{"source":"t7","target":"t8"},{"source":"t8","target":"t9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_api_recovery
recipes.description: Listens for `budget.access.failure` from the weekly check and delivers a targeted Messages alert explaining why the agent is blind this week — expired credentials, rate limit, partial data, or empty billing — with provider-specific troubleshooting steps.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_api_recovery","title":"Billing API Recovery Alerts","description":"Listens for `budget.access.failure` from the weekly check and delivers a targeted Messages alert explaining why the agent is blind this week \u2014 expired credentials, rate limit, partial data, or empty billing \u2014 with provider-specific troubleshooting steps.","capability_summary":"Credential-troubleshooting alerts when the billing API is unreachable or incomplete.","category":"notifications","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"budget.access.failure"},"description":"Event-triggered. recipes.name: uc_weekly_spending_check
recipes.description: Pull last-7-day billing, compute WoW deltas against the rolling baseline, evaluate against the spending threshold, and alert via Messages ONLY if anomaly conditions are met — threshold breach, >50% service spike, new service appearance, or 4+-day acceleration. Silent when normal. Default weekly Monday 9:00 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_spending_check","title":"Spending Check","description":"Pull last-7-day billing, compute WoW deltas against the rolling baseline, evaluate against the spending threshold, and alert via Messages ONLY if anomaly conditions are met \u2014 threshold breach, >50% service spike, new service appearance, or 4+-day acceleration. Silent when normal. Default weekly Monday 9:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Weekly billing scan with conditional anomaly-only alerting.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default Mondays 9:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["cloud"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`spending_history.json` \u2014 rolling 8-week per-service cost data for baseline and WoW comparison. recipes.name: uc_failure_analysis
recipes.description: Parses CircleCI pipeline webhook events, fetches job steps + artifacts, classifies the failure, extracts file and line references, applies flaky-test memory, and posts an enriched messages. Emits build.failure.analyzed so uc_pr_comment_lifecycle can mirror the analysis to any associated PR. Default webhook-triggered — cadence not user-configurable; event triggers bypass the composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_failure_analysis","title":"Failure Analysis","description":"Parses CircleCI pipeline webhook events, fetches job steps + artifacts, classifies the failure, extracts file and line references, applies flaky-test memory, and posts an enriched messages. Emits build.failure.analyzed so uc_pr_comment_lifecycle can mirror the analysis to any associated PR. Default webhook-triggered \u2014 cadence not user-configurable; event triggers bypass the composition step.","capability_summary":"CircleCI webhook \u2192 root-cause analysis \u2192 messaging formatted layout + recovery detection.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"webhook","config":{"source":"circleci","events":["workflow-completed","job-completed"]},"description":"Default CircleCI webhook on workflow/job completion \u2014 not user-configurable at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["circleci","messaging"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"slack","description":"Channel that receives enriched failure notifications and recovery notices."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-test flakiness ledger (pass/fail window, branches, score). Per-branch last-build status for recovery detection. recipes.name: uc_flaky_digest
recipes.description: Aggregates the flaky-test ledger over the past 7 days, ranks offenders by flakiness score, posts a formatted messaging layout digest to the configured messaging channels, and prunes entries older than 30 days. Default Monday 9am — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_flaky_digest","title":"Flaky Test Digest","description":"Aggregates the flaky-test ledger over the past 7 days, ranks offenders by flakiness score, posts a formatted messaging layout digest to the configured messaging channels, and prunes entries older than 30 days. recipes.name: uc_pr_comment_lifecycle
recipes.description: Event-listens on build.failure.analyzed. For analyses that map to an open PR, looks up the bot's existing analysis comment and PATCHes it (otherwise POSTs new). Stores a PR→comment_id map so repeated runs on the same PR update in place instead of piling duplicates.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_pr_comment_lifecycle","title":"PR Comment Lifecycle","description":"Event-listens on build.failure.analyzed. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["source_control"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"pr_comment_map.json keys PR identity \u2192 bot comment id so subsequent analyses edit the existing comment."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"build.failure.analyzed","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming analysis payload from uc_failure_analysis."}],"error_handling":"source control 404 on commit\u2192PR lookup \u2192 skip (not all commits have PRs). source control 403 scope missing \u2192 log once, mark PR lifecycle disabled until credential refresh. source control 422 (body too large) \u2192 truncate to 60k + 'full log' link. recipes.name: uc_client_onboarding
recipes.description: Captures signup via webhook, verifies email with OTP, creates linked knowledge base Client + Project pages, generates a personalized welcome email, and posts a team announcement. Event-driven from inbound webhooks.

recipes.name: uc_phase_monitoring

recipes.name: uc_stall_escalation
recipes.description: Identifies stalled projects (no phase change in 7+ days) and escalates through a 7/14/21-day ladder: messaging channels alert, direct messages to PM + team lead, then client re-engagement email. Deduped per project every 3 days. Default hourly — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_stall_escalation","title":"Stall Escalation","description":"Identifies stalled projects (no phase change in 7+ days) and escalates through a 7/14/21-day ladder: messaging channels alert, direct messages to PM + team lead, then client re-engagement email. recipes.name: uc_context_map_refresh
recipes.description: Loads the codebase's context map, verifies every file still exists, discovers orphaned files, and flags contexts whose descriptions no longer match the code. Emits codebase.context_map.refreshed so the dimension scan runs against an up-to-date grouping. Default monthly — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_context_map_refresh","title":"Context Map Refresh","description":"Loads the codebase's context map, verifies every file still exists, discovers orphaned files, and flags contexts whose descriptions no longer match the code. Emits codebase.context_map.refreshed so the dimension scan runs against an up-to-date grouping. recipes.name: uc_dimension_scan
recipes.description: For each context group, scores Security / Quality / Coverage / Debt (0–100), creates backlog ideas for each issue with effort + impact + risk, and emits codebase.scan.completed per group. Runs on codebase.context_map.refreshed so scoring uses the latest grouping.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_dimension_scan","title":"Dimension Scan","description":"For each context group, scores Security / Quality / Coverage / Debt (0\u2013100), creates backlog ideas for each issue with effort + impact + risk, and emits codebase.scan.completed per group. Runs on codebase.context_map.refreshed so scoring uses the latest grouping.","capability_summary":"Four-dimension scoring per context group with actionable idea creation.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"codebase.context_map.refreshed"},"description":"Fires after the context map is refreshed. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["codebase"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"open_ideas.json prevents duplicate idea creation. Prior health_snapshots feed delta-vs-prev reasoning."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"codebase.context_map.refreshed","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming refreshed map from uc_context_map_refresh."},{"event_type":"codebase.scan.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { context_group, security_score, quality_score, coverage_score, debt_score, idea_ids[], context_map_version }. One per scanned group. Consumed by uc_health_report."}],"error_handling":"Coverage cannot be determined (non-standard test layout) \u2192 emit with coverage_score='uninstrumented' instead of guessing. create_idea duplicate \u2192 reuse existing id. File read failure \u2192 skip the file, score partial, note in idea metadata.","input_schema":[{"name":"dimensions","type":"multi_select","options":["security","quality","coverage","debt"],"default":["security","quality","coverage","debt"],"description":"Which dimensions to score. Defaults to all four."}],"sample_input":{"dimensions":"{{param.aq_dimensions}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"codebase.context_map.refreshed received"},{"id":"s2","type":"connector","label":"search_code + read_file per group","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"s3","type":"action","label":"Score 4 dimensions 0\u2013100"},{"id":"s4","type":"connector","label":"list_ideas + create_idea (dedup)","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"s5","type":"event","label":"Emit codebase.scan.completed per group"},{"id":"s6","type":"end","label":"All groups scanned"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5"},{"source":"s5","target":"s6"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_health_report
recipes.description: Aggregates per-group scan results, compares against the prior monthly snapshot, composes the combined report (table + top-3 priorities + context-map change log + trend deltas), posts via Messages, and appends a new snapshot for future trend tracking.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_health_report","title":"Health Report","description":"Aggregates per-group scan results, compares against the prior monthly snapshot, composes the combined report (table + top-3 priorities + context-map change log + trend deltas), posts via Messages, and appends a new snapshot for future trend tracking.","capability_summary":"Compose and deliver the combined monthly health report; append snapshot.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"codebase.scan.completed"},"description":"Fires once all groups have reported. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Channel where the combined monthly health report is posted."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"health_snapshots/*.json is append-only \u2014 each monthly report writes a new record without overwriting prior history."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"codebase.scan.completed","direction":"listen","description":"Per-group scan results from uc_dimension_scan."},{"event_type":"codebase.health.report_posted","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { overall, per_group, per_dimension, deltas, snapshot_path }. Downstream trend dashboards subscribe."}],"error_handling":"No prior snapshot (first run) \u2192 emit report with delta=null + 'baseline established' note. Messages post failure \u2192 persist report JSON locally, retry once, then log. snapshots directory corrupt \u2192 start fresh and note reset.","input_schema":[{"name":"report_verbosity","type":"enum","options":["summary","standard","verbose"],"default":"standard","description":"How much detail to include in the Messages post."}],"sample_input":{"report_verbosity":"{{param.aq_report_verbosity}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"h1","type":"start","label":"All groups reported"},{"id":"h2","type":"action","label":"Load prior snapshot; compute deltas"},{"id":"h3","type":"action","label":"Compose report: table + top-3 + change log"},{"id":"h4","type":"action","label":"Post combined report via Messages"},{"id":"h5","type":"action","label":"Append YYYY-MM.json snapshot"},{"id":"h6","type":"event","label":"Emit codebase.health.report_posted"},{"id":"h7","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"h1","target":"h2"},{"source":"h2","target":"h3"},{"source":"h3","target":"h4"},{"source":"h4","target":"h5"},{"source":"h5","target":"h6"},{"source":"h6","target":"h7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_batch_enrichment
recipes.description: Systematically process the full contact database against email history. Prioritises contacts by staleness (never-enriched first, then oldest last_enriched_at). Applies signature-extracted fields that clear the confidence threshold; routes contradictions to uc_conflict_resolution. Default weekly Monday 6am — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_batch_enrichment","title":"Batch Enrichment","description":"Systematically process the full contact database against email history. Prioritises contacts by staleness (never-enriched first, then oldest last_enriched_at). Applies signature-extracted fields that clear the confidence threshold; routes contradictions to uc_conflict_resolution. Default weekly Monday 6am \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Full-database signature mining with confidence-gated auto-updates.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 6 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default weekly Monday 6:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["email","personas_database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-contact enrichment log (last_enriched_at, fields updated, confidence scores, source email IDs). Source-email corroboration counts per field value \u2014 reinforces confidence across runs."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"contact.enrichment.batch_completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { contacts_processed, contacts_enriched, fields_added, conflicts_detected, avg_confidence }. Downstream dashboards can subscribe for coverage metrics."},{"event_type":"contact.enrichment.conflict_detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { contact_id, field, existing_value, existing_confidence, extracted_value, extracted_confidence, source_email_ids }. Consumed by uc_conflict_resolution."}],"error_handling":"email auth expired \u2192 halt; re-auth alert via Messages. email rate-limited \u2192 exponential backoff, reduce batch size, resume next cycle. Contact with no email history \u2192 mark enrichment_attempted, skip, never clear existing data. >50% email parse failures for a contact \u2192 flag for manual review.","input_schema":[{"name":"max_contacts_per_run","type":"number","default":50,"min":5,"max":500,"description":"Maximum number of contacts to process per batch run."},{"name":"confidence_threshold","type":"number","default":0.7,"min":0.3,"max":1,"description":"Minimum confidence (0.0-1.0) required for an extracted field to be auto-applied."},{"name":"max_gmail_lookback_days","type":"number","default":90,"min":7,"max":365,"description":"How far back to search email during batch runs."}],"sample_input":{"max_contacts_per_run":"{{param.aq_max_contacts}}","confidence_threshold":"{{param.aq_confidence_threshold}}","max_gmail_lookback_days":"{{param.aq_lookback_days}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"b1","type":"start","label":"Batch tick"},{"id":"b2","type":"action","label":"Load contacts sorted by staleness"},{"id":"b3","type":"connector","label":"email history per contact","connector":"email"},{"id":"b4","type":"action","label":"Parse signatures; score confidence per field"},{"id":"b5","type":"decision","label":"Conflict with existing?"},{"id":"b6","type":"connector","label":"Write updates to contact DB","connector":"personas_database"},{"id":"b7","type":"event","label":"Emit contact.enrichment.conflict_detected"},{"id":"b8","type":"event","label":"Emit contact.enrichment.batch_completed"},{"id":"b9","type":"end","label":"Batch complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"b1","target":"b2"},{"source":"b2","target":"b3"},{"source":"b3","target":"b4"},{"source":"b4","target":"b5"},{"source":"b5","target":"b6","variant":"no","label":"No conflict"},{"source":"b5","target":"b7","variant":"yes","label":"Conflict"},{"source":"b6","target":"b8"},{"source":"b7","target":"b8"},{"source":"b8","target":"b9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_conflict_resolution
recipes.description: Event-listen on conflicts emitted by batch or incremental enrichment. Presents the human with both values, confidence scores, source email counts, and a recommendation. Applies the decision and memorises the pattern so future similar conflicts can be pre-classified.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_conflict_resolution","title":"Conflict Resolution","description":"Event-listen on conflicts emitted by batch or incremental enrichment. Presents the human with both values, confidence scores, source email counts, and a recommendation. Applies the decision and memorises the pattern so future similar conflicts can be pre-classified.","capability_summary":"Human-in-the-loop reconciliation of contradictory contact field updates.","category":"review","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"contact.enrichment.conflict_detected"},"description":"Fires per conflict emitted by uc_batch_enrichment or uc_incremental_update. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["personas_database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every conflict routed here requires a human decision \u2014 accept new, keep existing, or supply a different value. Decisions are persisted to memory so the agent can pre-classify repeat patterns."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-field conflict ledger keyed by (field, existing_value_pattern, extracted_value_pattern, user_decision). Over time, repeat accepts of a pattern (e.g. title-promotion patterns) can be auto-applied below the confidence threshold with user opt-in."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"contact.enrichment.conflict_detected","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming conflict from batch or incremental enrichment."},{"event_type":"contact.enrichment.conflict_resolved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { contact_id, field, decision, final_value, human_notes? }. Downstream CRM sync agents can subscribe."}],"error_handling":"Messages delivery failure on conflict card \u2192 queue in `pending_conflicts.json`, retry next cycle. Never auto-resolve unreviewed conflicts \u2014 they age in the queue and surface in the next summary.","input_schema":[],"sample_input":{},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"c1","type":"start","label":"conflict_detected received"},{"id":"c2","type":"action","label":"Load provenance; compose recommendation"},{"id":"c3","type":"decision","label":"Human decision"},{"id":"c4","type":"connector","label":"Apply decision to contact DB","connector":"personas_database"},{"id":"c5","type":"action","label":"Persist pattern to memory"},{"id":"c6","type":"event","label":"Emit contact.enrichment.conflict_resolved"},{"id":"c7","type":"end","label":"Conflict resolved"}],"edges":[{"source":"c1","target":"c2"},{"source":"c2","target":"c3"},{"source":"c3","target":"c4"},{"source":"c4","target":"c5"},{"source":"c5","target":"c6"},{"source":"c6","target":"c7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_incremental_update
recipes.description: Scan email for emails received since the last incremental run and merge any signature changes into matching contacts. Empty-field fills auto-apply at threshold; agreeing values reinforce existing confidence; contradictions route to uc_conflict_resolution. Default daily 7am — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_incremental_update","title":"Incremental Update","description":"Scan email for emails received since the last incremental run and merge any signature changes into matching contacts. Empty-field fills auto-apply at threshold; agreeing values reinforce existing confidence; contradictions route to uc_conflict_resolution. Default daily 7am \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Daily incremental scan that merges fresh signature data into existing contacts.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 7 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 7:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["email","personas_database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`last_incremental_scan_at` timestamp. Per-field corroboration counters (reinforce on agreement). Per-contact unmatched-address counter (3+ unmatched hits from the same address \u2192 surface as potential new contact)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"contact.enrichment.incremental_completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { emails_scanned, contacts_updated, fields_reinforced, conflicts_detected, new_contact_candidates }."},{"event_type":"contact.enrichment.conflict_detected","direction":"emit","description":"Same payload shape as batch; consumed by uc_conflict_resolution."}],"error_handling":"email quota exhausted \u2192 pause, resume on next tick with a trimmed window. Unmatched address seen 3+ times \u2192 emit potential new-contact suggestion via Messages; do not auto-create. Missing `last_incremental_scan_at` \u2192 fall back to `enrichment_interval_hours` window and log the gap.","input_schema":[{"name":"enrichment_interval_hours","type":"number","default":24,"min":1,"max":168,"description":"Lookback window in hours when running incremental updates."},{"name":"confidence_threshold","type":"number","default":0.7,"min":0.3,"max":1,"description":"Minimum confidence for auto-filling empty fields."}],"sample_input":{"enrichment_interval_hours":"{{param.aq_incremental_interval}}","confidence_threshold":"{{param.aq_confidence_threshold}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"i1","type":"start","label":"Incremental tick"},{"id":"i2","type":"connector","label":"email since last_incremental_scan_at","connector":"email"},{"id":"i3","type":"action","label":"Match email \u2192 contact; extract signatures"},{"id":"i4","type":"decision","label":"Merge outcome"},{"id":"i5","type":"connector","label":"Auto-apply empty fields; reinforce agreeing fields","connector":"personas_database"},{"id":"i6","type":"event","label":"Emit conflict_detected for contradictions"},{"id":"i7","type":"event","label":"Emit incremental_completed"},{"id":"i8","type":"end","label":"Incremental complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"i1","target":"i2"},{"source":"i2","target":"i3"},{"source":"i3","target":"i4"},{"source":"i4","target":"i5","variant":"no","label":"Merge / reinforce"},{"source":"i4","target":"i6","variant":"yes","label":"Contradiction"},{"source":"i5","target":"i7"},{"source":"i6","target":"i7"},{"source":"i7","target":"i8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_conflict_resolution
recipes.description: Processes accumulated field-level contact conflicts. Groups them by contact for unified review, presents both values with provenance and confidence, applies the human decision to the database, and logs the resolution. Event-listen on `contact.sync.conflict_detected`.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_conflict_resolution","title":"Conflict Resolution","description":"Processes accumulated field-level contact conflicts. Groups them by contact for unified review, presents both values with provenance and confidence, applies the human decision to the database, and logs the resolution. Event-listen on `contact.sync.conflict_detected`.","capability_summary":"Batch human review and resolution of contradictory field updates.","category":"review","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"contact.sync.conflict_detected"},"description":"Fires per conflict emitted by uc_signature_extraction. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["personas_database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every conflict requires explicit human arbitration. Decisions persist with `resolution_source: human` in change history."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Conflict resolution ledger \u2014 which field patterns the user typically accepts vs rejects. Repeated accept-patterns can be surfaced to the user as candidates for auto-resolution opt-in."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"contact.sync.conflict_detected","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming conflict from uc_signature_extraction."},{"event_type":"contact.sync.conflict_resolved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { contact_id, fields_resolved, decisions, timestamp }. Downstream CRM sync agents can subscribe."}],"error_handling":"Messages delivery failure \u2192 queue review request in `pending_conflicts.json`. Never auto-resolve unreviewed conflicts \u2014 they age in the queue.","input_schema":[],"sample_input":{},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"c1","type":"start","label":"conflict_detected received"},{"id":"c2","type":"action","label":"Load pending conflicts; group by contact"},{"id":"c3","type":"action","label":"Present to human with provenance + recommendation"},{"id":"c4","type":"connector","label":"Apply decision to contacts.json","connector":"personas_database"},{"id":"c5","type":"action","label":"Log resolution to change_history.json"},{"id":"c6","type":"event","label":"Emit conflict_resolved"},{"id":"c7","type":"end","label":"Queue cleared"}],"edges":[{"source":"c1","target":"c2"},{"source":"c2","target":"c3"},{"source":"c3","target":"c4"},{"source":"c4","target":"c5"},{"source":"c5","target":"c6"},{"source":"c6","target":"c7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_freshness_audit
recipes.description: Weekly scan of the contact database to identify records not corroborated within `stale_contact_days`, compute field-coverage gaps, prune old change-history entries past retention, and deliver a database-health report. Default Monday 9am — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_freshness_audit","title":"Weekly Freshness Audit","description":"Weekly scan of the contact database to identify records not corroborated within `stale_contact_days`, compute field-coverage gaps, prune old change-history entries past retention, and deliver a database-health report. Default Monday 9am \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Weekly database health audit with stale-contact flagging and history pruning.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default Monday 9:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["personas_database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Weekly database health trend (total contacts, stale percentage, average confidence, field-coverage deltas)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"contact.sync.audit_completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { total_contacts, stale_count, field_coverage, avg_confidence, pruned_entries }."}],"error_handling":"Empty database \u2192 post a setup reminder via Messages, skip audit. Change history file > 10MB \u2192 switch pruning to an incremental model (prune oldest 10% per run).","input_schema":[{"name":"stale_contact_days","type":"number","default":90,"min":30,"max":365,"description":"Days without corroboration before a contact is flagged stale."},{"name":"change_history_retention_days","type":"number","default":365,"min":0,"max":3650,"description":"Days to retain change-history records. 0 = unlimited."}],"sample_input":{"stale_contact_days":"{{param.aq_stale_days}}","change_history_retention_days":"{{param.aq_retention_days}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"a1","type":"start","label":"Weekly tick"},{"id":"a2","type":"connector","label":"Load contacts.json","connector":"personas_database"},{"id":"a3","type":"action","label":"Identify stale contacts; compute health metrics"},{"id":"a4","type":"action","label":"Prune history past retention"},{"id":"a5","type":"event","label":"Emit audit_completed; deliver report"},{"id":"a6","type":"end","label":"Audit complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"a1","target":"a2"},{"source":"a2","target":"a3"},{"source":"a3","target":"a4"},{"source":"a4","target":"a5"},{"source":"a5","target":"a6"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_signature_extraction
recipes.description: Short-interval polling loop: fetch new email messages, filter skip-list senders, isolate signature blocks, extract and score contact fields, merge into the contact database. Default every 15 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_signature_extraction","title":"Signature Extraction","description":"Short-interval polling loop: fetch new email messages, filter skip-list senders, isolate signature blocks, extract and score contact fields, merge into the contact database. Default every 15 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Continuous email polling with signature parsing, confidence scoring, and database merge.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/15 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 15 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["email","personas_database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Extractions scoring 0.5-threshold are routed for review. Above threshold auto-applies; below 0.5 is logged only."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Skip list of no-signature senders (auto-grown after 5 consecutive empty results). Per-field corroboration counts per contact. Per-sender signature-style fingerprints for faster re-parsing."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"contact.sync.batch_completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { batch_id, emails_processed, contacts_created, contacts_updated, conflicts_flagged }."},{"event_type":"contact.sync.created","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: full new contact record. Fires once per brand-new contact."},{"event_type":"contact.sync.conflict_detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { contact_id, field, current_value, current_confidence, new_value, new_confidence, source_email_id, timestamp }. Consumed by uc_conflict_resolution under the `flag` strategy."}],"error_handling":"email 401 \u2192 halt polling, notify, wait for re-auth. email 429 \u2192 halve batch, backoff. Parse failure on one email \u2192 skip, add to skip-list after 5 consecutive empties. Disk full \u2192 skip non-essential writes. `contacts.json` locked \u2192 write to pending file, merge next cycle.","input_schema":[{"name":"confidence_threshold","type":"number","default":0.75,"min":0.5,"max":1,"description":"Minimum overall confidence for auto-save without review."},{"name":"max_contacts_per_run","type":"number","default":50,"min":10,"max":500,"description":"Max emails to process per polling cycle."},{"name":"conflict_strategy","type":"enum","options":["newest_wins","existing_wins","flag","merge_non_empty"],"default":"flag","description":"How to handle extracted values that differ from stored values."}],"sample_input":{"confidence_threshold":"{{param.aq_confidence_threshold}}","max_contacts_per_run":"{{param.aq_max_contacts_per_run}}","conflict_strategy":"{{param.aq_conflict_strategy}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"Polling tick"},{"id":"s2","type":"connector","label":"Fetch new email since last_poll_timestamp","connector":"email"},{"id":"s3","type":"action","label":"Filter skip-list; isolate signature; extract + score"},{"id":"s4","type":"decision","label":"Dedup vs contacts.json"},{"id":"s5","type":"connector","label":"Merge / create contact; log change","connector":"personas_database"},{"id":"s6","type":"event","label":"Emit conflict_detected if strategy = flag"},{"id":"s7","type":"event","label":"Emit batch_completed"},{"id":"s8","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5","variant":"no","label":"No conflict"},{"source":"s4","target":"s6","variant":"yes","label":"Conflict"},{"source":"s5","target":"s7"},{"source":"s6","target":"s7"},{"source":"s7","target":"s8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_approval_resolution
recipes.description: Process reviewer decisions. On approve: knowledge base → Published, notify author, confirm in the messaging channel. On reject: knowledge base → Needs Revision with reviewer feedback, notify author per delivery policy, post messaging rejection update. Event-triggered from uc_review_initiation.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_approval_resolution","title":"Approval Resolution","description":"Process reviewer decisions. On approve: knowledge base \u2192 Published, notify author, confirm in the messaging channel. On reject: knowledge base \u2192 Needs Revision with reviewer feedback, notify author per delivery policy, post messaging rejection update. Event-triggered from uc_review_initiation.","capability_summary":"Reviewer decision \u2192 knowledge base status update + author notification + messaging threaded update.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"content.review.requested"},"description":"Event-triggered \u2014 resolves pending reviews when decisions land. Not user-configurable at adoption."},"connectors":["knowledge_base","email","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"The reviewer's decision IS the review. Agent does not add a second gate."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Approval/rejection rate per content type, reviewer response-time distribution, rejection-reason patterns for content quality trend analysis."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"content.review.requested","direction":"listen","description":"Pending review card for this item."},{"event_type":"content.review.approved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { page_id, title, reviewer, resolved_at }. Downstream publishing pipelines subscribe."},{"event_type":"content.review.rejected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { page_id, title, reviewer, rejection_reason, resolved_at }. Revision workflow subscribers can consume."}],"error_handling":"knowledge base update fails on approve \u2192 emit persona.error, do NOT send author 'Published'. knowledge base update fails on reject \u2192 log + alert operator, still attempt author email (Revision state in knowledge base is stale but author needs feedback). email send fails \u2192 retry once, messaging-notify. messaging threads reply fails \u2192 log + fall back to unthreaded reply.","input_schema":[{"name":"hard_stops","type":"enum","options":["never_publish_without_notion_human","never_reassign_reviewer","max_one_reminder_per_cycle","rejection_feedback_dm_only"],"default":"never_publish_without_notion_human","description":"Hard limits the agent will never cross autonomously."},{"name":"rejection_delivery","type":"enum","options":["email_only","slack_dm_only","email_and_slack_dm","notion_comment_plus_slack_dm"],"default":"notion_comment_plus_slack_dm","description":"How rejection feedback reaches the author."}],"sample_input":{"hard_stops":"{{param.aq_hard_stops}}","rejection_delivery":"{{param.aq_rejection_delivery}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","gmail_send","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"Reviewer recipes.name: uc_sla_watch
recipes.description: Scan pending reviews for SLA-overdue items and execute the user's escalation policy (reminder / escalate to backup / notify author / flag Blocked in knowledge base). Default hourly — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_sla_watch","title":"SLA Escalation","description":"Scan pending reviews for SLA-overdue items and execute the user's escalation policy (reminder / escalate to backup / notify author / flag Blocked in knowledge base). recipes.name: uc_publish_after_approval
recipes.description: Listens to `review_decision.approved` events from this persona, reads the approved draft from the event's context_data, and dispatches it to the platform-specific destination connector — native LinkedIn post, X thread, Notion blog page, or Buffer scheduled queue. Always confirms via Messages with the published-artifact link or scheduled-time. Updates per-platform approvals memory.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_publish_after_approval","title":"Publish or Schedule Approved Draft","description":"Listens to `review_decision.approved` events from this persona, reads the approved draft from the event's context_data, and dispatches it to the platform-specific destination connector \u2014 native LinkedIn post, X thread, Notion blog page, or Buffer scheduled queue. Always confirms via Messages with the published-artifact link or scheduled-time. Updates per-platform approvals memory.","capability_summary":"Event-driven dispatcher: review_decision.approved \u2192 platform connector \u2192 confirmation.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Triggered by event subscription on `review_decision.approved` \u2014 no explicit trigger needed beyond enabling the use case."},"connectors":["linkedin","x_twitter","notion","buffer"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"off","context":"Publication is the consequence of an already-reviewed draft (the approval decision IS the gate). No second review; the agent posts and reports."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"On successful publish, persist the final approved phrasing under `<platform>_approvals.json` keyed by source-artifact-type. Successful publishes anchor the platform's voice doc on next rebuild. On publish failure, do NOT persist \u2014 re-surface for user action."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"review_decision.approved","direction":"listen","description":"Listens to this persona's own approval events. Reads `context_data` for `{platform, draft_text, source_artifact_url, scheduling_preference}`. Other personas' approvals are filtered out by `source_persona_id`."},{"event_type":"content.cascade.published","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: platform, source_artifact_url, published_url, scheduled_at (null if posted immediately). Emitted per successful publish. Analytics personas may subscribe to track distribution."},{"event_type":"content.cascade.publish_failed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: platform, draft_text, error_code, error_message. Emitted on connector failure so the user can retry or the next run can skip the broken platform."}],"error_handling":"Missing destination connector for an approved platform \u2192 Messages alert: 'You approved a LinkedIn draft but LinkedIn is not connected. Connect LinkedIn or copy-paste the draft manually.' Connector 401/403 \u2192 Messages credential warning, do NOT auto-retry against another platform. LinkedIn 422 (duplicate post) \u2192 surface and ask for force-republish confirmation. X partial-thread failure (tweet 4 of 7 fails) \u2192 publish what succeeded, Messages reports the partial state with the tweet IDs that landed and the remaining draft for manual completion. Notion 404 (database missing) \u2192 halt for blog only, surface the missing database_id. Buffer queue full \u2192 offer post-immediately as a fallback. context_data missing or null \u2192 fall back to fetching the manual_review record by review_id (defensive path per the platform's review_decision contract).","input_schema":[{"name":"scheduling_preference","type":"enum","options":["immediate","buffer_queue"],"default":"immediate","description":"Whether approved drafts publish preference?"},{"id":"p4","type":"decision","label":"Which platform?"},{"id":"p5","type":"connector","label":"LinkedIn: POST ugcPosts","connector":"linkedin"},{"id":"p6","type":"connector","label":"X: POST tweets in thread","connector":"x_twitter"},{"id":"p7","type":"connector","label":"Notion: create page in blog database","connector":"notion"},{"id":"p8","type":"connector","label":"Buffer: schedule to queue","connector":"buffer"},{"id":"p9","type":"action","label":"Persist approved phrasing to platform approvals.json"},{"id":"p10","type":"event","label":"Emit content.cascade.published"},{"id":"p11","type":"action","label":"Confirmation card via Messages with published URL or scheduled time"},{"id":"p12","type":"end","label":"Distribution complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"p1","target":"p2"},{"source":"p2","target":"p3"},{"source":"p3","target":"p8","variant":"yes","label":"buffer_queue"},{"source":"p3","target":"p4","variant":"no","label":"immediate"},{"source":"p4","target":"p5","label":"linkedin"},{"source":"p4","target":"p6","label":"x"},{"source":"p4","target":"p7","label":"blog"},{"source":"p5","target":"p9"},{"source":"p6","target":"p9"},{"source":"p7","target":"p9"},{"source":"p8","target":"p9"},{"source":"p9","target":"p10"},{"source":"p10","target":"p11"},{"source":"p11","target":"p12"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_repurpose_artifact
recipes.description: Accepts a source artifact (YouTube URL, blog URL, podcast transcript, or pasted text) and produces platform-tuned drafts for each enabled target platform — LinkedIn long-form, X/Twitter thread, blog summary, and short-form video script ideas. Each draft uses the platform's voice doc + memory-driven refinements. Routes every draft through manual review before any publication.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_repurpose_artifact","title":"Source Artifact Repurposing","description":"Accepts a source artifact (YouTube URL, blog URL, podcast transcript, or pasted text) and produces platform-tuned drafts for each enabled target platform \u2014 LinkedIn long-form, X/Twitter thread, blog summary, and short-form video script ideas. Each draft uses the platform's voice doc + memory-driven refinements. Routes every draft through manual review before any publication.","capability_summary":"Per-artifact fan-out into platform-tuned drafts; voice-doc-grounded; human-approval-gated.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Runs on manual request when you paste an artifact URL or transcript. Optional polling triggers can be added at adoption: a YouTube channel poll fires when a new video is published, an RSS poll fires when a new blog post lands."},"connectors":["youtube_data"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every platform draft goes through manual_review independently \u2014 approve LinkedIn without approving X. Reviewer can approve / edit / reject per platform. Approval emits review_decision.approved with context_data carrying the platform identifier and the final draft text."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-platform memory: `<platform>_approvals.json` (approved phrasings \u2014 top-3 anchor examples used in future composition); `<platform>_rejections.json` (categorized rejection patterns: tone | length | hook | CTA | accuracy \u2014 converted to negative-prompt fragments). Memory refines per-platform composition; one platform's rejection never affects another's voice."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"content.cascade.draft_ready","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: source_artifact_url, platform, draft_text, draft_char_count, voice_doc_path. Emitted per platform after the draft lands and before manual_review is filed. External listeners can pre-process drafts (e.g. a separate fact-checker persona)."}],"error_handling":"Source artifact resolution fails (404, empty captions across all input modes) \u2192 halt and Messages-report the failed URL. Per-platform voice doc missing \u2192 halt run for THAT platform only (other platforms continue), Messages-prompt to either re-run uc_voice_profile_build or drop that platform. youtube_data 401/403 \u2192 credential warning; user can supply a paste-fallback. Generated draft fails platform constraint (LinkedIn 3000-char limit, X tweet > 280 chars after split attempts) \u2192 present the constraint failure as part of the review card so the user can edit.","input_schema":[{"name":"source_input","type":"text","description":"YouTube URL, blog URL, podcast transcript, or pasted text. The agent detects the input shape and dispatches to the right fetcher."},{"name":"target_platforms","type":"text","description":"Comma-separated subset of `linkedin,x,blog,shortform`. Drafts are generated only for the listed platforms (and only if the platform's voice doc exists)."},{"name":"max_drafts_per_run","type":"number","default":4,"min":1,"max":4,"description":"Cap on platform variants per run. Constrained to 4 to keep human review tractable."}],"sample_input":{"source_input":"","target_platforms":"{{param.aq_target_platforms}}","max_drafts_per_run":"{{param.aq_max_drafts_per_run}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"Source artifact received (URL / transcript / paste)"},{"id":"r2","type":"decision","label":"Input shape?"},{"id":"r3","type":"connector","label":"YouTube: fetch transcript via captions API","connector":"youtube_data"},{"id":"r4","type":"action","label":"Blog/text: fetch + extract main content"},{"id":"r5","type":"action","label":"For each target platform: load voice doc + approvals + rejections"},{"id":"r6","type":"action","label":"Compose platform-tuned draft (hook \u2192 body \u2192 CTA, platform constraints applied)"},{"id":"r7","type":"event","label":"Emit content.cascade.draft_ready"},{"id":"r8","type":"action","label":"Deliver per-platform draft cards via Messages + manual_review"},{"id":"r9","type":"end","label":"Awaiting per-platform review decisions"}],"edges":[{"source":"r1","target":"r2"},{"source":"r2","target":"r3","variant":"yes","label":"YouTube"},{"source":"r2","target":"r4","variant":"no","label":"blog/text"},{"source":"r3","target":"r5"},{"source":"r4","target":"r5"},{"source":"r5","target":"r6"},{"source":"r6","target":"r7"},{"source":"r7","target":"r8"},{"source":"r8","target":"r9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_voice_profile_build
recipes.description: Builds a voice doc per target platform from 3-5 of your best example posts. Captures hook patterns, sentence-length signature, vocabulary do's/don'ts, hook→body→CTA structure, and platform constraints. Stored in `design_context.design_files['content_cascade_voices/<platform>_voice.md']`. Runs once at persona build; re-runnable on demand when your style evolves.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_voice_profile_build","title":"Per-Platform Voice Profile Build","description":"Builds a voice doc per target platform from 3-5 of your best example posts. Captures hook patterns, sentence-length signature, vocabulary do's/don'ts, hook\u2192body\u2192CTA structure, and platform constraints. Stored in `design_context.design_files['content_cascade_voices/<platform>_voice.md']`. Runs once at persona build; re-runnable on demand when your style evolves.","capability_summary":"Build-time per-platform voice profiler from sample posts.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Runs once at persona build per target platform. Accepted voice docs become the authoritative source for that platform's drafts."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"content.voice.profile_built","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: platform (linkedin | x | blog), stored_path, sample_post_count. Sample-post URLs return 404 \u2192 fall back to user-pasted text. recipes.name: uc_midweek_anomaly_check
recipes.description: Silent-unless-something-moved checkpoint. Compares partial-week metrics against expected trajectory derived from baselines. Alerts on deviations, silent when normal. Default Wednesday + Friday noon — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_midweek_anomaly_check","title":"Mid-Week Anomaly Check","description":"Silent-unless-something-moved checkpoint. Compares partial-week metrics against expected trajectory derived from baselines. Alerts on deviations, silent when normal. Default Wednesday + Friday noon \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Mid-week anomaly detector, silent on normal.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 12 * * 3,5"},"description":"Default Wednesday + Friday 12:00 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"conditional","context":"High-severity anomalies create a manual review request. recipes.name: uc_weekly_report
recipes.description: Compile the weekly report: WoW deltas, composite-scored rankings, anomaly detection against 4-week EWMA baselines, trend narrative, editorial recommendations. Default Monday 09:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_report","title":"Weekly Performance Report","description":"Compile the weekly report: WoW deltas, composite-scored rankings, anomaly detection against 4-week EWMA baselines, trend narrative, editorial recommendations. Default Monday 09:00 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Weekly WoW report with rankings, anomalies, and recommendations.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1"},"description":"Default Monday 09:00 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"conditional","context":"High-severity anomalies on top-tier content trigger a manual review request alongside the report. Normal-state reports ship without review."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-URL 4-week EWMAs with \u03b1=0.4, weekly aggregate snapshots, trend-category assignments for multi-week continuity, newly identified seasonal patterns, period markers to prevent duplicate events on re-runs."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"reporting.weekly.generated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { period_start, period_end, content_analyzed_count, anomaly_count, top_performer_url }."},{"event_type":"reporting.anomaly.detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { page_url, anomaly_type, severity, magnitude_pct, baseline_comparison }. recipes.name: uc_process_events
recipes.description: Real-time webhook handler for legal platform envelope events. Fetches full envelope context, upserts into spreadsheet (envelope_id as idempotency key), posts messaging notifications to event-appropriate channels, and tracks signer velocity in memory.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_process_events","title":"legal platform Event Processing","description":"Real-time webhook handler for legal platform envelope events. Fetches full envelope context, upserts into spreadsheet (envelope_id as idempotency key), posts messaging notifications to event-appropriate channels, and tracks signer velocity in memory.","capability_summary":"Webhook-driven envelope processing with spreadsheet upsert + routed messaging notifications.","category":"integration","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"webhook","config":{"source":"docusign","events":["envelope-sent","envelope-delivered","envelope-completed","envelope-declined","envelope-voided","recipient-completed","recipient-declined","recipient-delivered"]},"description":"legal platform Connect fires webhooks on envelope status changes. recipes.name: uc_reminder_sweep
recipes.description: Daily sweep that finds unsigned contracts past the remind threshold and applies the escalation ladder: polite signer reminder (capped at 3) → direct messages + email to contract owner → manual_review escalation at 14+ days. Default daily weekday morning; final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_reminder_sweep","title":"Unsigned Contract Reminders","description":"Daily sweep that finds unsigned contracts past the remind threshold and applies the escalation ladder: polite signer reminder (capped at 3) \u2192 direct messages + email to contract owner \u2192 manual_review escalation at 14+ days. recipes.name: uc_renewal_monitor
recipes.description: Weekly scan for contracts with renewal dates inside the configured lookahead window. Fires tiered notifications: 60d informational → 30d reminder → 14d urgent. Per-contract notification state prevents duplicates. Default weekly Monday; final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_renewal_monitor","title":"Renewal Monitoring","description":"Weekly scan for contracts with renewal dates inside the configured lookahead window. recipes.name: uc_ask_question
recipes.description: Receive a natural-language question via messaging, resolve follow-up context, generate safe SELECT SQL, execute against the database, deliver formatted result with the SQL and metadata. Event-listen on incoming messages.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_ask_question","title":"Ask a Question","description":"Receive a natural-language question via messaging, resolve follow-up context, generate safe SELECT SQL, execute against the database, deliver formatted result with the SQL and metadata. recipes.name: uc_manual_review
recipes.description: For each fix classified as `suggested` (duplicate merge, stale archive, association correction), builds a structured approval request with full context, applies the human decision, and logs the result. Event-listen on `crm.quality.critical_issues_detected` and on in-report review triggers.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_manual_review","title":"Manual Fix Review","description":"For each fix classified as `suggested` (duplicate merge, stale archive, association correction), builds a structured approval request with full context, applies the human decision, and logs the result. recipes.name: uc_report_distribution

Default Monday 7am — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

recipes.name: uc_weekly_audit
recipes.description: Full-database scan of contacts, companies, and deals. Detects duplicates (fuzzy-matched clusters), stale records, missing fields, and inconsistencies. Applies safe auto-fixes (max 50/run) based on `auto_fix_level`. Computes the 0-100 quality score. Default Sunday 10pm — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_audit","title":"Weekly CRM Audit","description":"Full-database scan of contacts, companies, and deals. Detects duplicates (fuzzy-matched clusters), stale records, missing fields, and inconsistencies. Applies safe auto-fixes (max 50/run) based on `auto_fix_level`. Computes the 0-100 quality score. Default Sunday 10pm \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Full CRM scan with quality scoring and safe auto-fix application.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 22 * * 0","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default Sunday 10:00 PM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["crm"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"52-week `score_history` in `data/audit_results.json` for trend analysis. Dismissed-issue registry (90-day TTL) in `data/dismissed_issues.json`. Auto-fix history with original values for rollback. Per-category rejection rates for adaptive filtering."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"crm.quality.score_changed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { week_ending, current_score, previous_score, trend (improving|declining|stable), category_breakdown }. Downstream exec dashboards subscribe."},{"event_type":"crm.quality.critical_issues_detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { issue_count, top_issues[], revenue_at_risk }. Emitted when duplicates with open deals, critical missing fields, or association mismatches are found."}],"error_handling":"CRM 429 \u2192 exponential backoff. CRM 401 \u2192 halt, surface re-auth alert. Concurrent modification \u2192 re-read, re-evaluate; never overwrite newer changes. Partial audit \u2192 save with `partial: true`, skip auto-fixes on this run. log originals","connector":"crm"},{"id":"a7","type":"action","label":"Compute quality score; update score_history"},{"id":"a8","type":"event","label":"Emit score_changed + critical_issues_detected"},{"id":"a9","type":"end","label":"Audit complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"a1","target":"a2"},{"source":"a2","target":"a3"},{"source":"a3","target":"a4"},{"source":"a4","target":"a5"},{"source":"a5","target":"a6","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"a5","target":"a7","variant":"no","label":"None"},{"source":"a6","target":"a7"},{"source":"a7","target":"a8"},{"source":"a8","target":"a9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_event_classification
recipes.description: Receive product analytics events, classify intent, enrich with profile data, post high-intent alerts to messaging, log signals to the knowledge base. Event-listen on incoming webhooks.

recipes.name: uc_pattern_escalation
recipes.description: Accumulated medium-intent signals that cross a cumulative threshold trigger a sustained-interest alert. Event-chained off uc_event_classification.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_pattern_escalation","title":"Pattern Escalation","description":"Accumulated medium-intent signals that cross a cumulative threshold trigger a sustained-interest alert. Event-chained off uc_event_classification.","capability_summary":"Sustained-interest escalation for accumulated medium signals above threshold.","category":"analytics","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"customer.intent.medium_signal_recorded"},"description":"Event-chained off uc_event_classification. recipes.name: uc_manual_review
recipes.description: For conversations that couldn't be confidently classified, posts a messaging review prompt with reaction-based classification affordance and resumes processing once a human responds. Event-listens on feedback.triage.ambiguous.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_manual_review","title":"Ambiguous Review","description":"For conversations that couldn't be confidently classified, posts a messaging review prompt with reaction-based classification affordance and resumes processing once a human responds. Event-listens on feedback.triage.ambiguous.","capability_summary":"Human-in-the-loop classification for ambiguous feedback via the messaging channel reactions.","category":"support","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"feedback.triage.ambiguous"},"description":"Fires whenever uc_triage_feedback emits an ambiguous conversation. Not user-configurable."},"connectors":["messaging","ticketing","support"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"slack","description":"Review thread in the product-feedback channel."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every ambiguous item requires human classification before it becomes a Linear issue."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"feedback.triage.ambiguous","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming ambiguous conversation from uc_triage_feedback."},{"event_type":"feedback.review.resolved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { intercom_id, human_classification, linear_id? }. Emitted after human response."},{"event_type":"feedback.review.timeout","direction":"emit","description":"Emitted when no response after 48h \u2014 triggers @channel repost."}],"error_handling":"No response within 48h \u2192 repost with @channel mention. messaging reaction read fail \u2192 fall back to thread-reply parsing. Human classification missing \u2192 keep in review state until resolved.","input_schema":[{"name":"review_timeout_hours","type":"number","default":48,"min":4,"max":168,"description":"Hours to wait for human classification before escalating the review."}],"sample_input":{"review_timeout_hours":48},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"feedback.triage.ambiguous received"},{"id":"r2","type":"connector","label":"Post messaging review prompt (:beetle:/:bulb:/:sparkles:)","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"r3","type":"decision","label":"Human response?"},{"id":"r4","type":"action","label":"Apply human classification"},{"id":"r5","type":"connector","label":"Create Linear issue if actionable","connector":"ticketing"},{"id":"r6","type":"event","label":"Emit feedback.review.resolved"},{"id":"r7","type":"event","label":"Emit feedback.review.timeout + repost"},{"id":"r8","type":"end","label":"Review resolved"}],"edges":[{"source":"r1","target":"r2"},{"source":"r2","target":"r3"},{"source":"r3","target":"r4","label":"Yes","variant":"yes"},{"source":"r3","target":"r7","label":"Timeout","variant":"no"},{"source":"r4","target":"r5"},{"source":"r5","target":"r6"},{"source":"r6","target":"r8"},{"source":"r7","target":"r2"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_triage_feedback
recipes.description: Polls ticketing for new conversations, classifies each into feature_request / bug_report / question / praise / ambiguous, deduplicates against known Linear issues, creates labeled issues for actionable items, and posts per-batch messaging summaries. Default every 2 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_triage_feedback","title":"Feedback Triage","description":"Polls ticketing for new conversations, classifies each into feature_request / bug_report / question / praise / ambiguous, deduplicates against known Linear issues, creates labeled issues for actionable items, and posts per-batch messaging summaries. Default every 2 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Real-time triage of ticketing conversations into Linear issues with deduplication and messaging summaries.","category":"support","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"interval_seconds":120},"description":"Default every 2 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["support","ticketing","messaging"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"slack","description":"Primary product-feedback channel where per-batch summaries post."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Classifications below the confidence threshold emit feedback.triage.ambiguous and route to uc_manual_review; Linear creation is gated on human response."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"state/known_issues.json accumulates keyword \u2192 Linear issue id with report_count and last_seen. Deduplication consults this memory before calling Linear issueSearch."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"feedback.triage.new_issue","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { intercom_id, linear_id, classification, priority, labels }. Emitted per new Linear issue created."},{"event_type":"feedback.triage.duplicate","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { intercom_id, linear_id, report_count }. Emitted when a conversation linked to an existing issue."},{"event_type":"feedback.triage.ambiguous","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { intercom_id, excerpt, slack_ts }. Consumed by uc_manual_review."},{"event_type":"feedback.volume.spike","direction":"emit","description":"Emitted when a single batch exceeds 10 conversations \u2014 signals potential incident."},{"event_type":"feedback.triage.error","direction":"emit","description":"Emitted on ticketing auth failure, Linear repeated failure, or corrupted state. Triggers credential refresh or admin alert."}],"error_handling":"ticketing 429 \u2192 back off; 401/403 \u2192 emit feedback.triage.error. Corrupted known_issues.json \u2192 rebuild from Linear query.","input_schema":[{"name":"confidence_threshold","type":"number","default":80,"min":60,"max":100,"description":"Minimum classification re-raised."},{"name":"excluded_topics","type":"text","default":"billing,churn,cancellation","description":"Comma-separated topics that never auto-create Linear issues (route to non-actionable bucket)."}],"sample_input":{"confidence_threshold":"{{param.aq_confidence_threshold}}","dedup_window_days":"{{param.aq_dedup_window}}","dedup_open_only":"{{param.aq_dedup_open_only}}","excluded_topics":"{{param.aq_excluded_topics}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"t1","type":"start","label":"Polling
