confidence)"},{"id":"t4","type":"action","label":"Dedup check (memory + Linear search)"},{"id":"t5","type":"decision","label":"New or duplicate?"},{"id":"t6","type":"connector","label":"Create Linear issue","connector":"ticketing"},{"id":"t7","type":"connector","label":"Comment on existing issue","connector":"ticketing"},{"id":"t8","type":"connector","label":"Post messaging batch summary","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"t9","type":"event","label":"Emit feedback.triage.* + update state"},{"id":"t10","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"t1","target":"t2"},{"source":"t2","target":"t3"},{"source":"t3","target":"t4"},{"source":"t4","target":"t5"},{"source":"t5","target":"t6","label":"New","variant":"yes"},{"source":"t5","target":"t7","label":"Duplicate","variant":"no"},{"source":"t6","target":"t8"},{"source":"t7","target":"t8"},{"source":"t8","target":"t9"},{"source":"t9","target":"t10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_weekly_digest
recipes.description: Compiles the week's feedback statistics, category breakdown, top recurring themes (by report_count), and pending manual reviews into a messaging digest. Prunes stale entries from deduplication memory. Default Friday 5 PM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_digest","title":"Weekly Digest","description":"Compiles the week's feedback statistics, category breakdown, top recurring themes (by report_count), and pending manual reviews into a messaging digest. Prunes stale entries from deduplication memory. Default Friday 5 PM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Weekly messaging digest of feedback trends, category counts, and top themes; prunes dedup memory.","category":"support","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 17 * * 5"},"description":"Default Friday 5 PM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["messaging"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"slack","description":"Digest channel (can be the same as the triage channel or a separate one)."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Reads state/processing_log.json and state/known_issues.json for stats; prunes entries older than dedup_window_days."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"feedback.digest.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { weekly_counts, top_themes, pending_reviews, wow_delta }. Emitted after each successful digest."}],"error_handling":"Missing state files \u2192 post minimal digest with explicit data-gap note. messaging fail \u2192 retry 3\u00d7 with exponential backoff, then log.","input_schema":[{"name":"top_themes_count","type":"number","default":5,"min":3,"max":15,"description":"Top recurring themes to surface in the digest."}],"sample_input":{"top_themes_count":5},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"d1","type":"start","label":"Friday tick"},{"id":"d2","type":"action","label":"Read logs + known_issues"},{"id":"d3","type":"action","label":"Compute counts, themes, pending reviews"},{"id":"d4","type":"action","label":"Prune stale memory entries"},{"id":"d5","type":"connector","label":"Post formatted messaging layout digest","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"d6","type":"event","label":"Emit feedback.digest.delivered"},{"id":"d7","type":"end","label":"Digest delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"d1","target":"d2"},{"source":"d2","target":"d3"},{"source":"d3","target":"d4"},{"source":"d4","target":"d5"},{"source":"d5","target":"d6"},{"source":"d6","target":"d7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_decision_support
recipes.description: On-demand structured decision analysis. User invokes with a decision context (e.g., 'hire full-time editor vs Fiverr freelancers'). Agent asks clarifying questions, researches each option, builds a weighted matrix, identifies risks and mitigations, defines 14-day success metrics + kill criteria.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_decision_support","title":"Decision Support","description":"On-demand structured decision analysis. User invokes with a decision context (e.g., 'hire full-time editor vs Fiverr freelancers'). Agent asks clarifying questions, researches each option, builds a weighted matrix, identifies risks and mitigations, defines 14-day success metrics + kill criteria.","capability_summary":"On-demand weighted decision matrix with success metrics + kill criteria.","category":"strategy","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 user invokes with decision context when facing a high-stakes choice."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"User reviews the clarifying questions and answers before the matrix builds. User approves the final matrix + kill criteria before saving to decisions_log. Checkpoint review at +14 days asks user to confirm / revise the outcome assessment."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Decision history ledger \u2014 context, chosen option, matrix weights, 14-day outcome. Used for pattern learning (which decision types the user tends to get right/wrong) and precedent lookup when a similar decision surfaces later."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"briefer.decision.analyzed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: decision_id, context_summary, chosen_option, checkpoint_date. Downstream reminder workflows can schedule the 14-day checkpoint."}],"error_handling":"Decision context too vague \u2192 ask clarifying questions first, no matrix. Single option provided \u2192 reframe as 'do X vs do nothing' with opportunity cost. 5+ options \u2192 ask user to pre-filter to top 3-4.","input_schema":[{"name":"decision_context","type":"text","description":"Free-form description of the decision. Ideally 2-4 sentences including the options, constraints, and what's at stake."}],"sample_input":{"decision_context":""},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"d1","type":"start","label":"User invokes with decision context"},{"id":"d2","type":"action","label":"Parse context \u2192 identify options"},{"id":"d3","type":"action","label":"Ask 5-7 clarifying questions"},{"id":"d4","type":"action","label":"Web-search precedent + risk signals per option"},{"id":"d5","type":"action","label":"Build weighted matrix (criteria \u00d7 options)"},{"id":"d6","type":"action","label":"Identify top-3 risks per top-2 options + mitigations"},{"id":"d7","type":"action","label":"Define 14-day success metrics + kill criteria"},{"id":"d8","type":"action","label":"User approves matrix + kill criteria"},{"id":"d9","type":"action","label":"Save to decisions_log.json with +14d checkpoint"},{"id":"d10","type":"event","label":"Emit briefer.decision.analyzed"},{"id":"d11","type":"end","label":"Decision analysis delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"d1","target":"d2"},{"source":"d2","target":"d3"},{"source":"d3","target":"d4"},{"source":"d4","target":"d5"},{"source":"d5","target":"d6"},{"source":"d6","target":"d7"},{"source":"d7","target":"d8"},{"source":"d8","target":"d9"},{"source":"d9","target":"d10"},{"source":"d10","target":"d11"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_morning_briefing
recipes.description: Consolidated briefing that fuses niche intelligence research (grounded in user-defined sources and goals) + goal progress check-in + pending work accountability + prioritized action plan. One focused, readable message. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 7am.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_morning_briefing","title":"Personal Briefing","description":"Consolidated briefing that fuses niche intelligence research (grounded in user-defined sources and goals) + goal progress check-in + pending work accountability + prioritized action plan. One focused, readable message. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 7am.","capability_summary":"Consolidated briefing: research + goals + pending + actions. Cadence set at the trigger step.","category":"personal_productivity","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 7 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 7:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"The briefing itself ships every day; research findings are flagged for user tagging (valuable / not valuable) to shape future topic weights. Explicit review gate activates only when goal-at-risk flags appear \u2014 user confirms the at-risk assessment before the alert fans out via event."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Topic preferences per category (valuable/not valuable counts, rolling 14-day window). Goal progress ledger (trend, last activity, status transitions). Follow-through rate (completed / planned action items over last 7 days). Recent-topic dedup set for the last 5 briefings. Captured ideas queue (piled up during morning runs, triaged during weekly review)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"briefer.morning.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: date, research_count, goals_checked, action_count, follow_through_rate. Emitted per goal that moved to At Risk or Stalled \u2014 downstream alert workflows (e.g., Slack notifier) can subscribe."}],"error_handling":"Web search fully unavailable \u2192 deliver goals + pending + actions only. `goals.json` missing \u2192 skip goal check-in; prompt in briefing. First run \u2192 no dedup, no follow-through rate; note baseline-building in briefing footer.","input_schema":[{"name":"briefing_sources","type":"source_definition","description":"Where the research half of the briefing pulls from. JSON payload describing one or more sources (local folder, registered codebase, database credential, or URL list). The persona reads these at each run and grounds findings in them \u2014 the user's long-term ground truth instead of ad-hoc keyword guesses."},{"name":"briefing_intent","type":"text","description":"User's long-term goal for the briefing and how the persona should work with the attached sources. Free-form textarea \u2014 e.g. 'Keep me on top of AI-agent tooling; emphasize launch announcements, pricing changes, and open-source releases over thinkpieces. Dedupe across sources. When a source surfaces something tied to my goals, push it above industry noise.'"}],"sample_input":{"briefing_sources":"{{param.aq_briefing_sources}}","briefing_intent":"{{param.aq_briefing_intent}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"m1","type":"start","label":"Daily 7am tick"},{"id":"m2","type":"action","label":"Load profile + goals + briefing_state"},{"id":"m3","type":"action","label":"Web-search niche keywords (last 24h)"},{"id":"m4","type":"action","label":"Rank research findings by goal alignment"},{"id":"m5","type":"action","label":"Check goal status + detect transitions"},{"id":"m6","type":"action","label":"Review yesterday's action plan for pending items"},{"id":"m7","type":"action","label":"Synthesize prioritized action plan (P1/P2/P3, 4-7 items)"},{"id":"m8","type":"action","label":"Capture idea candidates to captured_ideas.json"},{"id":"m9","type":"event","label":"Emit briefer.morning.delivered"},{"id":"m10","type":"decision","label":"Any goal moved to At Risk or Stalled?"},{"id":"m11","type":"event","label":"Emit briefer.goal.at_risk per flagged goal"},{"id":"m12","type":"end","label":"Briefing delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"m1","target":"m2"},{"source":"m2","target":"m3"},{"source":"m3","target":"m4"},{"source":"m4","target":"m5"},{"source":"m5","target":"m6"},{"source":"m6","target":"m7"},{"source":"m7","target":"m8"},{"source":"m8","target":"m9"},{"source":"m9","target":"m10"},{"source":"m10","target":"m11","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"m10","target":"m12","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"m11","target":"m12"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_weekly_review
recipes.description: Weekly retrospective. Reviews each active goal's weekly trend and surfaces next-week focus. Triages the week's captured ideas (accept to backlog / reject / defer). Surfaces decisions reaching their 14-day checkpoint. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Sunday 6pm.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_review","title":"Weekly Review","description":"Weekly retrospective. Reviews each active goal's weekly trend and surfaces next-week focus. Triages the week's captured ideas (accept to backlog / reject / defer). Surfaces decisions reaching their 14-day checkpoint. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Sunday 6pm.","capability_summary":"Goal retrospective + idea triage + decision checkpoint surfacing. Cadence set at the trigger step.","category":"personal_productivity","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 18 * * 0","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default Sunday 6:00 PM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"User triages each captured idea (accept / reject / defer). Accept/reject decisions memorize the category preference. Decision checkpoint reviews ask user to confirm the +14d outcome assessment."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Idea triage ledger \u2014 category preferences over time. Weekly metrics (goals on track, follow-through rate, ideas captured/accepted). Decision outcomes confirmed at checkpoints feed the decision_history for precedent lookup."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"briefer.weekly.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: week_ending, goal_summary, ideas_triaged, decisions_checkpointed. Downstream analytics / coaching workflows can subscribe."},{"event_type":"briefer.idea.captured","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: idea_id, title, category, goal_alignment. Emitted per accepted idea \u2014 downstream backlog systems (e.g., Notion, Linear) can subscribe to turn it into a backlog item."}],"error_handling":"No captured ideas this week \u2192 skip triage section. recipes.name: uc_anomaly_response
recipes.description: On critical breach, capture evidence, correlate metrics, hypothesize root cause, escalate with a full incident report and remediation options. Event-chained off the monitoring loop.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_anomaly_response","title":"Anomaly Response","description":"On critical breach, capture evidence, correlate metrics, hypothesize root cause, escalate with a full incident report and remediation options. Event-chained off the monitoring loop.","capability_summary":"Critical-severity incident response with correlation-driven root-cause hypothesis.","category":"monitoring","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"dbmon.anomaly.critical"},"description":"Event-chained off uc_continuous_monitoring. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["database","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every critical incident requires human acknowledgment before any remediation proceeds. Triage outcome (true positive / false positive / actual root cause) persists to memory to sharpen future detection."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"incident (evidence snapshots) + triage_history (human feedback on the hypothesis and applied remediation)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"dbmon.anomaly.critical","direction":"listen","description":"Critical breach incoming from the monitoring loop."},{"event_type":"dbmon.anomaly.correlated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { metrics, severity, correlation_pattern }. Emitted when 2+ metrics share a correlation pattern."}],"error_handling":"Evidence collection partial \u2192 proceed with what's available + label the gap in the report. Memory lookup of similar incidents empty \u2192 compose hypothesis from correlation rules only, label confidence Medium.","input_schema":[{"name":"require_review","type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"When true, critical incidents require human acknowledgment before automated response proceeds."}],"sample_input":{"require_review":"{{param.aq_require_review}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"a1","type":"start","label":"dbmon.anomaly.critical received"},{"id":"a2","type":"connector","label":"Capture evidence (queries, connections, slow log)","connector":"database"},{"id":"a3","type":"action","label":"Correlate metrics vs rules + stored patterns"},{"id":"a4","type":"action","label":"Compose incident report + remediation options"},{"id":"a5","type":"connector","label":"Escalate via messaging (manual review)","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"a6","type":"event","label":"Emit dbmon.anomaly.correlated"},{"id":"a7","type":"action","label":"Store triage outcome post-review"},{"id":"a8","type":"end","label":"Incident handled"}],"edges":[{"source":"a1","target":"a2"},{"source":"a2","target":"a3"},{"source":"a3","target":"a4"},{"source":"a4","target":"a5"},{"source":"a5","target":"a6"},{"source":"a6","target":"a7"},{"source":"a7","target":"a8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_continuous_monitoring
recipes.description: Scheduled metric collection, baseline building during the silent learning period, then active monitoring with direction-aware thresholds. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default every 5 minutes.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_continuous_monitoring","title":"Continuous Monitoring","description":"Scheduled metric collection, baseline building during the silent learning period, then active monitoring with direction-aware thresholds. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default every 5 minutes.","capability_summary":"Scheduled metric collection + baseline learning + warning-level anomaly detection.","category":"monitoring","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"*/5 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["database","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"baseline_raw (raw snapshots), baseline_computed (per-metric + per-hour stats), rolling (sliding windows), false_positive_pattern (auto-suppression)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"dbmon.baseline.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { days_collected, metrics_count, db_type }. Emitted once when the learning period completes."},{"event_type":"dbmon.anomaly.warning","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { metric, current, baseline_mean, deviation_ratio, duration_min, correlated_metrics }."},{"event_type":"dbmon.anomaly.critical","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { primary_metric, deviation_ratio, correlated_metrics, hypothesis }. Triggers uc_anomaly_response."},{"event_type":"dbmon.connection.lost","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { last_success, error }. Emitted after 3 consecutive connection failures."},{"event_type":"dbmon.baseline.reset_suggested","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { metric, hours_breached, current_mean, baseline_mean }. Emitted after 48+ hours of persistent breach."}],"error_handling":"See persona.error_handling. Core: exponential backoff on connection, per-metric isolation on incomplete collection, 5% floor on low-stddev metrics.","input_schema":[{"name":"baseline_days","type":"number","default":7,"min":3,"max":30,"description":"Silent learning period before alerts are enabled."},{"name":"metrics_scope","type":"enum","options":["Response time only","Response time + throughput","Response time + throughput + connections","Full (response time, throughput, connections, locks, cache, disk I/O)"],"default":"Response time + throughput","description":"Which dimensions to track and threshold."},{"name":"warning_multiplier","type":"number","default":2,"min":1,"max":5,"description":"Stddev multiplier for warning-level alerts."},{"name":"critical_multiplier","type":"number","default":3,"min":2,"max":10,"description":"Stddev multiplier for critical escalation. Must be > warning_multiplier."},{"name":"rolling_window_minutes","type":"number","default":30,"min":5,"max":120,"description":"Sliding window used to smooth momentary spikes."}],"sample_input":{"baseline_days":"{{param.aq_baseline_days}}","metrics_scope":"{{param.aq_metrics_scope}}","warning_multiplier":2,"critical_multiplier":"{{param.aq_critical_multiplier}}","rolling_window_minutes":30},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"m1","type":"start","label":"Scheduled tick"},{"id":"m2","type":"connector","label":"Query metrics suite","connector":"database"},{"id":"m3","type":"decision","label":"Baseline period complete?"},{"id":"m4","type":"action","label":"Store to baseline_raw + compute daily stats"},{"id":"m5","type":"action","label":"Compute deviation ratios + rolling averages"},{"id":"m6","type":"decision","label":"Critical threshold breached?"},{"id":"m7","type":"event","label":"Emit dbmon.anomaly.critical (\u2192 uc_anomaly_response)"},{"id":"m8","type":"decision","label":"Warning threshold breached?"},{"id":"m9","type":"action","label":"Check false-positive patterns"},{"id":"m10","type":"connector","label":"Post warning alert","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"m11","type":"event","label":"Emit dbmon.anomaly.warning"},{"id":"m12","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"m1","target":"m2"},{"source":"m2","target":"m3"},{"source":"m3","target":"m4","variant":"no","label":"Learning"},{"source":"m3","target":"m5","variant":"yes","label":"Monitoring"},{"source":"m4","target":"m12"},{"source":"m5","target":"m6"},{"source":"m6","target":"m7","variant":"yes","label":"Critical"},{"source":"m6","target":"m8","variant":"no","label":"Below critical"},{"source":"m7","target":"m12"},{"source":"m8","target":"m9","variant":"yes","label":"Warning"},{"source":"m8","target":"m12","variant":"no","label":"Normal"},{"source":"m9","target":"m10"},{"source":"m10","target":"m11"},{"source":"m11","target":"m12"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_calendar_sync
recipes.description: Mirrors cards with due dates into calendar — creates, updates, and removes events as cards are added, changed, completed, or deleted. Default every 5 minutes (shared trigger) — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_calendar_sync","title":"Calendar Sync","description":"Mirrors cards with due dates into calendar \u2014 creates, updates, and removes events as cards are added, changed, completed, or deleted. Default every 5 minutes (shared trigger) \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"project management \u2192 Calendar mirror with create/update/delete and persistent cardId\u2192eventId mapping.","category":"automation","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"*/5 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 5 minutes \u2014 shared with the other deadline capabilities; final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["project_management","calendar"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"deadline.sync.updated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { cards_created, cards_updated, cards_removed, errors }. One event per tick summarizing the sync."}],"error_handling":"project management 429 \u2192 10s backoff. Calendar 403 rate-limit \u2192 exponential backoff from 1s. recipes.name: uc_deadline_reminders
recipes.description: Sends tiered messaging reminders as each tracked card approaches its due time: 48h informational, 4h urgent with @assigned mentions, 15min critical with @here. One message per threshold per card. Default every 5 minutes (shared trigger) — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_deadline_reminders","title":"Deadline Reminders","description":"Sends tiered messaging reminders as each tracked card approaches its due time: 48h informational, 4h urgent with @assigned mentions, 15min critical with @here. One message per threshold per card. Default every 5 minutes (shared trigger) \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"48h / 4h / 15min tiered messaging reminders with deduped per-threshold delivery.","category":"automation","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"*/5 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 5 minutes \u2014 shared with the other deadline capabilities; final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Recurring-late patterns per card type / board \u2014 surfaced inline in reminders to flag chronically-late work."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"deadline.reminder.sent","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { card_id, threshold: '48h' | '4h' | '15min', channel }."}],"error_handling":"messaging rate limit \u2192 respect Retry-After. recipes.name: uc_overdue_enforcement
recipes.description: Detects cards past their due date, finds or creates a 'Blocked' list on the board, moves the card, and adds an explanatory comment plus a messaging alert. Records recurring lateness patterns so chronically late work is surfaced in future reminders. Default every 5 minutes (shared trigger) — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_overdue_enforcement","title":"Overdue Enforcement","description":"Detects cards past their due date, finds or creates a 'Blocked' list on the board, moves the card, and adds an explanatory comment plus a messaging alert. Records recurring lateness patterns so chronically late work is surfaced in future reminders. Default every 5 minutes (shared trigger) \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Overdue card detection \u2192 Blocked list move + comment + messaging alert, with pattern memory.","category":"automation","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"*/5 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 5 minutes \u2014 shared with the other deadline capabilities; final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["project_management","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"conditional","context":"Optional messaging confirmation before moving a card to Blocked \u2014 enable via aq_confirm_blocked to require a thumbs-up from the PM first."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-card and per-board overdue history \u2014 a card is flagged as a recurring-late pattern once it's been overdue 3+ times."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"deadline.overdue.processed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { card_id, board_id, days_overdue, recurring_pattern: boolean, action: 'moved' | 'comment_only' }."}],"error_handling":"Blocked list cannot be created (permissions): add the overdue comment in place and flag the permission issue in the messaging channel. Move failure: retain comment, note error in the alert. Never orphan a card \u2014 either move + comment or comment-only, never both skipped.","input_schema":[{"name":"confirm_before_blocked","type":"boolean","default":false,"description":"If true, the agent posts a messaging prompt and waits for PM confirmation before moving a card to the Blocked list."}],"sample_input":{"confirm_before_blocked":"{{param.aq_confirm_blocked}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"o1","type":"start","label":"After reminders"},{"id":"o2","type":"action","label":"Identify overdue cards"},{"id":"o3","type":"connector","label":"Find or create Blocked list","connector":"trello"},{"id":"o4","type":"connector","label":"Move card + add comment","connector":"trello"},{"id":"o5","type":"connector","label":"Post messaging alert (with recurring flag)","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"o6","type":"event","label":"Emit deadline.overdue.processed"},{"id":"o7","type":"end","label":"Overdue handled"}],"edges":[{"source":"o1","target":"o2"},{"source":"o2","target":"o3"},{"source":"o3","target":"o4"},{"source":"o4","target":"o5"},{"source":"o5","target":"o6"},{"source":"o6","target":"o7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_record_demo
recipes.description: Analyze the codebase to plan a walkthrough, execute it in a live browser, and deliver annotated screenshots or video with optional commentary. Tier 1 (CDP screenshots) always works; Tier 2 (Game Bar) and Tier 3 (Playwright) upgrade automatically when tools are detected.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_record_demo","title":"Code-Aware Demo Recording","description":"Analyze the codebase to plan a walkthrough, execute it in a live browser, and deliver annotated screenshots or video with optional commentary. Tier 1 (CDP screenshots) always works; Tier 2 (Game Bar) and Tier 3 (Playwright) upgrade automatically when tools are detected.","capability_summary":"Codebase-grounded walkthrough plan, tiered capture (screenshots or video), human review loop, learned preferences.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 user provides a feature prompt describing what to demo. Default manual \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["codebase","desktop_browser","desktop"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every recording is presented for review with representative screenshots (or video thumbnail), plan summary, and commentary. Reject-with-feedback routes to the right re-entry point (re-plan / re-analyze / re-capture). Max iterations from aq_max_review_iterations."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Recording preferences (viewport, walkthrough speed, annotation style), documented features (avoid re-demoing), rejection patterns (pacing / coverage / resolution / wrong-target), capability scan cache, app-specific knowledge (auth requirements, test data)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"demo.recorder.recorded","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: feature_name, recording_mode (tier), step_count, output_directory, file_list, commentary_flag."},{"event_type":"demo.recorder.approved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: feature_name, iteration_count, final_preferences. Emitted after human review passes \u2014 downstream docs pipelines can subscribe."},{"event_type":"demo.recorder.commentary_generated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: feature_name, step_count, script_text. Emitted when commentary is enabled and generated alongside the recording."}],"error_handling":"CDP fails -> ask user to open browser. Dev server not running -> attempt start, retry after 10s. Max iterations -> escalate with manual-recording suggestion.","input_schema":[{"name":"feature_prompt","type":"text","description":"What feature or workflow to demo. Freeform description the recorder uses to guide codebase analysis and walkthrough planning."},{"name":"recording_mode","type":"enum","options":["auto-detect","screenshots","video"],"default":"auto-detect","description":"Capture method. recipes.name: uc_linear_sync
recipes.description: For each detected component change, searches Linear for an existing figma-sync-labeled ticket and updates it (with a new comment) or creates a new one with mapped priority and a Figma deep link. Emits design.handoff.linear_synced with the component→ticket mapping.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_linear_sync","title":"Linear Ticket Sync","description":"For each detected component change, searches Linear for an existing figma-sync-labeled ticket and updates it (with a new comment) or creates a new one with mapped priority and a Figma deep link. recipes.name: uc_slack_summary
recipes.description: Composes a formatted messaging layout summary per file-version with component bullets and Linear ticket links, posts to the configured design channel, and threads per-component details when the batch exceeds 10 items.

recipes.name: uc_version_handoff
recipes.description: Detects new Figma file versions via polling or webhook, diffs components against the cached snapshot, classifies as added / modified / removed, and emits design.handoff.changes_detected so downstream UCs can file tickets and post summaries. Owns the first-run baseline (captures state without triggering tickets). Default polling every 10 min — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_version_handoff","title":"Figma Version Detection","description":"Detects new Figma file versions via polling or webhook, diffs components against the cached snapshot, classifies as added / modified / removed, and emits design.handoff.changes_detected so downstream UCs can file tickets and post summaries. Owns the first-run baseline (captures state without triggering tickets). Default polling every 10 min \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Version polling + component diff; emits change set for downstream UCs.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/10 * * * *"},"description":"Default every 10 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["figma"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"figma_state.json stores last_version and component snapshot per tracked file; updated atomically after each diff run."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"design.handoff.changes_detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { file_key, file_name, version, added[], modified[], removed[] }. Consumed by uc_linear_sync."}],"error_handling":"Figma 401 \u2192 emit credential alert, halt file. Figma 429 \u2192 respect Retry-After. figma_state.json missing \u2192 first-run baseline: capture state, post one-time init notice, do not emit changes. Atomic write: write temp, rename.","input_schema":[{"name":"tracked_files","type":"text","required":true,"description":"Comma-separated list of Figma file keys to track. Found in the file URL between /file/ and the next slash."},{"name":"change_filter","type":"enum","options":["all_changes","skip_rename_only","skip_hidden_and_draft","skip_rename_and_hidden"],"default":"skip_rename_and_hidden","description":"Which component changes to suppress before emitting the change set."}],"sample_input":{"tracked_files":"{{param.aq_tracked_files}}","change_filter":"{{param.aq_change_filter}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"v1","type":"start","label":"Polling tick / Figma webhook"},{"id":"v2","type":"action","label":"Load figma_state.json"},{"id":"v3","type":"connector","label":"GET /files/{key}/versions","connector":"figma"},{"id":"v4","type":"decision","label":"New version?"},{"id":"v5","type":"connector","label":"GET /files/{key}/components","connector":"figma"},{"id":"v6","type":"action","label":"Diff vs snapshot; apply change_filter"},{"id":"v7","type":"event","label":"Emit design.handoff.changes_detected"},{"id":"v8","type":"action","label":"Persist new state"},{"id":"v9","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"v1","target":"v2"},{"source":"v2","target":"v3"},{"source":"v3","target":"v4"},{"source":"v4","target":"v5","label":"Yes","variant":"yes"},{"source":"v4","target":"v9","label":"No","variant":"no"},{"source":"v5","target":"v6"},{"source":"v6","target":"v7"},{"source":"v7","target":"v8"},{"source":"v8","target":"v9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_backlog_scan
recipes.description: Scan the registered codebase for improvement candidates: TODOs / FIXMEs / HACK comments, portfolio-health hotspots, risk-matrix flags, deprecated dependency usage, architectural gaps from cross-project analysis. Compose each finding as a structured candidate and emit for triage. Does NOT implement — implementation waits for a human accept in uc_triage. Scan cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default hourly.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_backlog_scan","title":"Backlog Scan","description":"Scan the registered codebase for improvement candidates: TODOs / FIXMEs / HACK comments, portfolio-health hotspots, risk-matrix flags, deprecated dependency usage, architectural gaps from cross-project analysis. Compose each finding as a structured candidate and emit for triage. Does NOT implement \u2014 implementation waits for a human accept in uc_triage. Scan cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default hourly.","capability_summary":"Hourly codebase scan for backlog candidates; feeds uc_triage via events.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"0 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default hourly \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["codebase"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"generation_settings":{"memories":"on","reviews":"off","events":"on"},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Architecture patterns approved in past PRs. Rejected backlog categories (3+ rejections \u2192 suppress). Priority weightings the human has demonstrated (value per category). Recently-scanned regions (dedup across hourly ticks)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"dev-clone.backlog.candidate","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { candidate_id, title, description, affected_files[], proposed_approach, priority_score, category }. Consumed by uc_triage."}],"error_handling":"Codebase connector offline \u2192 skip this tick, log. Large repo \u2192 restrict scan to most-changed directories based on git activity. No findings \u2192 emit a single 'no candidates this hour' summary instead of spamming.","input_schema":[{"name":"improvement_scope","type":"enum","options":["todos_only","todos_and_tech_debt","todos_tech_debt_and_risk"],"default":"todos_and_tech_debt","description":"Which kinds of findings the scan surfaces. Start narrow; widen after you've triaged a few cycles."}],"sample_input":{"improvement_scope":"{{param.aq_improvement_scope}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"b1","type":"start","label":"Hourly tick"},{"id":"b2","type":"connector","label":"search_code TODOs + get_risk_matrix + get_portfolio_health","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"b3","type":"action","label":"Filter by memorized category weights"},{"id":"b4","type":"action","label":"Compose candidate records"},{"id":"b5","type":"event","label":"Emit dev-clone.backlog.candidate per finding"},{"id":"b6","type":"end","label":"Candidates queued for triage"}],"edges":[{"source":"b1","target":"b2"},{"source":"b2","target":"b3"},{"source":"b3","target":"b4"},{"source":"b4","target":"b5"},{"source":"b5","target":"b6"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_implementation
recipes.description: Event-listen on accepted triage decisions. For each accepted item: understand affected code, plan the diff, create a branch, apply changes, run tests (3 iteration max), commit, create PR via GitHub. Reacts to PR review comments via webhook — auto-fixes code-change requests, answers questions inline, escalates architectural concerns to the human.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_implementation","title":"Implementation & PR Lifecycle","description":"Event-listen on accepted triage decisions. For each accepted item: understand affected code, plan the diff, create a branch, apply changes, run tests (3 iteration max), commit, create PR via GitHub. Reacts to PR review comments via webhook — auto-fixes code-change requests, answers questions inline, escalates architectural concerns to the human.","capability_summary":"End-to-end PR lifecycle from accepted item to merged PR, with webhook-driven review-comment reactions.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"dev-clone.backlog.triaged","filter":{"decision":"accepted"}},"description":"Fires on every accepted triage decision. A secondary webhook sub-trigger handles GitHub PR review-comment events to the same capability."},"connectors":["codebase","github"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Autonomy level modulates the review gate. 'review_each_pr': every PR waits for explicit human approval before merge. 'trust_after_ci': CI green + one reviewer approval is sufficient. 'fully_autonomous': agent merges its own PRs after CI green (low-risk repos only). Architectural concerns always escalate to human regardless of autonomy level."},"generation_settings":{"memories":"on","reviews":"on","events":"on"},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Code style preferences learned from every PR review comment (e.g., 'prefer z.string().email() over regex'). Architecture patterns approved in merged PRs. Per-reviewer preference map. Failed-test patterns that led to PR aborts."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"dev-clone.backlog.triaged","direction":"listen","description":"Triaged candidate incoming from uc_triage. Only decision=accepted triggers implementation."},{"event_type":"dev-clone.pr.created","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { candidate_id, pr_url, pr_number, head_branch }. Emitted once per created PR."},{"event_type":"dev-clone.pr.updated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { pr_number, commit_sha, reason (review_feedback | test_fix) }. Emitted on every commit to an existing dev-clone PR."},{"event_type":"dev-clone.pr.merged","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { pr_number, merged_sha, merge_time }. Emitted when GitHub reports the merge. Downstream release and deploy pipelines subscribe."},{"event_type":"review_decision.approved","direction":"listen","source_filter":"*","description":"A human approved a pending review for this persona (e.g. an approved backlog item or proposed change) — proceed with implementation of the approved item."}],"error_handling":"Codebase offline → queue accepted items in `build_queue.json`, retry on reconnect; never drop. GitHub 422 branch-exists → suffix counter, retry once. Test fix 3-iteration limit → abort PR, mark candidate with `blocked:tests_failing` in memory, surface via Messages. Architectural concern in review comment → do NOT auto-fix, escalate via Messages and reply on GitHub. Max-concurrent-PRs limit reached → pause new implementations until a PR merges.","input_schema":[],"sample_input":{},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"i1","type":"start","label":"dev-clone.backlog.triaged (accepted)"},{"id":"i2","type":"connector","label":"read_file + search_code on affected area","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"i3","type":"action","label":"Plan diff; respect memorized patterns"},{"id":"i4","type":"connector","label":"create_branch dev-clone/{slug}","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"i5","type":"connector","label":"apply_diff per file","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"i6","type":"connector","label":"run_tests (3 iter max)","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"i7","type":"connector","label":"commit_changes","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"i8","type":"connector","label":"POST /repos/../pulls (create PR)","connector":"github"},{"id":"i9","type":"event","label":"Emit dev-clone.pr.created"},{"id":"i10","type":"start","label":"GitHub webhook: review comment"},{"id":"i11","type":"decision","label":"Classify: code-change / question / architectural / approval"},{"id":"i12","type":"action","label":"Auto-fix + commit + reply (code-change)"},{"id":"i13","type":"action","label":"Inline explanation reply (question)"},{"id":"i14","type":"action","label":"Escalate to human (architectural)"},{"id":"i15","type":"event","label":"Emit dev-clone.pr.updated"},{"id":"i16","type":"event","label":"Emit dev-clone.pr.merged on GitHub merge"},{"id":"i17","type":"end","label":"PR lifecycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"i1","target":"i2"},{"source":"i2","target":"i3"},{"source":"i3","target":"i4"},{"source":"i4","target":"i5"},{"source":"i5","target":"i6"},{"source":"i6","target":"i7"},{"source":"i7","target":"i8"},{"source":"i8","target":"i9"},{"source":"i10","target":"i11"},{"source":"i11","target":"i12","label":"code-change","variant":"yes"},{"source":"i11","target":"i13","label":"question"},{"source":"i11","target":"i14","label":"architectural"},{"source":"i12","target":"i15"},{"source":"i13","target":"i15"},{"source":"i14","target":"i15"},{"source":"i15","target":"i16"},{"source":"i16","target":"i17"},{"source":"i9","target":"i17"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_release_management
recipes.description: Gathers merged PRs since the last release, drafts release notes grouped by category, runs the full test suite, and presents the release candidate to the human for approval. On approval: tag via Git, emit release-accepted event. On rejection: memorize the reason, create follow-up backlog items.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_release_management","title":"Release Management","description":"Gathers merged PRs since the last release, drafts release notes grouped by category, runs the full test suite, and presents the release candidate to the human for approval. recipes.name: uc_triage
recipes.description: Event-listen on dev-clone.backlog.candidate. Presents each candidate to the human with accept / reject / defer actions. Rejection reasons persist in memory so similar candidates stop surfacing. Accept fans out to uc_implementation via event.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_triage","title":"Triage Pipeline","description":"Event-listen on dev-clone.backlog.candidate. Presents each candidate to the human with accept / reject / defer actions. Rejection reasons persist in memory so similar candidates stop surfacing. Accept fans out to uc_implementation via event.","capability_summary":"Human accept/reject/defer per backlog candidate with memorized category preferences.","category":"review","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"dev-clone.backlog.candidate"},"description":"Fires per candidate emitted by uc_backlog_scan. recipes.name: uc_pr_lifecycle
recipes.description: Detects new/updated PRs, classifies size, links to Jira, transitions status, and posts formatted messaging layout notifications. Emits oversized-PR review gates regardless of autonomy level. Default polling every 2 min — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_pr_lifecycle","title":"Pull Request Lifecycle","description":"Detects new/updated PRs, classifies size, links to Jira, transitions status, and posts formatted messaging layout notifications. Emits oversized-PR review gates regardless of autonomy level. Default polling every 2 min \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"PR \u2192 Jira sync + messaging notification + oversized PR review gate.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/2 * * * *"},"description":"Default every 2 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step. source control webhooks also fire this UC when configured."},"connectors":["source_control","ticketing","messaging"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"slack","description":"Primary dev channel for PR notifications."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_threshold","context":"PRs classified Large (501\u20131000 lines) or Extra-Large (1000+) emit a review gate. recipes.name: uc_release_management
recipes.description: Creates Jira versions from source control releases, stamps fixVersion on referenced tickets, and posts a changelog announcement to the releases channel. Default polling every 15 min — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_release_management","title":"Release Management","description":"Creates Jira versions from source control releases, stamps fixVersion on referenced tickets, and posts a changelog announcement to the releases channel. Default polling every 15 min \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"source control release \u2192 Jira version + ticket fixVersion + messaging changelog.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/15 * * * *"},"description":"Default every 15 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step. source control release webhook also fires this UC when configured."},"connectors":["source_control","ticketing","messaging"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"slack","description":"Releases channel for version announcements."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Last processed release id per repo prevents duplicate version creation."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"dev.release.published","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { repo, tag, jira_version, ticket_keys[] }. Downstream deploy pipelines subscribe."}],"error_handling":"Jira 409 version exists \u2192 fetch and update instead of creating. No ticket refs in body \u2192 still create version, skip fixVersion step. messaging channel_not_found \u2192 fall back to default.","input_schema":[],"sample_input":{},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"Polling tick / release webhook"},{"id":"r2","type":"connector","label":"Fetch release details","connector":"source_control"},{"id":"r3","type":"action","label":"Parse body for PROJ-\\d+ keys"},{"id":"r4","type":"connector","label":"Create or update Jira version","connector":"ticketing"},{"id":"r5","type":"connector","label":"Set fixVersion on referenced tickets","connector":"ticketing"},{"id":"r6","type":"connector","label":"Post release announcement to the messaging channel","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"r7","type":"event","label":"Emit dev.release.published; persist"},{"id":"r8","type":"end","label":"Release processed"}],"edges":[{"source":"r1","target":"r2"},{"source":"r2","target":"r3"},{"source":"r3","target":"r4"},{"source":"r4","target":"r5"},{"source":"r5","target":"r6"},{"source":"r6","target":"r7"},{"source":"r7","target":"r8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_db_health
recipes.description: Runs read-only health queries against the configured database (connection pool, slow queries, table growth, replication lag, bloat, failed migrations). Compares against baselines. If the database is unreachable, surfaces that as its own Critical incident. Default daily 8 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_db_health","title":"Database Health Check","description":"Runs read-only health queries against the configured database (connection pool, slow queries, table growth, replication lag, bloat, failed migrations). Compares against baselines. If the database is unreachable, surfaces that as its own Critical incident. Default daily 8 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Database health scan with unreachability treated as a Critical incident.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 8 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step (shared with other scans)."},"connectors":["database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Ambiguous indicators (e.g., bloat 60%) route to review. Clear Critical cases (connection refused) surface in the briefing without gating."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Rolling baselines for per-table growth, slow-query count, and pool utilization \u2014 14-day window in `health_history.json`."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"devops.database.unreachable","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { provider, error_code, attempt_count }. Emitted when DB connectivity fails after retries \u2014 itself a Critical incident."}],"error_handling":"Connection refused \u2192 Critical incident, emit unreachable event, surface prominently. Query timeout \u2192 log timeout as performance indicator, skip detail queries. Permission denied \u2192 flag credential needs elevated read scope; continue with whatever queries succeed.","input_schema":[],"sample_input":{},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"d1","type":"start","label":"Shared daily tick"},{"id":"d2","type":"connector","label":"Run health queries","connector":"database"},{"id":"d3","type":"decision","label":"DB reachable?"},{"id":"d4","type":"event","label":"Emit devops.database.unreachable"},{"id":"d5","type":"action","label":"Compare vs baselines, flag anomalies"},{"id":"d6","type":"end","label":"Database section ready for briefing"}],"edges":[{"source":"d1","target":"d2"},{"source":"d2","target":"d3"},{"source":"d3","target":"d4","variant":"no","label":"Unreachable"},{"source":"d3","target":"d5","variant":"yes","label":"Reachable"},{"source":"d4","target":"d6"},{"source":"d5","target":"d6"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_deploy_correlation
recipes.description: Lists deployments in the scan window and cross-references timestamps with error spikes detected by the error scan. A deploy within 2 hours of a >20% error-rate jump is flagged as a regression with commit SHA, author, and rollback hint. Default daily 8 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_deploy_correlation","title":"Deploy Regression Correlation","description":"Lists deployments in the scan window and cross-references timestamps with error spikes detected by the error scan. A deploy within 2 hours of a >20% error-rate jump is flagged as a regression with commit SHA, author, and rollback hint. Default daily 8 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Cross-reference deploys against error spikes to flag regressions.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 8 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step (shared with other scans)."},"connectors":["cloud","monitoring"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"devops.deploy.regression","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { deployment_id, commit_sha, author, error_issue_id, correlation_confidence }. Emitted per detected regression."}],"error_handling":"Deployment API down \u2192 skip correlation; note disabled in briefing. No recent deploys \u2192 output 'no deploys in window'; no false positives. Ambiguous correlation (deploy >2h before spike) \u2192 surface as 'possibly related' without the regression label.","input_schema":[{"name":"correlation_window_hours","type":"number","default":2,"min":1,"max":24,"description":"How close a deploy must be to an error spike to count as regression-class."}],"sample_input":{"correlation_window_hours":"{{param.aq_correlation_window}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"Error scan complete"},{"id":"r2","type":"connector","label":"List recent deployments","connector":"deployment"},{"id":"r3","type":"action","label":"Correlate deploy timestamps with error spikes"},{"id":"r4","type":"decision","label":"Regression-class correlation?"},{"id":"r5","type":"event","label":"Emit devops.deploy.regression"},{"id":"r6","type":"end","label":"Correlations ready for briefing"}],"edges":[{"source":"r1","target":"r2"},{"source":"r2","target":"r3"},{"source":"r3","target":"r4"},{"source":"r4","target":"r5","variant":"yes"},{"source":"r4","target":"r6","variant":"no"},{"source":"r5","target":"r6"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_error_scan
recipes.description: Pulls unresolved errors from the monitoring provider for the last N hours, classifies severity (Critical / High / Medium / Low) using data + memory, flags new error types and regressions, and contributes the application-errors section to the combined briefing. Default daily 8 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_error_scan","title":"Application Error Scan","description":"Pulls unresolved errors from the monitoring provider for the last N hours, classifies severity (Critical / High / Medium / Low) using data + memory, flags new error types and regressions, and contributes the application-errors section to the combined briefing. Default daily 8 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Application error pull with memory-aware severity classification.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 8 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step (shared composition means all four scans fire together)."},"connectors":["monitoring"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Medium+ errors route through triage. Actionable \u2192 emits backlog event. Noise \u2192 persists as memory; 3+ noise marks the same pattern auto-classified Low on future runs."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`triage_patterns.json` keyed by (error pattern signature, provider). After 3 dismissals \u2192 future occurrences auto-classify Low. Consistent Actionable decisions keep severity elevated."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"devops.error.critical","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { issue_id, title, count, user_count, environment, severity: 'Critical' }. Emitted per Critical error finding."}],"error_handling":"Monitoring 401/403 \u2192 skip this section; note re-auth CTA in combined briefing. 429 \u2192 backoff + retry 3x, then cache. 5xx \u2192 retry once; fall back to last-run snapshot.","input_schema":[{"name":"lookback_hours","type":"number","default":24,"min":1,"max":168,"description":"How many hours of errors to scan. Default 24 for daily runs; 168 for weekly summaries."},{"name":"severity_threshold","type":"number","default":5,"min":1,"max":1000,"description":"Minimum error count to surface an issue. Below this, issues are skipped entirely."}],"sample_input":{"lookback_hours":"{{param.aq_lookback_hours}}","severity_threshold":"{{param.aq_severity_threshold}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"e1","type":"start","label":"Shared daily tick"},{"id":"e2","type":"action","label":"Load triage memory"},{"id":"e3","type":"connector","label":"Fetch unresolved issues","connector":"monitoring"},{"id":"e4","type":"action","label":"Classify severity + apply memory"},{"id":"e5","type":"event","label":"Emit devops.error.critical per Critical"},{"id":"e6","type":"end","label":"Errors section ready for briefing"}],"edges":[{"source":"e1","target":"e2"},{"source":"e2","target":"e3"},{"source":"e3","target":"e4"},{"source":"e4","target":"e5"},{"source":"e5","target":"e6"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_infra_scan
recipes.description: Pulls CPU, memory, error rate, latency percentile, and availability metrics from the monitoring provider; compares against 7-day baseline; flags anomalies. Contributes the infrastructure section to the combined briefing. Default daily 8 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_infra_scan","title":"Infrastructure Metrics Scan","description":"Pulls CPU, memory, error rate, latency percentile, and availability metrics from the monitoring provider; compares against 7-day baseline; flags anomalies. Contributes the infrastructure section to the combined briefing. Default daily 8 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Infrastructure metrics scan with baseline-aware anomaly flagging.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 8 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step (shared with other scans)."},"connectors":["monitoring"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Baseline-relative anomalies that aren't obviously above threshold route to review. Clear >2x-baseline cases surface in the briefing without a gate."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`health_history.json` rolling 14-day baselines per metric. Threshold overrides learned from triage (e.g., 'CPU alerts below 90% are noise')."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"devops.infra.anomaly","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { metric, value, baseline, magnitude }. Emitted per flagged anomaly."}],"error_handling":"Monitoring down \u2192 skip infra section; combined briefing notes infra unavailable. Baseline file corrupted \u2192 regenerate from current metrics; disable flagging for this run.","input_schema":[{"name":"lookback_hours","type":"number","default":24,"min":1,"max":168,"description":"Scan window for infrastructure metrics."}],"sample_input":{"lookback_hours":"{{param.aq_lookback_hours}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"i1","type":"start","label":"Shared daily tick"},{"id":"i2","type":"connector","label":"Fetch infra metrics","connector":"monitoring"},{"id":"i3","type":"action","label":"Compare vs 7-day baseline"},{"id":"i4","type":"action","label":"Flag anomalies + apply thresholds memory"},{"id":"i5","type":"event","label":"Emit devops.infra.anomaly per flag"},{"id":"i6","type":"end","label":"Infra section ready for briefing"}],"edges":[{"source":"i1","target":"i2"},{"source":"i2","target":"i3"},{"source":"i3","target":"i4"},{"source":"i4","target":"i5"},{"source":"i5","target":"i6"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_draft_and_review
recipes.description: For each inbound message that needs a reply, loads the recipient's style profile + conversation context, composes a draft that matches the profile exactly, and routes through human review — or auto-sends if the contact has graduated. Updates the style profile from every human edit.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_draft_and_review","title":"Draft and Review","description":"For each inbound message that needs a reply, loads the recipient's style profile + conversation context, composes a draft that matches the profile exactly, and routes through human review \u2014 or auto-sends if the contact has graduated. Updates the style profile from every human edit.","capability_summary":"Recipient-specific draft composition, human review, style-profile learning, graduation to auto-send.","category":"review","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"clone.inbound.received"},"description":"Fires when inbound triage emits a needs-reply message. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers hide the cadence picker."},"connectors":["email","messaging","personas_database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every draft routes through human review until the contact hits 20 consecutive unedited approvals. Safety-override content (financial > $1000, legal terms) always requires review regardless of graduation."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-recipient style profiles keyed `style:{platform}:{contact_id}` containing formality, length, greeting/sign-off, emoji, vocabulary notes, confidence. Updated after every human edit."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"clone.inbound.received","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming from uc_inbound_triage."},{"event_type":"clone.draft.approved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { message_id, contact_id, platform, edited, consecutive_approved }. Per approved draft (with or without edits)."},{"event_type":"clone.draft.rejected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { message_id, contact_id, platform, reason }."},{"event_type":"clone.contact.graduated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { contact_id, platform }. Fired the first time a contact hits 20 consecutive unedited approvals."}],"error_handling":"Send failure after approval \u2192 retain draft as 'approved', retry next cycle; escalate after 3 failures. Safety-override detected \u2192 always route to human review. Style profile corrupted \u2192 seed from channel defaults, log warning. Concurrent approvals \u2192 UNIQUE constraint on message id prevents double-send.","input_schema":[{"name":"auto_send_threshold","type":"enum","options":["10","20","30","never"],"default":"20","description":"Consecutive unedited approvals required before auto-send."},{"name":"safety_exclusions","type":"enum","options":["financial_legal_only","first_message_to_new_contact","emotional_sensitive","all_of_above"],"default":"all_of_above","description":"Which categories are permanently excluded from auto-send."}],"sample_input":{"auto_send_threshold":"{{param.aq_auto_send_threshold}}","safety_exclusions":"{{param.aq_safety_exclusions}}"},"tool_hints":["gmail_send","http_request","db_query"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"d1","type":"start","label":"clone.inbound.received"},{"id":"d2","type":"action","label":"Load style profile + conversation context"},{"id":"d3","type":"action","label":"Compose draft matching profile"},{"id":"d4","type":"decision","label":"Auto-send eligible AND no safety trigger?"},{"id":"d5","type":"action","label":"Route to manual_review"},{"id":"d6","type":"connector","label":"Send via platform API"},{"id":"d7","type":"action","label":"Process review outcome (approve/edit/reject)"},{"id":"d8","type":"action","label":"Update style profile + counter"},{"id":"d9","type":"event","label":"Emit clone.draft.approved / rejected / graduated"},{"id":"d10","type":"end","label":"Draft cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"d1","target":"d2"},{"source":"d2","target":"d3"},{"source":"d3","target":"d4"},{"source":"d4","target":"d6","label":"Yes","variant":"yes"},{"source":"d4","target":"d5","label":"No","variant":"no"},{"source":"d5","target":"d7"},{"source":"d7","target":"d6"},{"source":"d6","target":"d8"},{"source":"d8","target":"d9"},{"source":"d9","target":"d10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_inbound_triage
recipes.description: Polls all connected channels for new inbound messages, logs each to the local database, classifies by urgency/intent/key entities, and flags which messages need a reply. Emits one event per message so the draft capability can pick it up.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_inbound_triage","title":"Inbound Triage","description":"Polls all connected channels for new inbound messages, logs each to the local database, classifies by urgency/intent/key entities, and flags which messages need a reply. Emits one event per message so the draft capability can pick it up.","capability_summary":"Continuous multi-channel inbound triage with urgency + intent classification.","category":"automation","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"* * * * *"},"description":"Default polling every minute \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["email","messaging","personas_database"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Polling offsets per channel (last_update_id for messaging, last_ts per messaging channels, last scan for email). Duplicate detection via message_ext_id UNIQUE constraint."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"clone.inbound.received","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { message_id, platform, contact_id, urgency, intent, requires_reply, key_entities }. Per classified message."}],"error_handling":"Auth failure on one channel \u2192 skip that channel, alert user via an active one. Rate limits \u2192 exponential backoff per platform. Duplicate detection via UNIQUE(message_ext_id) \u2014 silent reject on replay.","input_schema":[{"name":"monitored_channels","type":"enum","options":["all_connected","email_only","chat_only"],"default":"all_connected","description":"Which channel set to include in triage."}],"sample_input":{"monitored_channels":"{{param.aq_monitored_channels}}"},"tool_hints":["gmail_search","gmail_read","http_request","db_query"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"i1","type":"start","label":"Polling tick"},{"id":"i2","type":"connector","label":"Poll each connected channel","connector":"email"},{"id":"i3","type":"connector","label":"Insert into clone_messages","connector":"personas_database"},{"id":"i4","type":"action","label":"Classify urgency + intent + entities"},{"id":"i5","type":"action","label":"Set requires_reply flag"},{"id":"i6","type":"event","label":"Emit clone.inbound.received"},{"id":"i7","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"i1","target":"i2"},{"source":"i2","target":"i3"},{"source":"i3","target":"i4"},{"source":"i4","target":"i5"},{"source":"i5","target":"i6"},{"source":"i6","target":"i7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_periodic_digest
recipes.description: Aggregates activity across channels into a periodic summary: message volume, draft throughput, pending approvals, contacts near graduation, and channel health. Default every 4 hours — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_periodic_digest","title":"Periodic Digest","description":"Aggregates activity across channels into a periodic summary: message volume, draft throughput, pending approvals, contacts near graduation, and channel health. Default every 4 hours \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Rolling operations summary of triage, drafting, and graduation stats.","category":"monitoring","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 */4 * * *"},"description":"Default every 4 hours \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["personas_database"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Digest delivered to the user's preferred active channel."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"clone.digest.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { period_start, period_end, received_count, sent_count, auto_sent_count, pending_drafts, near_graduation }."}],"error_handling":"Database query failure \u2192 skip digest cycle, retry next tick. recipes.name: uc_owner_notify
recipes.description: Consumes the scanned result, sends per-owner email with tier-appropriate tone, pulls replies for date commitments, tracks overdue promises, and flags bounced or repeatedly-ignored Critical pages for manual_review. Emits docs.freshness.owners_notified.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_owner_notify","title":"Owner Notification + Commitment Tracking","description":"Consumes the scanned result, sends per-owner email with tier-appropriate tone, pulls replies for date commitments, tracks overdue promises, and flags bounced or repeatedly-ignored Critical pages for manual_review. recipes.name: uc_reminders
recipes.description: For each active spreadsheet entry, compute days-to-deadline and send tiered email reminders to the assigned writer. Duplicate-proof via a local state ledger; adaptive — writers flagged as late-shipping get reminded one tier earlier. Tiers default to 7d / 3d / 1d / overdue; configured at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_reminders","title":"Deadline Reminders","description":"For each active spreadsheet entry, compute days-to-deadline and send tiered email reminders to the assigned writer. recipes.name: uc_sync

recipes.name: uc_human_review

recipes.name: uc_inbox_scan

Default every 5 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

recipes.name: uc_qualification
recipes.description: Event-listen on extracted lead candidates. Emits lifecycle events for downstream CRM sync and account-based workflows.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_qualification","title":"Lead Qualification & Scoring","description":"Event-listen on extracted lead candidates. recipes.name: uc_morning_digest

recipes.name: uc_daily_report

recipes.name: uc_email_triage
recipes.description: Polls email for new support emails, matches each against the KB, computes confidence, and routes to auto-reply, human review, or knowledge-gap detection. Default every 3 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_email_triage","title":"Email Triage","description":"Polls email for new support emails, matches each against the KB, computes confidence, and routes to auto-reply, human review, or knowledge-gap detection. Default every 3 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Confidence-gated triage: auto-reply, draft-for-review, or knowledge-gap detection per email.","category":"support","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/3 * * * *"},"description":"Default every 3 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["email"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Cycle summary channel \u2014 counts per mode, highlights of auto-replies and escalations."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Drafts below the confidence threshold submit via manual_review with full context (score, KB references, gap reasons). Approve/reject decisions feed into data/approval_history.json for progressive learning."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Persists processed email IDs (dedup), approval history per question pattern (confidence uplift), blocklisted patterns (repeated rejections)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"support.email.replied","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { customer, confidence, kb_article_id, mode }. Emitted when a draft is submitted for human review."},{"event_type":"support.email.review_resolved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { decision, confidence, edits? }. recipes.name: uc_knowledge_gap
recipes.description: For emails where the KB has no relevant article, sends a customer acknowledgment with promised response time, creates a knowledge-gap report for the support team with a suggested article outline, and tracks frequency so recurring gaps escalate in severity. Event-listens on support.email.knowledge_gap.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_knowledge_gap","title":"Knowledge Gap Handling","description":"For emails where the KB has no relevant article, sends a customer acknowledgment with promised response time, creates a knowledge-gap report for the support team with a suggested article outline, and tracks frequency so recurring gaps escalate in severity. After 3 occurrences, severity elevates to critical."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"support.email.knowledge_gap","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming gap event from uc_email_triage."},{"event_type":"support.gap.reported","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { topic, occurrences, severity }. recipes.name: uc_create_or_review
recipes.description: Consumes extracted candidates: high-confidence items check knowledge base for duplicates and create tasks; low-confidence items route through human review and train the confidence model. Learns from approve/dismiss decisions.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_create_or_review","title":"Create or Review","description":"Consumes extracted candidates: high-confidence items check knowledge base for duplicates and create tasks; low-confidence items route through human review and train the confidence model. Learns from approve/dismiss decisions.","capability_summary":"knowledge base task creation with duplicate check + human review queue for low-confidence items.","category":"automation","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"emailtask.candidate.extracted"},"description":"Fires on extraction emissions. recipes.name: uc_anomaly_alerts
recipes.description: Real-time and weekly anomaly detection on the expense ledger — high-amount expenses, potential duplicates, missing recurring charges, category spending spikes, unusual vendor frequency — routed to the messaging channel with formatted messaging layout alerts. Default event-driven (ingest event) + daily sweep for weekly-scope anomalies — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_anomaly_alerts","title":"Anomaly Alerts","description":"Real-time and weekly anomaly detection on the expense ledger \u2014 high-amount expenses, potential duplicates, missing recurring charges, category spending spikes, unusual vendor frequency \u2014 routed to the messaging channel with formatted messaging layout alerts. recipes.name: uc_receipt_ingest
recipes.description: Poll email for receipt-shaped emails, extract structured expense data, normalize vendors, categorize, and append to the spreadsheet ledger. Idempotent by email message ID. Default every 10 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_receipt_ingest","title":"Receipt Ingest","description":"Poll email for receipt-shaped emails, extract structured expense data, normalize vendors, categorize, and append to the spreadsheet ledger.
