recipes.name: uc_experiment_analysis
recipes.description: Runs daily to detect completed experiments with statistically significant winners, posts a rich messaging summary, and (per ticket-gate) auto-creates or proposes a Linear rollout ticket with priority scaled to lift magnitude. Default weekdays 9am — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_experiment_analysis","title":"Experiment Results Analysis","description":"Runs daily to detect completed experiments with statistically significant winners, posts a rich messaging summary, and (per ticket-gate) auto-creates or proposes a Linear rollout ticket with priority scaled to lift magnitude. recipes.name: uc_flag_audit
recipes.description: Webhook-driven capability. Parses every LaunchDarkly flag event (create / update / toggle / delete / archive), runs collision and naming-convention checks on creation, posts a formatted messaging layout audit card to the messaging channel, and upserts the knowledge base registry entry. Deletions mark the knowledge base entry as 'Archived' — the row stays. Default trigger: LaunchDarkly webhook. Not user-configurable at the trigger-composition step — event-driven triggers bypass that picker.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_flag_audit","title":"Flag Change Audit","description":"Webhook-driven capability. Parses every LaunchDarkly flag event (create / update / toggle / delete / archive), runs collision and naming-convention checks on creation, posts a formatted messaging layout audit card to the messaging channel, and upserts the knowledge base registry entry. Deletions mark the knowledge base entry as 'Archived' \u2014 the row stays. Default trigger: LaunchDarkly webhook. Not user-configurable at the trigger-composition step \u2014 event-driven triggers bypass that picker.","capability_summary":"Webhook-driven audit + collision prevention + knowledge base registry upsert per flag event.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"webhook","config":{"path":"/launchdarkly-flag-event","method":"POST","secret_header":"X-LD-Signature"},"description":"LaunchDarkly webhook receives real-time flag lifecycle events (created, updated, toggled, deleted, archived). recipes.name: uc_registry_reconciliation
recipes.description: Reconciles the full LaunchDarkly flag list against the knowledge base registry. Default monthly on the 1st at 02:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step. Also runnable on demand.

recipes.name: uc_stale_cleanup
recipes.description: Scheduled capability. Scans all LaunchDarkly flags, identifies ones past the stale threshold with no activity, creates Linear cleanup tickets (de-duped against existing open ones), updates knowledge base entries to 'Cleanup Pending', and posts a weekly digest. Default Monday 09:00 UTC — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_stale_cleanup","title":"Stale Flag Cleanup","description":"Scheduled capability. Scans all LaunchDarkly flags, identifies ones past the stale threshold with no activity, creates Linear cleanup tickets (de-duped against existing open ones), updates knowledge base entries to 'Cleanup Pending', and posts a weekly digest. Default Monday 09:00 UTC \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Weekly stale-flag scan with Linear cleanup tickets, knowledge base status updates, and a messaging digest.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"UTC"},"description":"Default weekly Monday 09:00 UTC \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["development","ticketing","knowledge_base","messaging"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"slack","description":"Audit channel for the weekly stale-flag digest."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Memorize: per-flag age trajectories, previously-suppressed flags (user-excluded from cleanup), ticket outcomes (closed-as-fixed vs closed-as-wontfix) to calibrate future staleness signals."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"flag.governance.stale_scan_completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { total_scanned, stale_count, tickets_created, tickets_existing, archived_this_week }."}],"error_handling":"LaunchDarkly API fail \u2192 alert messaging that weekly scan was incomplete; preserve partial results in state. Leave empty to use the default project key from the connector."}],"sample_input":{"stale_threshold_days":"{{param.aq_stale_threshold_days}}","ld_project_keys":"{{param.aq_ld_project_keys}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"Scheduled tick"},{"id":"s2","type":"connector","label":"Fetch all flags from LD","connector":"launchdarkly"},{"id":"s3","type":"action","label":"Filter stale (> threshold + no activity)"},{"id":"s4","type":"decision","label":"Any stale flags?"},{"id":"s5","type":"connector","label":"Query Linear for existing cleanup tickets","connector":"ticketing"},{"id":"s6","type":"connector","label":"Create missing Linear tickets + update knowledge base entries","connector":"ticketing"},{"id":"s7","type":"connector","label":"Post weekly digest to the messaging channel","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"s8","type":"event","label":"Emit flag.governance.stale_scan_completed"},{"id":"s9","type":"end","label":"Scan complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"s4","target":"s7","variant":"no","label":"None"},{"source":"s5","target":"s6"},{"source":"s6","target":"s7"},{"source":"s7","target":"s8"},{"source":"s8","target":"s9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_produce_video
recipes.description: Produce a short announcement video from a feature description: generate script + visual strategy, human-approve the script, generate voiceover via TTS, compose the final video via the cloud provider, human-approve the render. Route rejections to the narrowest affected stage.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_produce_video","title":"Feature Announcement Video","description":"Produce a short announcement video from a feature description: generate script + visual strategy, human-approve the script, generate voiceover via TTS, compose the final video via the cloud provider, human-approve the render. Route rejections to the narrowest affected stage.","capability_summary":"Script + strategy -> TTS voiceover -> cloud video composition -> reviewed output, with stage-scoped rework.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 user supplies a feature description. Default manual \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["voice_generation","video_generation"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"2-stage review: script + visual strategy first, final video second. Rejection comments route to the narrowest affected stage (visual-only -> recompose only; audio -> regen TTS + recompose; script -> full rebuild). Max iterations per stage aq_max_iterations_per_stage."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Creative preference profile: script tone (formal/conversational/energetic/bold), visual style (minimal/vibrant/dark/branded), narration voice + pacing, rejection categories, iteration counts. After 3+ videos the first draft should match the user's taste on ~80% of choices."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"feature_video.production.composed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: feature_name, video_url, duration_sec, provider, iteration_count. Emitted when the render succeeds (before final review)."},{"event_type":"feature_video.production.approved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: feature_name, video_url, script_summary, iteration_count. Emitted after final human approval \u2014 downstream distribution pipelines can subscribe."}],"error_handling":"TTS auth failure -> report, pause. TTS rate limit -> retry with backoff, suggest shorter script if quota exhausted. Video render timeout -> poll 5 min, report error details. Render failure -> include provider error in Messages. Max iterations -> request reference material. Vague input (<20 words) -> request more context.","input_schema":[{"name":"feature_description","type":"text","description":"What the feature is, who it benefits, and any specific points to highlight. More detail = better first draft."},{"name":"duration","type":"enum","options":["15s","30s","60s","auto"],"default":"30s","description":"Target duration. Auto lets the agent pick based on feature complexity."},{"name":"style","type":"enum","options":["minimal","vibrant","dark_mode","branded"],"default":"minimal","description":"Default visual style. The agent refines this from review feedback over time."}],"sample_input":{"feature_description":"","duration":"{{param.aq_default_duration}}","style":"{{param.aq_default_style}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"v1","type":"start","label":"Manual: feature description"},{"id":"v2","type":"action","label":"Load creative memory + generate script + visual plan"},{"id":"v3","type":"action","label":"Deliver strategy via Messages"},{"id":"v4","type":"decision","label":"Script approved?"},{"id":"v5","type":"action","label":"Incorporate feedback, regenerate script"},{"id":"v6","type":"connector","label":"Generate voiceover via TTS","connector":"tts_api"},{"id":"v7","type":"connector","label":"Compose video via cloud API","connector":"video_composition_api"},{"id":"v8","type":"decision","label":"Final video approved?"},{"id":"v9","type":"action","label":"Route feedback to correct stage"},{"id":"v10","type":"action","label":"Save creative decisions to memory"},{"id":"v11","type":"event","label":"Emit composed + approved"},{"id":"v12","type":"end","label":"Video ready for distribution"}],"edges":[{"source":"v1","target":"v2"},{"source":"v2","target":"v3"},{"source":"v3","target":"v4"},{"source":"v4","target":"v6","label":"Approve","variant":"yes"},{"source":"v4","target":"v5","label":"Reject","variant":"no"},{"source":"v5","target":"v3"},{"source":"v6","target":"v7"},{"source":"v7","target":"v8"},{"source":"v8","target":"v10","label":"Approve","variant":"yes"},{"source":"v8","target":"v9","label":"Reject","variant":"no"},{"source":"v9","target":"v2"},{"source":"v10","target":"v11"},{"source":"v11","target":"v12"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_daily_sync
recipes.description: Pull updated finance platform invoices and yesterday's expenses, sync to the spreadsheet ledger (Invoices / Expenses / Dashboard tabs), dedupe by invoice number, and run anomaly detection against the 30-day rolling baseline with a daily alert cap. Default daily 7:00 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_daily_sync","title":"finance platform \u2192 Sheets Sync","description":"Pull updated finance platform invoices and yesterday's expenses, sync to the spreadsheet ledger (Invoices / Expenses / Dashboard tabs), dedupe by invoice number, and run anomaly detection against the 30-day rolling baseline with a daily alert cap. Default daily 7:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Daily finance platform\u2192Sheets sync + expense anomaly detection.","category":"operations","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 7 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 7:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["finance","spreadsheet"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`state/spending_baselines.json` \u2014 30-day rolling averages per category + per vendor. Updated after every successful sync. Used for 3\u00d7-transaction and 2\u00d7-category anomaly detection."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"finance.sync.complete","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { sync_ts, invoices_new, invoices_updated, expenses_added }. Emitted after successful sync."},{"event_type":"finance.expense.anomaly","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { vendor, amount, category, rule (3x_tx|2x_daily), baseline }. Emitted per anomaly (up to daily cap)."}],"error_handling":"finance platform 401 \u2192 do not update last_sync; user_message re-auth. Sheets append failure \u2192 queue in `state/pending_sync.json`. Corrupted baselines \u2192 rebuild from last 30 days of Sheets data. Anomaly alerts > 10/day \u2192 batch overflow into a digest user_message.","input_schema":[{"name":"ledger_spreadsheet_id","type":"text","description":"spreadsheet ID of the ledger. Must have Invoices, Expenses, Dashboard tabs."},{"name":"anomaly_rule","type":"enum","options":["Any expense > $500 outside vendor history","Any expense > $2,500 OR 3\u00d7 vendor 90d avg","Any expense > $10,000 regardless","Only new vendors"],"default":"Any expense > $2,500 OR 3\u00d7 vendor 90d avg","description":"Threshold that decides when an expense is flagged rather than just logged."}],"sample_input":{"ledger_spreadsheet_id":"{{param.aq_ledger_sheet}}","anomaly_rule":"{{param.aq_anomaly_rule}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"Daily tick"},{"id":"s2","type":"action","label":"Read last_sync + baselines"},{"id":"s3","type":"connector","label":"Query QB invoices + expenses","connector":"quickbooks"},{"id":"s4","type":"connector","label":"Read Sheets for dedupe","connector":"spreadsheet"},{"id":"s5","type":"connector","label":"Append new + update status rows","connector":"spreadsheet"},{"id":"s6","type":"action","label":"Run anomaly rules against baselines"},{"id":"s7","type":"event","label":"Emit finance.expense.anomaly (capped)"},{"id":"s8","type":"action","label":"Persist baselines + last_sync"},{"id":"s9","type":"event","label":"Emit finance.sync.complete"},{"id":"s10","type":"end","label":"Sync complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5"},{"source":"s5","target":"s6"},{"source":"s6","target":"s7"},{"source":"s7","target":"s8"},{"source":"s8","target":"s9"},{"source":"s9","target":"s10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_overdue_reminders
recipes.description: Poll finance platform for overdue invoices during business hours, classify by age (friendly 1-7d / firm 8-30d / manual review 31+d), apply the exclusion list, respect per-tier cooldowns, and send tier-appropriate email reminders. 31+ day accounts escalate to manual review — no auto-email. Default every 10 minutes Mon-Fri 8-18 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_overdue_reminders","title":"Overdue Invoice Reminders","description":"Poll finance platform for overdue invoices during business hours, classify by age (friendly 1-7d / firm 8-30d / manual review 31+d), apply the exclusion list, respect per-tier cooldowns, and send tier-appropriate email reminders. 31+ day accounts escalate to manual review \u2014 no auto-email. Default every 10 minutes Mon-Fri 8-18 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Tiered overdue-invoice email reminders with exclusion list + cooldowns.","category":"collections","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/10 8-18 * * 1-5","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 10 minutes during business hours Mon-Fri \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["finance","email"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every 31+ day overdue invoice escalates to human review \u2014 the agent never auto-emails a severely-overdue customer. Human decides next action."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`state/reminder_log.json` \u2014 per-invoice reminder history (tier, timestamp, recipient) used to enforce cooldowns (3 days friendly, 5 days firm) and prevent duplicate sends."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"finance.reminder.sent","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { invoice_number, customer, tier (friendly|firm), amount, days_overdue }. Emitted after a successful reminder send."},{"event_type":"finance.reminder.escalated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { invoice_number, customer, amount, days_overdue }. Emitted when a 31+ day invoice is routed to manual review."}],"error_handling":"finance platform 401/429/5xx \u2192 same as sync rules. email bounce \u2192 flag customer email for manual_review; do NOT log to reminder_log. Send failure (non-bounce) \u2192 do not log, retry next cycle. Customer on exclusion list \u2192 skip, do not count toward cooldown.","input_schema":[{"name":"reminder_cadence","type":"enum","options":["gentle","standard","aggressive"],"default":"standard","description":"gentle: reminder at 7 and 30 days then escalate. standard: 3/10/21 days. aggressive: 1/5/10/15 days."},{"name":"exclusions","type":"enum","options":["VIP/Enterprise","Invoices with disputes","Customers on payment plans","All of the above"],"default":"All of the above","description":"Hardcoded exclusions applied before any reminder is composed. Exclusions escalate to manual review instead."},{"name":"tone","type":"enum","options":["friendly","neutral","firm","escalating"],"default":"escalating","description":"Reminder tone. 'escalating' starts friendly and firms up per tier."}],"sample_input":{"reminder_cadence":"{{param.aq_reminder_cadence}}","exclusions":"{{param.aq_exclusions}}","tone":"{{param.aq_tone}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","gmail_send","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"Polling tick (business hours)"},{"id":"r2","type":"connector","label":"Query QB overdue invoices","connector":"quickbooks"},{"id":"r3","type":"action","label":"Load reminder_log + exclusion list"},{"id":"r4","type":"action","label":"Classify tier per invoice + check cooldown"},{"id":"r5","type":"decision","label":"31+ days or on exclusion?"},{"id":"r6","type":"event","label":"Emit finance.reminder.escalated"},{"id":"r7","type":"connector","label":"Compose + send reminder","connector":"email"},{"id":"r8","type":"action","label":"Log sent to reminder_log"},{"id":"r9","type":"event","label":"Emit finance.reminder.sent"},{"id":"r10","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"r1","target":"r2"},{"source":"r2","target":"r3"},{"source":"r3","target":"r4"},{"source":"r4","target":"r5"},{"source":"r5","target":"r6","variant":"yes","label":"Yes \u2192 escalate"},{"source":"r5","target":"r7","variant":"no","label":"No \u2192 email"},{"source":"r6","target":"r10"},{"source":"r7","target":"r8"},{"source":"r8","target":"r9"},{"source":"r9","target":"r10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_weekly_summary
recipes.description: Aggregate the week's finance platform P&L, compute AR aging + top 5 expense categories + WoW deltas, and post a formatted messaging layout summary to the messaging finance channel with a link to the Dashboard sheet. recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_summary","title":"Weekly Cash Flow Summary","description":"Aggregate the week's finance platform P&L, compute AR aging + top 5 expense categories + WoW deltas, and post a formatted messaging layout summary to the messaging finance channel with a link to the Dashboard sheet. recipes.name: uc_congressional_scan
recipes.description: Scan Capitol Trades (with Senate EFD fallback) for politician stock disclosures in the user's sectors of interest over the last 7 days. Match against the watchlist and surface unusual sector patterns. Route findings to review — 'useful' tags tighten next week's filters.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_congressional_scan","title":"Congressional Disclosure Scan","description":"Scan Capitol Trades (with Senate EFD fallback) for politician stock disclosures in the user's sectors of interest over the last 7 days. Match against the watchlist and surface unusual sector patterns. Route findings to review \u2014 'useful' tags tighten next week's filters.","capability_summary":"Weekly scan of congressional stock disclosures in user-selected sectors.","category":"research","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Weekly Monday 8:00 AM (overridden by persona-level shared trigger composition)."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Human tags each finding as useful / not useful. recipes.name: uc_gems
recipes.description: Find under-covered names in the user's sectors of interest: low analyst coverage + strong technicals + recent news catalyst. Emit a gem event per candidate and a filter event per rejection reason. Route to review — useful/not-useful tags adjust the coverage and technical thresholds.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_gems","title":"Sector Gem Discovery","description":"Find under-covered names in the user's sectors of interest: low analyst coverage + strong technicals + recent news catalyst. Emit a gem event per candidate and a filter event per rejection reason. Route to review \u2014 useful/not-useful tags adjust the coverage and technical thresholds.","capability_summary":"Weekly hunt for under-covered names in user-selected sectors with review-tuned thresholds.","category":"research","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Weekly Monday 8:00 AM (overridden by persona-level shared trigger composition)."},"connectors":["alpha_vantage"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Human tags each gem candidate as useful or not. recipes.name: uc_signals
recipes.description: Fetch weekly OHLCV + RSI + MACD + news for every ticker on the user's watchlist, compute a composite Buy/Sell/Hold signal, emit strong-outcome events, and route the signal table to human review. Reviewed decisions persist as simulated trades with running P&L that appear in next week's briefing.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_signals","title":"Weekly Signal Fetcher","description":"Fetch weekly OHLCV + RSI + MACD + news for every ticker on the user's watchlist, compute a composite Buy/Sell/Hold signal, emit strong-outcome events, and route the signal table to human review. Reviewed decisions persist as simulated trades with running P&L that appear in next week's briefing.","capability_summary":"Weekly RSI/MACD/news composite per ticker; reviewed decisions become simulated trades.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Weekly Monday 8:00 AM (overridden by persona-level shared trigger composition)."},"connectors":["alpha_vantage"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every signal is reviewed by the human before it persists. The review outcome (accept / reject / modify) becomes a simulated trade in `sim_trades.json` with entry price, decision, and confidence. The trade's running P&L is recomputed each cycle and printed in the next briefing."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Simulated trade ledger (`sim_trades.json`) keyed by ticker + week. Signal history (`signal_history.json`) for trend tracking. Review aggregation learns which signal categories the user marks invaluable \u2014 dropped from future runs after 3+ invaluable marks."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"stocks.signals.buy","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: ticker, confidence, RSI, MACD, catalyst summary. Emitted on strong bullish composite."},{"event_type":"stocks.signals.sell","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: ticker, confidence, RSI, MACD, risk summary. Emitted on strong bearish composite."},{"event_type":"stocks.signals.hold","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: ticker, composite score, conflict reasons. Emitted when RSI/MACD disagree or signals are ambiguous."}],"error_handling":"Alpha Vantage absent \u2192 web_search fallback. Ticker without any data in either source \u2192 mark as 'data unavailable' in the signal table; never fabricate numbers.","input_schema":[{"name":"watchlist","type":"text","description":"Comma-separated ticker symbols to track (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA \u2026)."},{"name":"signal_weighting","type":"enum","options":["technical","news","balanced"],"default":"balanced","description":"How to weight technical indicators vs news sentiment in the composite score."}],"sample_input":{"watchlist":"{{param.aq_tickers}}","signal_weighting":"{{param.aq_signal_weighting}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","web_search","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"Monday tick (shared)"},{"id":"s2","type":"action","label":"Load watchlist + memory"},{"id":"s3","type":"connector","label":"Fetch OHLCV + RSI + MACD + news","connector":"alpha_vantage"},{"id":"s4","type":"action","label":"Compute Buy/Sell/Hold composite"},{"id":"s5","type":"event","label":"Emit stocks.signals.*"},{"id":"s6","type":"action","label":"Route to human review"},{"id":"s7","type":"action","label":"Persist reviewed decisions to sim_trades.json"},{"id":"s8","type":"end","label":"Signal section ready for combined briefing"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5"},{"source":"s5","target":"s6"},{"source":"s6","target":"s7"},{"source":"s7","target":"s8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_build_template
recipes.description: One-time build step that renders a branded HTML invoice template from your business details and tests the time-tracking credential so the monthly flow can run unattended. Triggered once during persona creation; not user-scheduled.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_build_template","title":"Invoice Template Build","description":"One-time build step that renders a branded HTML invoice template from your business details and tests the time-tracking credential so the monthly flow can run unattended. Triggered once during persona creation; not user-scheduled.","capability_summary":"Generate the HTML invoice template artifact + save business config during persona build.","category":"build","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"build_hook","config":{"hook":"on_create"},"description":"Runs once during persona creation. Not user-configurable \u2014 build hooks bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["time_tracking","storage"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"invoice.template.built","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { template_path, config_path, currency, payment_terms }. Emitted after the template and config are written."}],"error_handling":"Time-tracking credential test failure \u2192 emit template.built with a warning flag and ask the user to re-enter credentials. Storage write failure \u2192 fall back to managed Local Drive and note in the summary.","input_schema":[{"name":"business_details","type":"text","description":"Business name | address | email | optional logo URL. Baked into the HTML header during rendering."},{"name":"hourly_rate","type":"text","description":"Default hourly rate for all clients. Client-specific overrides are learned via review memory."},{"name":"currency","type":"enum","options":["USD","EUR","GBP","CAD","AUD","CHF","Other"],"default":"USD","description":"Invoice currency. Sets the symbol and locale formatting."},{"name":"country_and_tax","type":"text","description":"Country + tax rate (e.g. 'United States, 0%' or 'Netherlands, 21% VAT'). 0% omits the tax row from renders."},{"name":"payment_terms","type":"enum","options":["Due on receipt","Net 15","Net 30","Net 45","Net 60"],"default":"Net 30","description":"Sets the due date relative to invoice date on every render."}],"sample_input":{"business_details":"{{param.aq_business_details}}","hourly_rate":"{{param.aq_hourly_rate}}","currency":"{{param.aq_currency}}","country_and_tax":"{{param.aq_country_tax}}","payment_terms":"{{param.aq_payment_terms}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"b1","type":"start","label":"Persona build hook"},{"id":"b2","type":"action","label":"Collect business details from adoption"},{"id":"b3","type":"action","label":"Render HTML template (print + screen CSS)"},{"id":"b4","type":"action","label":"Write template.html + invoice_config.json"},{"id":"b5","type":"connector","label":"Test time-tracking credential","connector":"time_tracking"},{"id":"b6","type":"event","label":"Emit invoice.template.built"},{"id":"b7","type":"end","label":"Build complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"b1","target":"b2"},{"source":"b2","target":"b3"},{"source":"b3","target":"b4"},{"source":"b4","target":"b5"},{"source":"b5","target":"b6"},{"source":"b6","target":"b7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_monthly_invoices
recipes.description: Pull the previous month's billable hours, apply learned rate overrides and billable/non-billable project tags, render one HTML invoice per client from the template, deliver a billing summary via Messages, and route each invoice for human review — corrections feed back into memory so next month is more accurate. Default 1st of month at 9:00 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_monthly_invoices","title":"Monthly Invoice Generation","description":"Pull the previous month's billable hours, apply learned rate overrides and billable/non-billable project tags, render one HTML invoice per client from the template, deliver a billing summary via Messages, and route each invoice for human review \u2014 corrections feed back into memory so next month is more accurate. Default 1st of month at 9:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Monthly per-client invoice generation with human review + memory-learned overrides.","category":"operations","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 1 * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default 1st of month at 9:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["time_tracking","storage"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every generated invoice is routed for human approve/reject. Rejections carry correction notes (wrong rate, non-billable project, description format). Approved invoices are finalized; corrections update memory."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-client rate overrides, billable/non-billable project classifications, description format preferences, invoice numbering sequence. Every correction from review updates the relevant entry so next month's invoices apply it automatically."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"invoice.generated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { client, invoice_number, amount, currency, file_path }. Emitted per rendered invoice."},{"event_type":"invoice.approved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { client, invoice_number, amount, currency }. Emitted when a user approves an invoice."}],"error_handling":"Time-tracking failure \u2192 Messages alert, cannot proceed. Empty month \u2192 summary notes zero entries. Missing template \u2192 advise rebuild (run uc_build_template again). Uncategorized entries \u2192 flag in summary, include in 'Uncategorized' pseudo-client.","input_schema":[{"name":"output_destination","type":"text","description":"Storage destination for rendered invoices. Local Drive default or a cloud credential picked at adoption."}],"sample_input":{"output_destination":"{{param.aq_output_destination}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"m1","type":"start","label":"Monthly tick"},{"id":"m2","type":"action","label":"Load config + memory (overrides, classifications, sequence)"},{"id":"m3","type":"connector","label":"Fetch previous-month time entries","connector":"time_tracking"},{"id":"m4","type":"action","label":"Group by client + project; apply memory filters"},{"id":"m5","type":"action","label":"Compute amounts + generate invoice numbers"},{"id":"m6","type":"action","label":"Render HTML invoices + write to storage"},{"id":"m7","type":"action","label":"Deliver Messages summary (per-client + YTD)"},{"id":"m8","type":"action","label":"Route invoices for human review"},{"id":"m9","type":"action","label":"Apply corrections + update memory + re-render as needed"},{"id":"m10","type":"end","label":"Monthly cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"m1","target":"m2"},{"source":"m2","target":"m3"},{"source":"m3","target":"m4"},{"source":"m4","target":"m5"},{"source":"m5","target":"m6"},{"source":"m6","target":"m7"},{"source":"m7","target":"m8"},{"source":"m8","target":"m9"},{"source":"m9","target":"m10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_generate_sprites
recipes.description: Given an anchor character image and a list of desired animations, produce one normalized PNG sprite sheet per animation. Uses the canvas technique (anchor on left, AI fills frames on right) with a rigorous normalization pipeline (frame spacing, body-height invariance, anti-drift).
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_generate_sprites","title":"AI Sprite-Sheet Generation","description":"Given an anchor character image and a list of desired animations, produce one normalized PNG sprite sheet per animation. Uses the canvas technique (anchor on left, AI fills frames on right) with a rigorous normalization pipeline (frame spacing, body-height invariance, anti-drift).","capability_summary":"Anchor \u2192 animation set via canvas technique + normalization, game-engine ready.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 user provides an anchor image + animation list and invokes the capability."},"connectors":["image_generation"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Each animation's sprite sheet is presented for user approval before the next animation generates. Rejection triggers regeneration with a tighter prompt; 2 rejections in a row trigger the fall-back technique. Approved sprite sheets persist in the asset manifest."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-character metadata (anchor description, color palette, art style). Per-model generation history (which prompts worked, which normalization adjustments were needed). Technique effectiveness per animation type (walk cycles always fragile for model X, attack always solid)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"game-artist.animation.generated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: animation_name, frame_count, frame_size, technique (canvas | procedural), quality_notes (drift_corrected | consistency_retry | fallback_interpolation). Emitted per completed animation."},{"event_type":"game-artist.sprite_set.complete","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: character_slug, manifest_path, animation_count, total_frames. Emitted when all requested animations ship."}],"error_handling":"Image AI auth failure \u2192 halt; emit persona.error. 2 consistency retries exhausted \u2192 keep best result with quality_notes='consistency_retry_exhausted'. Walk/run 2 attempts failed \u2192 fall back to 2-keyframe interpolation with quality_notes='fallback_interpolation'. Base-height >20% variance \u2192 regenerate; never rescue via scaling. Anchor missing \u2192 halt.","input_schema":[{"name":"anchor_image_path","type":"text","description":"Path to the single anchor character image. Clean sprite on transparent/solid background."},{"name":"animation_set","type":"enum","options":["basic","standard","full"],"default":"standard","description":"Basic = idle + walk + attack. Standard = + run + crouch + death. Full = + jump + hurt."},{"name":"art_style","type":"enum","options":["pixel_art_16bit","pixel_art_32bit","hd_sprite","painterly"],"default":"pixel_art_16bit","description":"Art style for generation prompts and normalization tolerance."},{"name":"frame_size","type":"number","default":64,"min":16,"max":256,"description":"Target frame size in pixels (square cells). Common: 32 for retro, 64 for modern pixel, 128+ for HD."}],"sample_input":{"anchor_image_path":"","animation_set":"{{param.aq_animation_set}}","art_style":"{{param.aq_art_style}}","frame_size":"{{param.aq_frame_size}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"Manual: anchor + animation list"},{"id":"s2","type":"action","label":"Validate anchor + extract features"},{"id":"s3","type":"action","label":"Plan per-animation technique"},{"id":"s4","type":"connector","label":"Canvas generate (AI, pose-based)","connector":"image_ai"},{"id":"s5","type":"action","label":"Normalize: spacing \u2192 body-height \u2192 anti-drift"},{"id":"s6","type":"action","label":"Route to user review per animation"},{"id":"s7","type":"event","label":"Emit game-artist.animation.generated"},{"id":"s8","type":"decision","label":"More animations queued?"},{"id":"s9","type":"action","label":"Write asset_manifest.json"},{"id":"s10","type":"event","label":"Emit game-artist.sprite_set.complete"},{"id":"s11","type":"end","label":"Sprite set ready for game engine"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5"},{"source":"s5","target":"s6"},{"source":"s6","target":"s7"},{"source":"s7","target":"s8"},{"source":"s8","target":"s4","variant":"yes","label":"Next"},{"source":"s8","target":"s9","variant":"no","label":"Done"},{"source":"s9","target":"s10"},{"source":"s10","target":"s11"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_image_to_video
recipes.description: Turn one anchor image into a short animated clip (MP4/WebM). Uses image generation AI's video generator today; swaps to OpenAI's video endpoint when the user's chosen image-AI credential supports video. Output is saved to the user's configured storage connector, not the local filesystem, so generated moments stay with the rest of the game's asset pipeline.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_image_to_video","title":"Image \u2192 Animated Short","description":"Turn one anchor image into a short animated clip (MP4/WebM). Uses image generation AI's video generator today; swaps to OpenAI's video endpoint when the user's chosen image-AI credential supports video. Output is saved to the user's configured storage connector, not the local filesystem, so generated moments stay with the rest of the game's asset pipeline.","capability_summary":"Anchor image \u2192 animated MP4/WebM via image-AI video generator; saved to the user's configured storage target.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":false,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 user supplies an anchor image and a motion prompt."},"connectors":["image_generation","storage"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every generated clip is reviewed. User flags good (keep, memorize the motion style) or bad (off-model, jitter, style drift). Feedback tunes the next prompt \u2014 retain wording the user accepts, suppress wording the user rejects."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`video_style_patterns.json` \u2014 per-character motion prompts that scored well, accepted cadence/duration defaults, style adjustments learned from rejections.","learning_threshold":2},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"game-artist.video.generated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: character_slug, provider (leonardo|openai), duration_sec, storage_uri, prompt_used. Emitted when a clip finishes generation and is saved to the storage target."},{"event_type":"game-artist.video.reviewed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: video_id, decision (good|bad), notes?. Emitted on human review \u2014 drives the style-memory update."}],"error_handling":"Provider lacks video support \u2192 emit a persona.error explaining which providers do (image generation AI today). Storage target unreachable \u2192 retain the clip in a temp path and surface a re-save CTA; never silently drop an expensive generation. Duration cap exceeded for the plan tier \u2192 downgrade to the plan's max duration and note it in the delivery message.","input_schema":[{"name":"source_image_path","type":"text","description":"Path to the anchor image the clip will be built from."},{"name":"motion_prompt","type":"text","description":"Freeform description of the desired motion \u2014 e.g. 'slow drift of capelet, idle breathing, subtle eye blink every 2s'."},{"name":"duration_sec","type":"number","default":4,"min":2,"max":10,"description":"Clip length. Costlier providers cap at ~5-6s; budget accordingly."},{"name":"storage_target","type":"text","description":"Which storage connector to save the clip to (resolved at adoption time from aq_storage_target)."}],"sample_input":{"source_image_path":"","motion_prompt":"","duration_sec":4,"storage_target":"{{param.aq_storage_target}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write","http_request"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"v1","type":"start","label":"Manual: anchor image + motion prompt"},{"id":"v2","type":"action","label":"Load video_style_patterns memory"},{"id":"v3","type":"connector","label":"Submit image + prompt to image-AI video endpoint","connector":"image_ai"},{"id":"v4","type":"action","label":"Poll until render complete"},{"id":"v5","type":"connector","label":"Upload MP4/WebM to storage target","connector":"storage"},{"id":"v6","type":"event","label":"Emit game-artist.video.generated"},{"id":"v7","type":"action","label":"Route to human review"},{"id":"v8","type":"event","label":"Emit game-artist.video.reviewed"},{"id":"v9","type":"action","label":"Update video_style_patterns memory"},{"id":"v10","type":"end","label":"Clip delivered + feedback absorbed"}],"edges":[{"source":"v1","target":"v2"},{"source":"v2","target":"v3"},{"source":"v3","target":"v4"},{"source":"v4","target":"v5"},{"source":"v5","target":"v6"},{"source":"v6","target":"v7"},{"source":"v7","target":"v8"},{"source":"v8","target":"v9"},{"source":"v9","target":"v10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_procedural_idle
recipes.description: Produce a 4-frame breathing idle animation from any character sprite using programmatic pixel shifting. No AI calls — perfectly consistent. Usable independently of uc_generate_sprites: enable alone to add idle polish to sprite sets you already have.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_procedural_idle","title":"Procedural Idle Breathing","description":"Produce a 4-frame breathing idle animation from any character sprite using programmatic pixel shifting. No AI calls \u2014 perfectly consistent. Usable independently of uc_generate_sprites: enable alone to add idle polish to sprite sets you already have.","capability_summary":"4-frame procedural idle breathing, no AI, perfect consistency.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 user provides a character sprite and invokes the idle-generator."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"game-artist.idle.rendered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: character_slug, frame_count (always 4), frame_size, output_path. Enables downstream pipelines to chain an idle after bulk sprite generation."}],"error_handling":"Source sprite missing \u2192 halt with clear error. Pillow unavailable in execution environment \u2192 emit persona.error; cannot run procedural idle without Pillow.","input_schema":[{"name":"source_sprite_path","type":"text","description":"Path to the character sprite the idle animation will be built from."},{"name":"art_style","type":"enum","options":["pixel_art_16bit","pixel_art_32bit","hd_sprite","painterly"],"default":"pixel_art_16bit","description":"Informs the breathing pixel-shift amplitude (retro pixel = 1px, HD = 2-3px)."},{"name":"frame_size","type":"number","default":64,"min":16,"max":256,"description":"Target frame size in pixels."}],"sample_input":{"source_sprite_path":"","art_style":"{{param.aq_art_style}}","frame_size":"{{param.aq_frame_size}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"i1","type":"start","label":"Manual: source sprite path"},{"id":"i2","type":"action","label":"Load sprite + detect bounding box"},{"id":"i3","type":"action","label":"Frame 0: original"},{"id":"i4","type":"action","label":"Frame 1: shift character up 1px"},{"id":"i5","type":"action","label":"Frame 2: original (repeat)"},{"id":"i6","type":"action","label":"Frame 3: shift character down 1px"},{"id":"i7","type":"action","label":"Compose 4-cell horizontal PNG"},{"id":"i8","type":"event","label":"Emit game-artist.idle.rendered"},{"id":"i9","type":"end","label":"Idle sheet delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"i1","target":"i2"},{"source":"i2","target":"i3"},{"source":"i3","target":"i4"},{"source":"i4","target":"i5"},{"source":"i5","target":"i6"},{"source":"i6","target":"i7"},{"source":"i7","target":"i8"},{"source":"i8","target":"i9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_codebase_analysis
recipes.description: For each accepted idea, run a feasibility pass against the registered codebase: related code search, effort estimate from affected surface, benefit call. Produce the structured backlog record and emit it so downstream backlog systems (or a human curator) can finalize it.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_codebase_analysis","title":"Codebase Feasibility Analysis","description":"For each accepted idea, run a feasibility pass against the registered codebase: related code search, effort estimate from affected surface, benefit call. Produce the structured backlog record and emit it so downstream backlog systems (or a human curator) can finalize it.","capability_summary":"Codebase-grounded feasibility, effort, and benefit analysis per accepted idea.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"harvester.triage.accepted"},"description":"Fires whenever uc_triage accepts an idea. Not user-configurable."},"connectors":["codebase"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"harvester.triage.accepted","direction":"listen","description":"Accepted candidate incoming from uc_triage."},{"event_type":"harvester.backlog.new","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: full structured backlog item { id, title, description, source, category, feasibility, effort, benefit, priority, codebase_context }. This is the terminal event external backlog systems subscribe to."}],"error_handling":"Codebase offline \u2192 queue the accepted idea in `pending_analysis.json`; retry on next codebase connection. Search returns zero matches \u2192 mark feasibility 'Unknown: no existing patterns found' (never 'Low' without evidence). Large-repo timeout \u2192 restrict search to the most idea-relevant directories based on keyword.","input_schema":[{"name":"target_codebase","type":"connector_ref","ui_component":"CodebaseSelector","connector":"codebase","required":true,"description":"Which registered codebase to analyze against. Presented as a selector; user picks from their available codebases during adoption."},{"name":"analysis_depth","type":"enum","options":["quick","standard","deep"],"default":"standard","description":"Quick = keyword-only search; Standard = keyword + file browse; Deep = + read matched files + context maps."}],"sample_input":{"target_codebase":"{{param.aq_target_codebase}}","analysis_depth":"{{param.aq_analysis_depth}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"a1","type":"start","label":"harvester.triage.accepted received"},{"id":"a2","type":"connector","label":"search_code + related_files","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"a3","type":"action","label":"Rate feasibility / effort / benefit"},{"id":"a4","type":"action","label":"Compose structured backlog item"},{"id":"a5","type":"event","label":"Emit harvester.backlog.new"},{"id":"a6","type":"end","label":"Item ready for backlog system"}],"edges":[{"source":"a1","target":"a2"},{"source":"a2","target":"a3"},{"source":"a3","target":"a4"},{"source":"a4","target":"a5"},{"source":"a5","target":"a6"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_harvest
recipes.description: Weekly scan across configured sources (messaging channels, knowledge base pages, Google Alerts, pasted URL queue). Extract 3-10 concrete candidates per source. Skip vague/meta content. Emit one event per candidate; candidates land in the triage queue.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_harvest","title":"Idea Harvesting","description":"Scheduled extraction of concrete idea candidates. PRIMARY source is web research grounded in the bound codebase's domain/stack: read the codebase (if connected) to understand the product, then mine the web — trending GitHub repos, Hacker News, relevant communities, competitor changelogs — for feature/improvement ideas that fit. If messaging / knowledge-base connectors are also connected, additionally extract ideas from those. Holds each candidate for human triage. Always delivers from web + codebase even with no messaging/KB source connected.","capability_summary":"Codebase/domain-grounded web idea harvesting (trending repos, HN, communities); optional messaging/KB sources. Produces triage candidates.","category":"research","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Weekly Monday 9:00 AM — user-configurable via adoption composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-source yield stats (ideas per scan, acceptance rate when triaged). Per-category acceptance tracking — after 3+ rejections of a category, it's dropped from future scans."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"harvester.idea.new","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { title, description, source_url, source_type, category, candidate_id }. Emitted per extracted candidate; consumed by uc_triage."}],"error_handling":"Messaging / knowledge-base connectors absent → SKIP them and harvest from web + codebase alone (NOT a failure — never precondition_failed for a missing chat/KB source). Codebase absent → harvest general high-signal product ideas seeded by focus/domain input. Only precondition_failed if web research is genuinely unavailable AND no codebase. Per-source exceptions → log and continue.","input_schema":[{"name":"sources","type":"text","description":"Which sources to harvest from (messaging channels, knowledge base databases, URL queue). Connectors skipped at adoption are excluded."},{"name":"content_types","type":"enum","options":["articles_only","articles_and_videos","articles_videos_and_discussions"],"default":"articles_and_videos","description":"What kinds of content to consider when scanning sources."},{"name":"ideas_per_source","type":"number","default":5,"min":1,"max":20,"description":"Maximum number of candidates extracted per source per scan."}],"sample_input":{"sources":"{{param.aq_sources}}","content_types":"{{param.aq_content_types}}","ideas_per_source":"{{param.aq_ideas_per_source}}"},"tool_hints":["web_search","http_request","search_code","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"h0","type":"action","label":"Read codebase domain/stack (or focus input) → seed web research"},{"id":"h1","type":"start","label":"Weekly tick"},{"id":"h2","type":"action","label":"Load memory (category weights)"},{"id":"h3","type":"connector","label":"Scan messaging / knowledge base / URL queue","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"h4","type":"action","label":"Extract 3-10 ideas per source"},{"id":"h5","type":"action","label":"Filter by category weights; skip vague"},{"id":"h6","type":"event","label":"Emit harvester.idea.new per candidate"},{"id":"h7","type":"end","label":"Queue awaiting triage"}],"edges":[{"source":"h1","target":"h2"},{"source":"h2","target":"h3"},{"source":"h3","target":"h4"},{"source":"h4","target":"h5"},{"source":"h5","target":"h6"},{"source":"h6","target":"h7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_triage
recipes.description: For each harvested idea, present to the human with accept/reject affordance. Every decision becomes memory training data so future harvests weight categories accordingly. Accepted ideas trigger the codebase-analysis capability; rejected ones stay in the harvest log with reason.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_triage","title":"Triage Pipeline","description":"For each harvested idea, present to the human with accept/reject affordance. Every decision becomes memory training data so future harvests weight categories accordingly. Accepted ideas trigger the codebase-analysis capability; rejected ones stay in the harvest log with reason.","capability_summary":"Human accept/reject per candidate, memory-trained category weighting.","category":"review","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"harvester.idea.new"},"description":"Fires whenever uc_harvest emits a candidate. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every candidate is presented to the human before it enters the backlog pipeline. The accept/reject decision + optional rejection reason persists as memory keyed by (category, source_type)."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Triage decision ledger. After 3 rejections of a category \u2192 drop from future harvests for this persona. Repeated accepts within a category expand extraction depth for that category."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"harvester.idea.new","direction":"listen","description":"Candidate incoming from uc_harvest."},{"event_type":"harvester.triage.accepted","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { candidate_id, human_notes?, priority_hint? }. Consumed by uc_codebase_analysis."},{"event_type":"harvester.triage.rejected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { candidate_id, reason }. For memory training and rejection analytics."}],"error_handling":"Messages delivery failure for triage card \u2192 queue in `pending_triage.json`; retry next cycle. Never auto-reject a candidate just because the human hasn't responded \u2014 unreviewed candidates age in the queue and surface in weekly summaries.","input_schema":[{"name":"backlog_format","type":"enum","options":["github_issue","linear_ticket","jira_story","notion_database_row","markdown_bullet"],"default":"markdown_bullet","description":"How the accepted backlog item is structured when uc_codebase_analysis produces the final record."}],"sample_input":{"backlog_format":"{{param.aq_backlog_format}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"t1","type":"start","label":"harvester.idea.new received"},{"id":"t2","type":"action","label":"Render triage card via Messages"},{"id":"t3","type":"decision","label":"Human accepts?"},{"id":"t4","type":"event","label":"Emit harvester.triage.accepted"},{"id":"t5","type":"event","label":"Emit harvester.triage.rejected"},{"id":"t6","type":"action","label":"Persist decision to memory"},{"id":"t7","type":"end","label":"Awaiting next idea"}],"edges":[{"source":"t1","target":"t2"},{"source":"t2","target":"t3"},{"source":"t3","target":"t4","variant":"yes","label":"Accept"},{"source":"t3","target":"t5","variant":"no","label":"Reject"},{"source":"t4","target":"t6"},{"source":"t5","target":"t6"},{"source":"t6","target":"t7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_intake
recipes.description: Captures a new incident report with full detail, runs fuzzy-match duplicate detection against open incidents from the last 2 hours, classifies severity by impact (S1/S2/S3/S4), generates the structured record with escalation deadline and update cadence, persists it, and routes the severity-appropriate notification. Triggered on demand when a team member reports an incident.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_intake","title":"Incident Intake & Classification","description":"Captures a new incident report with full detail, runs fuzzy-match duplicate detection against open incidents from the last 2 hours, classifies severity by impact (S1/S2/S3/S4), generates the structured record with escalation deadline and update cadence, persists it, and routes the severity-appropriate notification. Triggered on demand when a team member reports an incident.","capability_summary":"On-demand intake with duplicate detection and severity-based routing.","category":"operations","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual trigger \u2014 a team member or monitoring system reports a new incident. Default manual \u2014 final trigger shape set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Potential duplicate matches route to a manual merge-or-create decision; unambiguous intakes proceed without review."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`incident_log` memory category holds every record. Fuzzy match on title + affected_systems against last 2h of open incidents powers duplicate detection."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"incident.critical.opened","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { incident_id, severity: 'S1', affected_systems, title, escalation_deadline }. Emitted for every new S1 record."},{"event_type":"incident.high.opened","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { incident_id, severity: 'S2', affected_systems, title }. Emitted for every new S2 record."}],"error_handling":"Duplicate match timeout (reporter doesn't choose in 5m) \u2192 create new incident with cross-reference to the candidate. Persistence failure \u2192 buffer + warn user + retry on next cycle.","input_schema":[{"name":"severity_scale_label","type":"enum","options":["S1-S4","P1-P4","Blocker-Minor"],"default":"S1-S4","description":"Which labeling convention your team uses. Maps internally to S1-S4 escalation tiers regardless of display."}],"sample_input":{"severity_scale_label":"{{param.aq_severity_scale}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"i1","type":"start","label":"New incident reported"},{"id":"i2","type":"action","label":"Capture details + fuzzy-match duplicates"},{"id":"i3","type":"decision","label":"Duplicate found?"},{"id":"i4","type":"action","label":"Merge into existing record"},{"id":"i5","type":"action","label":"Classify severity + generate INC-ID"},{"id":"i6","type":"action","label":"Persist to agent_memory, route notification"},{"id":"i7","type":"event","label":"Emit incident.{severity}.opened"},{"id":"i8","type":"end","label":"Incident logged + team alerted"}],"edges":[{"source":"i1","target":"i2"},{"source":"i2","target":"i3"},{"source":"i3","target":"i4","variant":"yes"},{"source":"i3","target":"i5","variant":"no"},{"source":"i4","target":"i8"},{"source":"i5","target":"i6"},{"source":"i6","target":"i7"},{"source":"i7","target":"i8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_postmortem
recipes.description: For resolved S1 and S2 incidents, waits a configurable settling period (default 24 hours) then generates a structured post-mortem: summary, timeline, impact, root cause, response metrics, action items, lessons learned. Queries memory for recurring root-cause categories in the last 90 days and flags systemic patterns. Presented via human approval before finalizing.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_postmortem","title":"Post-Incident Review","description":"For resolved S1 and S2 incidents, waits a configurable settling period (default 24 hours) then generates a structured post-mortem: summary, timeline, impact, root cause, response metrics, action items, lessons learned. Queries memory for recurring root-cause categories in the last 90 days and flags systemic patterns. Presented via human approval before finalizing.","capability_summary":"Structured post-mortem generation with 90-day recurring-pattern detection.","category":"review","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"incident.resolved"},"description":"Fires when a resolved incident is S1 or S2. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the trigger-composition picker."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every post-mortem is presented for human approval before it persists as an organizational record. The reviewer can edit findings and action items inline."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`post_mortem` memory category. Cross-references against 90 days of prior post-mortems by root_cause_category to flag systemic patterns."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"incident.resolved","direction":"listen","description":"Incoming resolved S1/S2 \u2014 enters the 24h settling delay."},{"event_type":"incident.postmortem.ready","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { incident_id, post_mortem_id, systemic_pattern_flag? }. Emitted when review is approved and archived."}],"error_handling":"Resolution notes empty \u2192 mark root cause `unknown`, flag for manual investigation. 90-day lookup empty \u2192 note 'no comparable history'. Human rejects the review \u2192 preserve draft, wait for edits + resubmit.","input_schema":[{"name":"postmortem_delay_hours","type":"number","default":24,"min":1,"max":72,"description":"How long to wait after resolution before generating the review. Gives responders time to add final notes."}],"sample_input":{"postmortem_delay_hours":"{{param.aq_postmortem_delay}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"p1","type":"start","label":"incident.resolved (S1/S2)"},{"id":"p2","type":"action","label":"Wait postmortem_delay_hours"},{"id":"p3","type":"action","label":"Compile timeline + impact + root cause + actions"},{"id":"p4","type":"action","label":"Check 90-day history for recurring root-cause"},{"id":"p5","type":"action","label":"Present for human approval"},{"id":"p6","type":"event","label":"Emit incident.postmortem.ready"},{"id":"p7","type":"end","label":"Post-mortem archived"}],"edges":[{"source":"p1","target":"p2"},{"source":"p2","target":"p3"},{"source":"p3","target":"p4"},{"source":"p4","target":"p5"},{"source":"p5","target":"p6"},{"source":"p6","target":"p7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_tracking
recipes.description: Maintains the live status board for every open incident: processes status updates into the timeline, resets escalation timers, enforces severity-based update cadences, auto-closes stale S4 items, and requests human closure confirmation when status transitions to resolved. Default escalation sweep every 15 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_tracking","title":"Lifecycle Tracking & Escalation","description":"Maintains the live status board for every open incident: processes status updates into the timeline, resets escalation timers, enforces severity-based update cadences, auto-closes stale S4 items, and requests human closure confirmation when status transitions to resolved. Default escalation sweep every 15 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Status update processing and escalation enforcement on every open incident.","category":"operations","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"*/15 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 15 minutes for the escalation sweep (also fires on incoming `incident.status.updated` events). Final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every transition to `resolved` surfaces a closure confirmation \u2014 human verifies the incident is actually done before the record finalizes."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Timeline entries append to the `incident_log` memory record. Status history preserves the full transition sequence for post-mortem reconstruction."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"incident.status.updated","direction":"listen","description":"External update from a responder \u2014 routes into the tracking pipeline."},{"event_type":"incident.status.updated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { incident_id, old_status, new_status, author }. Emitted on every transition."},{"event_type":"incident.escalated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { incident_id, severity, elapsed_since_last_update_minutes }. Emitted when an open incident exceeds its update cadence deadline."},{"event_type":"incident.resolved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { incident_id, duration_minutes, root_cause_category }. Emitted on human-confirmed closure."}],"error_handling":"Incident not found \u2192 reject update with clarification. Status change invalid (resolved \u2192 open without reason) \u2192 reject with explanation. Escalation gap after restart \u2192 scan all open S1/S2, send belated escalations with actual delay labeled. Closure confirmation timeout \u2192 revert status to previous, notify reporter.","input_schema":[{"name":"auto_escalate_s1_minutes","type":"number","default":30,"min":5,"max":120,"description":"Minutes of no update before an S1 auto-escalates. Lower = faster response, higher alert fatigue."}],"sample_input":{"auto_escalate_s1_minutes":"{{param.aq_auto_escalate_s1}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"t1","type":"start","label":"Status update or 15m sweep"},{"id":"t2","type":"action","label":"Load incident + append timeline"},{"id":"t3","type":"decision","label":"Escalation deadline passed?"},{"id":"t4","type":"event","label":"Emit incident.escalated"},{"id":"t5","type":"decision","label":"Status \u2192 resolved?"},{"id":"t6","type":"action","label":"Request human closure confirmation"},{"id":"t7","type":"event","label":"Emit incident.resolved"},{"id":"t8","type":"end","label":"Tracking state persisted"}],"edges":[{"source":"t1","target":"t2"},{"source":"t2","target":"t3"},{"source":"t3","target":"t4","variant":"yes"},{"source":"t3","target":"t5","variant":"no"},{"source":"t4","target":"t5"},{"source":"t5","target":"t6","variant":"yes"},{"source":"t5","target":"t8","variant":"no"},{"source":"t6","target":"t7"},{"source":"t7","target":"t8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_daily_briefing
recipes.description: Daily rollup of the past 24h of ingested articles, categorized and ranked, delivered as an HTML email. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 7am.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_daily_briefing","title":"Daily Briefing","description":"Daily rollup of the past 24h of ingested articles, categorized and ranked, delivered as an HTML email. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 7am.","capability_summary":"Daily categorized HTML email briefing with source distribution + trending topics.","category":"research","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 7 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 7:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["email"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Optional review step (configurable via `aq_briefing_review`) \u2014 when set to 'review before send', the composed briefing drafts to the inbox for approval before external recipients."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Trending topic history (7-day rolling), per-source reliability trend, cumulative article counts per category."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"research.briefing.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { date, articles_count, top_stories_count, categories, trending_topics }."}],"error_handling":"Empty day \u2192 deliver terse 'no new intelligence' note or skip entirely. recipes.name: uc_polling_ingestion
recipes.description: Poll user-attached sources, dedupe against rolling 30-day index, AI-summarize with importance scoring, log to knowledge base, post breaking news alerts in real-time. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default every 30 minutes.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_polling_ingestion","title":"Source Ingestion","description":"Poll user-attached sources, dedupe against rolling 30-day index, AI-summarize with importance scoring, log to knowledge base, post breaking news alerts in real-time. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default every 30 minutes.","capability_summary":"Polling ingestion + dedup + AI summarization + importance scoring + breaking-news alerting.","category":"research","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"*/30 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 30 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["knowledge_base","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-source reliability score (importance trend + failure count), learned topic taxonomy, known-entity list, rolling dedup index."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"research.article.new","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { article_id, title, source, category, importance, published_at, knowledge_base_page_id }. (score \u2265 threshold && < 2h)"},{"id":"p6","type":"connector","label":"Post alert via messaging (rate-limited)","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"p7","type":"action","label":"Update state/seen_articles + daily_stats"},{"id":"p8","type":"event","label":"Emit research.article.new +.breaking"},{"id":"p9","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"p1","target":"p2"},{"source":"p2","target":"p3"},{"source":"p3","target":"p4"},{"source":"p4","target":"p5"},{"source":"p5","target":"p6","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"p5","target":"p7","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"p6","target":"p7"},{"source":"p7","target":"p8"},{"source":"p8","target":"p9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_intake_triage
recipes.description: Poll email for unread mail, classify by sender memory + content, and post a formatted summary to the right messaging channels. Updates sender patterns after every processed message. Default polls every 1 minute — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_intake_triage","title":"Inbox Triage & messaging Routing","description":"Poll email for unread mail, classify by sender memory + content, and post a formatted summary to the right messaging channels. Updates sender patterns after every processed message. recipes.name: uc_notion_tracking

recipes.name: uc_invoice_ingest
recipes.description: Scan Email with multi-strategy queries, extract structured invoice data from body + attachments, dedupe against the SQLite ledger by message ID, insert with `pending` status, and flag low-confidence or high-value extractions for manual review. Idempotent across scans. Default every 4 hours — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_invoice_ingest","title":"Invoice Ingest","description":"Scan Email with multi-strategy queries, extract structured invoice data from body + attachments, dedupe against the SQLite ledger by message ID, insert with `pending` status, and flag low-confidence or high-value extractions for manual review. Idempotent across scans. Default every 4 hours \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Multi-strategy Email invoice detection + structured extraction into the ledger.","category":"operations","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"0 */4 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 4 hours \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["email"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Extractions below `extraction_confidence_threshold` or above the high-value threshold route to manual review. User corrections persist as vendor-pattern memory so the same vendor extracts cleanly next time."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Vendor patterns (sender addresses, subject formats, invoice number formats, typical payment terms). Updated on every new vendor and on user correction. Emitted per new row inserted into the ledger."},{"event_type":"invoice.ingest.review","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { id, vendor, reason (low_confidence|high_value|ambiguous|unparseable), candidate_values }. Emitted when an extraction is held for manual review."}],"error_handling":"Email 401/403 \u2192 halt ingest, Messages notify; uc_payment_monitor continues. 429 \u2192 exponential backoff. Also used for summary formatting."},{"name":"default_payment_terms","type":"enum","options":["Due on receipt","Net 15","Net 30","Net 45","Net 60"],"default":"Net 30","description":"Applied when the invoice has no explicit due date so every record enters the monitoring pipeline with a deadline."},{"name":"high_value_threshold","type":"enum","options":["100","500","1000","5000","10000","None"],"default":"1000","description":"Above this amount, invoices are always flagged for manual review regardless of extraction confidence."}],"sample_input":{"arrival_pattern":"{{param.aq_arrival_pattern}}","primary_currency":"{{param.aq_primary_currency}}","default_payment_terms":"{{param.aq_default_payment_terms}}","high_value_threshold":"{{param.aq_high_value_threshold}}"},"tool_hints":["gmail","personas_database","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"i1","type":"start","label":"Polling tick"},{"id":"i2","type":"action","label":"Load last_scan + vendor patterns"},{"id":"i3","type":"connector","label":"Multi-strategy Email search","connector":"email"},{"id":"i4","type":"action","label":"Dedupe by message ID"},{"id":"i5","type":"action","label":"Extract structured data + assign confidence"},{"id":"i6","type":"decision","label":"Confidence \u2265 threshold AND amount < high-value?"},{"id":"i7","type":"action","label":"Insert pending row"},{"id":"i8","type":"action","label":"Insert + flag for manual review"},{"id":"i9","type":"action","label":"Save vendor pattern + update last_scan"},{"id":"i10","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"i1","target":"i2"},{"source":"i2","target":"i3"},{"source":"i3","target":"i4"},{"source":"i4","target":"i5"},{"source":"i5","target":"i6"},{"source":"i6","target":"i7","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"i6","target":"i8","variant":"no","label":"No \u2192 review"},{"source":"i7","target":"i9"},{"source":"i8","target":"i9"},{"source":"i9","target":"i10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_payment_monitor
recipes.description: Daily sweep that transitions past-due pending invoices to overdue, sends upcoming-payment reminders within the configured lead-time window, and delivers aging-bucketed overdue alerts respecting the alert-frequency cap. On the 1st of the month, adds a monthly summary (processed / paid / outstanding / vendor breakdown). Default daily 9:00 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_payment_monitor","title":"Payment Monitor","description":"Daily sweep that transitions past-due pending invoices to overdue, sends upcoming-payment reminders within the configured lead-time window, and delivers aging-bucketed overdue alerts respecting the alert-frequency cap. On the 1st of the month, adds a monthly summary (processed / paid / outstanding / vendor breakdown). Default daily 9:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Daily overdue sweep + upcoming reminders + aging-bucket overdue alerts + monthly summary.","category":"notifications","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 9:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Last-alert timestamp per overdue invoice so the configured `overdue_alert_frequency_hours` gate isn't breached. Emitted per transition during the overdue sweep."},{"event_type":"payment.overdue.alert","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { count, total_amount, aging_brackets: { '1-7', '8-30', '30+' } }. Emitted when the daily alert fires (respecting frequency cap)."},{"event_type":"payment.upcoming.reminder","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { within_window_count, total_amount, groupings: { tomorrow, this_week, within_window } }. Emitted when upcoming-due reminders are delivered."},{"event_type":"invoice.summary.monthly","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { month, total_processed, total_paid, total_outstanding, vendor_breakdown, avg_days_to_payment }.
