recipes.name: uc_monthly_deep_audit
recipes.description: Everything the weekly audit does, plus a cross-article contradiction pass over compiled wiki articles (title family clustering + body disagreement detection). More expensive than the weekly pass; opt-in. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default first-of-month 8am.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_monthly_deep_audit","title":"Monthly Deep Audit","description":"Everything the weekly audit does, plus a cross-article contradiction pass over compiled wiki articles (title family clustering + body disagreement detection). More expensive than the weekly pass; opt-in. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default first-of-month 8am.","capability_summary":"Monthly deep pass: weekly audit + cross-article contradiction detection over compiled wiki articles.","category":"maintenance","enabled_by_default":false,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 1 * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default 1st-of-month 8:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["codebase"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"All findings (including contradiction pairs) go through manual_review. recipes.name: uc_weekly_health_audit
recipes.description: Run all three audit modes (persona memories, vector KBs, optional Obsidian vault), cap findings per category, queue every issue via manual_review with severity + recommended action, deliver a single checklist summary, and persist trend totals. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Sunday 8am.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_health_audit","title":"Weekly Health Audit","description":"Run all three audit modes (persona memories, vector KBs, optional Obsidian vault), cap findings per category, queue every issue via manual_review with severity + recommended action, deliver a single checklist summary, and persist trend totals. The human decides merge / archive / recompile / reduce-importance \u2014 the persona never mutates any layer."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Trend totals per run (issues by layer and severity). recipes.name: uc_evening_complete
recipes.description: Detects articles whose Review Status changed to Reviewed since the last run, updates Last Reviewed and Next Due in knowledge base based on each article's frequency, and posts messaging completion shoutouts. Default weekdays 5 PM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

recipes.name: uc_morning_assign
recipes.description: Scans the knowledge base KB for articles due for review, picks reviewers from a rotation (respecting caps and Reviewer Override), sends email reminders, and posts a messaging summary. Default weekdays 9 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_morning_assign","title":"Morning Assignment Scan","description":"Scans the knowledge base KB for articles due for review, picks reviewers from a rotation (respecting caps and Reviewer Override), sends email reminders, and posts a messaging summary. recipes.name: uc_overdue_reminder
recipes.description: Detects In-Review articles whose assignment timestamp is >48h old, sends staged follow-ups (gentle at 48-72h, urgent at 72-96h, manager escalation >96h), and records reminder counts in state. Default weekdays 9 AM (part of morning pass) — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_overdue_reminder","title":"Overdue Reminder","description":"Detects In-Review articles whose assignment timestamp is >48h old, sends staged follow-ups (gentle at 48-72h, urgent at 72-96h, manager escalation >96h), and records reminder counts in state. recipes.name: uc_alert
recipes.description: Event-listen on `sales.lead.captured` where score ≥ `alert_threshold`. Posts rich formatted messaging layout notification with score breakdown, buying signals, and CRM deep-link. For On Fire leads, additionally DMs the assigned rep with full context and suggested talk track.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_alert","title":"Sales Alert","description":"Event-listen on `sales.lead.captured` where score \u2265 `alert_threshold`. recipes.name: uc_intake
recipes.description: Receives form tool submissions (webhook primary, polling safety net). Dedups against `processed_responses.json`, scores 0-100 on the 4-factor model calibrated to `sales_motion`, classifies tier, updates/creates CRM record with touchpoints counter. Default webhook + 2-minute polling safety net — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_intake","title":"Submission Intake & Scoring","description":"Receives form tool submissions (webhook primary, polling safety net). Dedups against `processed_responses.json`, scores 0-100 on the 4-factor model calibrated to `sales_motion`, classifies tier, updates/creates CRM record with touchpoints counter. Default webhook + 2-minute polling safety net \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Webhook+poll intake with contextual scoring and CRM upsert.","category":"intake","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"webhook","config":{"source":"typeform","event":"form_response"},"description":"Default webhook (immediate) with a 2-minute polling safety net \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["forms","crm"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Processed-response ledger (`data/processed_responses.json`) keyed by form tool response_id. recipes.name: uc_welcome
recipes.description: Event-listen on `sales.lead.captured`. Drafts and sends a tier-appropriate personalized welcome email via email. Cold/Warm = resource-focused low-pressure. Hot = value-prop with soft call CTA. On Fire = personal from assigned rep with direct calendar link. `welcome_email_gate` may hold certain tiers pending human approval before send.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_welcome","title":"Personalized Welcome Email","description":"Event-listen on `sales.lead.captured`. recipes.name: uc_lean_sweep
recipes.description: Runs the configured static-analysis CLI in the registered codebase, parses the JSON report, creates backlog ideas for each finding, deduplicates against prior sweeps, and posts a one-line summary. Default cadence is daily 8am — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step (post-commit and manual triggers also supported).
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_lean_sweep","title":"Lean Sweep","description":"Runs the configured static-analysis CLI in the registered codebase, parses the JSON report, creates backlog ideas for each finding, deduplicates against prior sweeps, and posts a one-line summary. recipes.name: uc_watchlist_sweep
recipes.description: Periodic sweep of every LinkedIn company in the watchlist. Calls Bright Data's structured LinkedIn dataset, diffs against per-company snapshot, scores meaningful changes, ships score-≥ threshold alerts in real time. Cadence default 6h.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_watchlist_sweep","title":"LinkedIn Watchlist Sweep","description":"Periodic sweep of every LinkedIn company in the watchlist. Calls Bright Data's structured LinkedIn dataset, diffs against per-company snapshot, scores meaningful changes, ships score-\u2265 threshold alerts in real time. Cadence default 6h.","capability_summary":"Bright Data LinkedIn sweep + per-company diff + importance scoring + rate-limited real-time alerting.","category":"research","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 */6 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 6 hours \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["bright_data","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-company change history, learned which change types signal what for the user's watch_intent (competitive vs prospecting), rate-limit window state."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"linkedin.change.detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { change_id, company, change_type, importance, summary, detected_at, source }. Consumed by uc_weekly_digest."},{"event_type":"linkedin.alert.fired","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { change_id, company, importance, channel, posted_at }. Audit trail for delivered real-time alerts."}],"error_handling":"See persona.error_handling. Tells the persona which change types to weight."},{"name":"alert_threshold","type":"enum","options":["3","4","5"],"default":"4","description":"Minimum importance score to trigger a real-time messaging alert. Below-threshold changes flow to the weekly digest."},{"name":"max_alerts_per_hour","type":"enum","options":["3","5","10"],"default":"5","description":"Sliding-window rate limit for real-time messaging alerts. Excess is queued to the weekly digest."}],"sample_input":{"linkedin_companies":"{{param.aq_linkedin_companies}}","watch_intent":"{{param.aq_watch_intent}}","alert_threshold":"{{param.aq_alert_threshold}}","max_alerts_per_hour":"{{param.aq_max_alerts_per_hour}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"Sweep tick"},{"id":"s2","type":"action","label":"Read linkedin_companies + per-company snapshots"},{"id":"s3","type":"connector","label":"POST Bright Data LinkedIn dataset trigger","connector":"bright_data"},{"id":"s4","type":"action","label":"Poll /snapshot/<id> until ready (or fall back to Web Unlocker)"},{"id":"s5","type":"action","label":"Diff response against snapshot + score changes"},{"id":"s6","type":"decision","label":"Importance \u2265 threshold && <7d?"},{"id":"s7","type":"connector","label":"Post messaging alert (rate-limited)","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"s8","type":"action","label":"Append to sweep_log + update snapshot"},{"id":"s9","type":"end","label":"Emit linkedin.change.detected per change"}],"edges":[{"from":"s1","to":"s2"},{"from":"s2","to":"s3"},{"from":"s3","to":"s4"},{"from":"s4","to":"s5"},{"from":"s5","to":"s6"},{"from":"s6","to":"s7","label":"yes"},{"from":"s6","to":"s8","label":"no"},{"from":"s7","to":"s8"},{"from":"s8","to":"s9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_weekly_digest
recipes.description: Aggregates every change detected over the past 7 days. Groups by company, ranks within by importance, calls out cross-company patterns (e.g., '3 competitors hired senior MLEs this week'). Default Monday 9am.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_digest","title":"Weekly Watchlist Digest","description":"Aggregates every change detected over the past 7 days. recipes.name: uc_discovery
recipes.description: Discovery run for a given niche + location + max_results. Searches Google Maps and cross-references directories, deduplicates, quick-checks websites, tiers prospects, persists results, and delivers the lead list. Default manual / on-demand — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

recipes.name: uc_pipeline_management
recipes.description: Weekly review of the full prospect database. Computes status distribution and conversion rate, re-checks websites for prospects in `new` or `contacted` status older than 7 days, updates tier when score changes, and delivers a pipeline status summary. Default Monday 8am — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

recipes.name: uc_confidence_digest
recipes.description: Scores every flagged market on composite confidence (price, news, orderbook, memory), applies calibration from past reviews, compiles the combined intelligence digest, and delivers via email. Presents findings for review; memory tightens next day's filter. Default daily 07:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_confidence_digest","title":"Confidence Digest","description":"Scores every flagged market on composite confidence (price, news, orderbook, memory), applies calibration from past reviews, compiles the combined intelligence digest, and delivers via email. recipes.name: uc_market_watch
recipes.description: Scans Kalshi for newly listed markets and anomaly patterns (rapid probability shifts, YES+NO spread deviations, extreme initial pricing). Fetches orderbook depth for flagged markets to distinguish signal from noise. Default daily 07:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_market_watch","title":"Market Anomaly Watch","description":"Scans Kalshi for newly listed markets and anomaly patterns (rapid probability shifts, YES+NO spread deviations, extreme initial pricing). recipes.name: uc_news_correlation

recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_news_correlation","title":"News Correlation","description":"For each flagged market from the anomaly watch, queries News API (or web_search fallback) for contextualizing articles. recipes.name: uc_calendar_watch
recipes.description: Polls calendar during work hours, sends contextual prep emails 30 min before meetings, and posts 'in-meeting' status to the messaging channel when meetings start. Maintains per-event state to prevent duplicate actions. Default polling every 15 min during 09:00-17:00 weekdays — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_calendar_watch","title":"Calendar Watch","description":"Polls calendar during work hours, sends contextual prep emails 30 min before meetings, and posts 'in-meeting' status to the messaging channel when meetings start. recipes.name: uc_post_meeting_followup
recipes.description: After each meeting ends, prompts the user for notes and action items, drafts a follow-up email (routed through manual review for meetings with > 2 attendees), distributes to all attendees, and clears the messaging custom status.

recipes.name: uc_curate_issue
recipes.description: Fetch configured RSS feeds and web sources, deduplicate against past issues, score and select top articles, group into thematic sections, write editorial commentary, assemble responsive HTML, pass through human review, and deliver via SMTP to the subscriber list.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_curate_issue","title":"Newsletter Issue Curation","description":"Fetch configured RSS feeds and web sources, deduplicate against past issues, score and select top articles, group into thematic sections, write editorial commentary, assemble responsive HTML, pass through human review, and deliver via SMTP to the subscriber list.","capability_summary":"Scan -> score -> select -> write -> assemble -> review -> deliver.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * 1","timezone":"UTC"},"description":"Default weekly \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step. recipes.name: uc_deadline_check
recipes.description: Scans all active onboarding checklists for upcoming / due-today / overdue tasks, dispatches targeted reminders with three-tier escalation (assignee → manager CC → HR manual review), detects milestone transitions and 90-day completions. Default weekday 8 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_deadline_check","title":"Deadline Check","description":"Scans all active onboarding checklists for upcoming / due-today / overdue tasks, dispatches targeted reminders with three-tier escalation (assignee \u2192 manager CC \u2192 HR manual review), detects milestone transitions and 90-day completions. Default weekday 8 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Tiered reminders with milestone/completion detection across active checklists.","category":"hr","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * 1-5","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default weekday 8:00 AM local \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["knowledge_base"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"built-in","description":"Deadline reminders targeted by role (HR/IT/manager/new hire)"},{"type":"built-in","description":"Milestone celebrations and 90-day completion announcements"}],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Overdue alert #3 escalates to HR via manual_review. recipes.name: uc_weekly_progress_report

recipes.name: uc_enrichment_pipeline

Default every 15 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

recipes.name: uc_anomaly_escalation
recipes.description: Scores each flagged transaction (amount, unknown merchant, unusual hour, foreign currency, duplicate). High severity (≥5) routes to the messaging channel + email with recommended actions; standard severity to the messaging channel only. User-whitelisted merchants are never escalated. Fires in real time as uc_transaction_sync emits flagged charges.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_anomaly_escalation","title":"Anomaly Escalation","description":"Scores each flagged transaction (amount, unknown merchant, unusual hour, foreign currency, duplicate). High severity (\u22655) routes to the messaging channel + email with recommended actions; standard severity to the messaging channel only. User-whitelisted merchants are never escalated. Fires in real time as uc_transaction_sync emits flagged charges.","capability_summary":"Severity-tiered escalation of flagged charges with user whitelist and memory.","category":"review","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"finance.transaction.anomalous"},"description":"Fires on every flagged transaction from uc_transaction_sync. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["messaging","email"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"High-severity escalations include a review decision (genuine fraud | known legitimate charge). User whitelist in `merchant_history.json`. Learns patterns: which merchants are always-safe, which hours typically see legit charges, which foreign-currency chains are recurring (travel etc.)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"finance.transaction.anomalous","direction":"listen","description":"Flagged transaction incoming from uc_transaction_sync."},{"event_type":"finance.anomaly.escalated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: transaction_id, severity_score, channels_notified[]. One line or one comma-separated list."},{"name":"escalation_mode","type":"enum","options":["alert_only","pause_sync_on_high","auto_draft_dispute","repeat_pattern_only"],"default":"alert_only","description":"What the agent does on a high-severity flag. recipes.name: uc_transaction_sync
recipes.description: Pulls new transactions from finance platform, categorizes each, writes rows to the spreadsheet ledger, and updates the monthly budget totals. Flags anomalous charges and emits budget-threshold events when 80% or 100% lines are crossed. Default daily 07:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_transaction_sync","title":"Transaction Sync & Ledger","description":"Pulls new transactions from finance platform, categorizes each, writes rows to the spreadsheet ledger, and updates the monthly budget totals. recipes.name: uc_weekly_summary

Delivers condensed messaging summary + detailed HTML email report. Default Monday 08:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_summary","title":"Weekly Spending Summary","description":"Compiles the past week's transactions from Sheets. recipes.name: uc_meeting_prep
recipes.description: Detect external meetings in the next 48 hours, enrich each attendee via LinkedIn + email history, build behavioral profiles, and write a structured knowledge base prep page. Skip internal-only meetings. Use the 14-day profile cache to avoid redundant enrichment. Default poll every 10 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_meeting_prep","title":"Meeting Prep","description":"Detect external meetings in the next 48 hours, enrich each attendee via LinkedIn + email history, build behavioral profiles, and write a structured knowledge base prep page. recipes.name: uc_post_feedback
recipes.description: After each prepped meeting's end time, send a 1-4 rating prompt via messaging. Store the rating and notes. Feed repeated misclassifications into the calibration ledger so next week's classifiers sharpen. Default every 15 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_post_feedback","title":"Post-Meeting Feedback","description":"After each prepped meeting's end time, send a 1-4 rating prompt via messaging. Store the rating and notes. Feed repeated misclassifications into the calibration ledger so next week's classifiers sharpen. Default every 15 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"1-4 rating capture + memory-tuned calibration of future profiling.","category":"review","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/15 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 15 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"User replies with 1 (not useful) \u2192 4 (game-changer), plus optional freeform notes. Every rating persists; 3+ misclassifications of the same dimension tighten that classifier's evidence threshold."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`prep_feedback.json` per meeting id. `classification_calibration.json` rolling per-dimension accuracy."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"sales.prep.feedback","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { meeting_id, rating, notes }. Consumed by downstream coaching analytics."}],"error_handling":"Messaging failure on the rating prompt \u2192 queue in pending_messages.json; retry once. recipes.name: uc_prebrief_reminder
recipes.description: Monitor prepped meetings and deliver a one-liner T-30 brief via the messaging channel with primary style, lead action, key avoidance, and knowledge base link. Default minute-polling so delivery lands within one minute of T-30 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_prebrief_reminder","title":"Pre-Meeting Reminder","description":"Monitor prepped meetings and deliver a one-liner T-30 brief via the messaging channel with primary style, lead action, key avoidance, and knowledge base link. Default minute-polling so delivery lands within one minute of T-30 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"T-30 one-line behavioral brief delivered via messaging.","category":"messaging","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"* * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every minute \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["knowledge_base","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"sales.prep.ready","direction":"listen","description":"Listens to prep.ready so only prepped meetings receive reminders."},{"event_type":"sales.prep.reminded","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { meeting_id, delivered_at }. Emitted when the one-liner lands."}],"error_handling":"Messaging failure \u2192 queue in pending_messages.json, retry once; if T-30 has passed, log as 'missed' and let post-feedback still fire. knowledge base 404 on the linked page \u2192 ship the one-liner with inline attendee summary; flag reviewer.","input_schema":[{"name":"reminder_offset_minutes","type":"enum","options":["15","30","60"],"default":"30","description":"Minutes before meeting start to deliver the reminder."}],"sample_input":{"reminder_offset_minutes":"{{param.aq_reminder_offset}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"Minute tick / sales.prep.ready"},{"id":"r2","type":"action","label":"Find meetings at T-offset"},{"id":"r3","type":"action","label":"Compose one-liner (style + lead + avoid)"},{"id":"r4","type":"connector","label":"Send messaging DM","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"r5","type":"event","label":"Emit sales.prep.reminded"},{"id":"r6","type":"end","label":"Reminder delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"r1","target":"r2"},{"source":"r2","target":"r3"},{"source":"r3","target":"r4"},{"source":"r4","target":"r5"},{"source":"r5","target":"r6"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_daily_briefing
recipes.description: Pulls yesterday's core metrics from the analytics tool, compares against goals + 7d/30d baselines + WoW, flags anomalies, assigns health status, delivers a plain-English briefing. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 8am.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_daily_briefing","title":"Daily Briefing","description":"Pulls yesterday's core metrics from the analytics tool, compares against goals + 7d/30d baselines + WoW, flags anomalies, assigns health status, delivers a plain-English briefing. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 8am.","capability_summary":"Morning product analytics briefing with deltas, anomalies, and health status.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 8:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["analytics"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Briefing ships every day. Anomaly callouts are the only section with a review affordance \u2014 the user tags each as useful / not useful, which feeds the next-run anomaly filter. Red-status days additionally surface via event for optional downstream alerting."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`baselines.json` (4-week rolling), `anomaly_state.json` (currently-flagged metrics for recovery detection), `topic_preferences.json` (user-marked not-useful metric types \u2014 3+ invaluable marks drop the metric from the anomaly section)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"analytics.briefing.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: date, health_status, metrics_snapshot, anomalies[], insights_text. Consumed by uc_longitudinal_log; also available for downstream dashboards."},{"event_type":"analytics.briefing.anomaly_detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: metric_name, severity, delta_pct, comparison_basis, suggested_investigation. Emitted once per flagged anomaly \u2014 downstream alert workflows can subscribe to criticals only."}],"error_handling":"Analytics auth failure \u2192 deliver 'credentials need refresh' briefing; do not skip. Analytics rate limit \u2192 cached baselines with 'stale data' badge. Data quality issue (null/zero on active metric) \u2192 flag separately from product anomalies. Missing goals \u2192 omit goal-progress section with a footer.","input_schema":[{"name":"metric_focus","type":"enum","options":["growth","engagement","revenue","balanced"],"default":"balanced","description":"Which metric family leads the briefing. Growth = DAU/signups/activation; Engagement = session depth + retention; Revenue = conversion + ARPU; Balanced = all core metrics weighted equally."},{"name":"anomaly_sensitivity","type":"enum","options":["conservative","balanced","aggressive"],"default":"balanced","description":"Anomaly detection threshold. Conservative = >25% deviations only. Balanced = >15% (default). Aggressive = >8% to catch early signals."},{"name":"briefing_intent","type":"text","description":"Free-form textarea: your goals for this briefing, what to emphasize, what to suppress, any privacy constraints (e.g., never show absolute revenue). The persona reads this at each run."}],"sample_input":{"metric_focus":"{{param.aq_metric_focus}}","anomaly_sensitivity":"{{param.aq_anomaly_sensitivity}}","briefing_intent":"{{param.aq_briefing_intent}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"b1","type":"start","label":"Daily tick"},{"id":"b2","type":"action","label":"Load baselines + preferences + briefing_intent"},{"id":"b3","type":"connector","label":"Fetch T-1 + 7d + 30d metrics","connector":"analytics_tool"},{"id":"b4","type":"action","label":"Compute deltas (vs goal / 7d / 30d / WoW)"},{"id":"b5","type":"action","label":"Flag anomalies + detect recoveries + health status"},{"id":"b6","type":"action","label":"Compose + deliver briefing via Messages"},{"id":"b7","type":"event","label":"Emit analytics.briefing.delivered"},{"id":"b8","type":"event","label":"Emit analytics.briefing.anomaly_detected per flag"},{"id":"b9","type":"end","label":"Briefing delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"b1","target":"b2"},{"source":"b2","target":"b3"},{"source":"b3","target":"b4"},{"source":"b4","target":"b5"},{"source":"b5","target":"b6"},{"source":"b6","target":"b7"},{"source":"b7","target":"b8"},{"source":"b8","target":"b9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_longitudinal_log
recipes.description: Writes each delivered briefing to the user's knowledge base (knowledge base or Obsidian) as a structured record — enables search across time ('every red day this quarter', 'when did DAU last spike?'). Event-chained on `analytics.briefing.delivered`.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_longitudinal_log","title":"Longitudinal Log","description":"Writes each delivered briefing to the user's knowledge base (knowledge base or Obsidian) as a structured record \u2014 enables search across time ('every red day this quarter', 'when did DAU last spike?'). Emitted after the KB write succeeds."}],"error_handling":"KB connector unavailable or throwing 401/403 \u2192 queue the entry in `pending_log.json`; retry on the next successful briefing. recipes.name: uc_scan_and_enrich
recipes.description: Weekly scan across configured email senders. Extracts URLs, enriches each via web fetch (with web_search fallback), classifies into new_connector / api_version / tooling, computes relevance from topic-preference memory. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default weekly Saturday 3pm.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_scan_and_enrich","title":"Scan & Enrich Implementation Opportunities","description":"Scheduled scan for real implementation opportunities (new connectors/integrations, API & SDK version updates, notable tooling) relevant to the bound codebase's tech stack. PRIMARY source is web research: read the codebase to learn the stack (package.json / Cargo.toml / imports), then search GitHub releases, project changelogs, release notes, and the web for relevant updates. If an email connector is also connected, additionally scan configured senders' newsletters/release emails. Enriches each candidate, classifies into new_connector / api_version / tooling, dedups against memory, and produces candidates for human triage. Always delivers from web research even with no inbox. EMAIL SCAN (when relevant): the user's Gmail is reachable directly via the MCP tools `mcp__personas__gmail_list_messages` (args: {query, max_results} — e.g. query 'newer_than:7d category:promotions OR from:noreply' for vendor/release mail) and `mcp__personas__gmail_get_message` (args: {message_id, format:'metadata'|'full'}) — these read the connected Gmail through the vault credential with NO interactive auth and NO API key. Use them to pull recent vendor newsletters / release emails as an ADDITIONAL opportunity source alongside web research. If gmail_list_messages reports no Gmail credential, skip email and rely on web research.","capability_summary":"Codebase-grounded web scan (GitHub releases, changelogs, web) for implementation opportunities; optional email enrichment. Produces triage candidates.","category":"research","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 15 * * 6","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default Saturday 3:00 PM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Seen-URL dedup set keyed by normalized URL. Topic-preference ratings per category, updated by uc_triage decisions. Last-scan timestamp per sender (so re-runs don't reprocess old mail)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"scout.opportunity.discovered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { candidate_id, title, category, source_url, source_email_subject, enrichment_summary, relevance, estimated_effort }. Consumed by uc_triage."}],"error_handling":"Email connector absent/unauthenticated → SKIP email and deliver from web research alone (this is NOT a failure — never report precondition_failed just because email isn't connected). Codebase absent → research opportunities for the stack hinted in input focus_topics, or general high-signal dev tooling. Dead URL → single web_search fallback, skip if still empty. Per-candidate exceptions → log and continue. Only precondition_failed if BOTH web_search/http_request are unavailable AND no codebase — i.e. genuinely no way to research.","input_schema":[{"name":"target_codebase","type":"connector_ref","ui_component":"CodebaseSelector","connector":"codebase","required":false,"description":"Optional. The codebase whose tech stack scopes the opportunity search (so results are relevant to what you actually build). If unset, falls back to focus_topics."},{"name":"focus_topics","type":"text","required":false,"description":"Comma-separated topics/stack to scope the search when no codebase is bound (e.g. \"Next.js, Stripe, SQLite, OAuth\"). Used as the search seed."},{"name":"enrichment_depth","type":"enum","options":["shallow","medium","deep"],"default":"medium","description":"Shallow = fetch the linked page only. Medium = + check GitHub repo stars/activity. Deep = + check for an existing Personas connector for the service + community reviews."},{"name":"senders","type":"text","required":false,"description":"Optional. Comma-separated email sender allowlist — only used if an email connector is connected."}],"sample_input":{"target_codebase":"{{param.aq_target_codebase}}","focus_topics":"{{param.aq_focus_topics}}","enrichment_depth":"{{param.aq_enrichment_depth}}","senders":"{{param.aq_senders}}"},"tool_hints":["web_search","http_request","search_code","file_read","file_write","mcp__personas__gmail_list_messages","mcp__personas__gmail_get_message"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"s1","type":"start","label":"Scheduled tick"},{"id":"s2","type":"connector","label":"Read codebase to learn the stack (or use focus_topics)","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"s3","type":"action","label":"Web search: GitHub releases / changelogs / updates for that stack"},{"id":"s4","type":"connector","label":"Scan Gmail via mcp__personas__gmail_list_messages (if connected)","connector":"email"},{"id":"s5","type":"action","label":"Dedup against seen-URL memory"},{"id":"s6","type":"action","label":"Enrich + classify (new_connector / api_version / tooling) + relevance"},{"id":"s7","type":"event","label":"Emit scout.opportunity.discovered per candidate"},{"id":"s8","type":"end","label":"Candidates ready for triage"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5"},{"source":"s5","target":"s6"},{"source":"s6","target":"s7"},{"source":"s7","target":"s8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_triage
recipes.description: Presents each discovered candidate to the human for accept/reject. Accepted items emit to downstream implementation agents; rejected items capture a reason and train topic preferences. Event-chained on `scout.opportunity.discovered`.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_triage","title":"Triage","description":"Presents each discovered candidate to the human for accept/reject. Accepted items emit to downstream implementation agents; rejected items capture a reason and train topic preferences. Event-chained on `scout.opportunity.discovered`.","capability_summary":"Human accept/reject per candidate, with memory-trained relevance scoring.","category":"review","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"scout.opportunity.discovered"},"description":"Fires whenever uc_scan_and_enrich surfaces a candidate. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every candidate is presented before it enters any downstream workflow. Accept/reject decisions + optional rejection reasons persist as memory keyed by (category, topic)."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Topic-preference ledger \u2014 category acceptance rates over time. Rejection reason histograms for pattern analysis."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"scout.opportunity.discovered","direction":"listen","description":"Source: uc_scan_and_enrich."},{"event_type":"scout.opportunity.accepted","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { candidate_id, full_record, human_notes? }. Consumed by downstream implementation agents that turn opportunities into backlog items."},{"event_type":"scout.opportunity.rejected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { candidate_id, reason, topic }. Feeds topic-preference memory training."}],"error_handling":"Messages delivery failure \u2192 queue in `pending_triage.json`, retry next cycle. Never auto-reject \u2014 unreviewed candidates age in the queue and surface in the next weekly scan's header with ages.","input_schema":[{"name":"card_verbosity","type":"enum","options":["minimal","standard","full"],"default":"standard","description":"Minimal = title + source + category + accept/reject. Standard = + 2-sentence enrichment + estimated effort. Full = + related existing connectors + GitHub / docs links."}],"sample_input":{"card_verbosity":"{{param.aq_card_verbosity}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"t1","type":"start","label":"scout.opportunity.discovered received"},{"id":"t2","type":"action","label":"Render triage card via Messages"},{"id":"t3","type":"decision","label":"Human accepts?"},{"id":"t4","type":"event","label":"Emit scout.opportunity.accepted"},{"id":"t5","type":"event","label":"Emit scout.opportunity.rejected"},{"id":"t6","type":"action","label":"Update topic preferences + close candidate"},{"id":"t7","type":"end","label":"Awaiting next candidate"}],"edges":[{"source":"t1","target":"t2"},{"source":"t2","target":"t3"},{"source":"t3","target":"t4","variant":"yes","label":"Accept"},{"source":"t3","target":"t5","variant":"no","label":"Reject"},{"source":"t4","target":"t6"},{"source":"t5","target":"t6"},{"source":"t6","target":"t7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_detect_and_post
recipes.description: Query the analytics tool for the latest window, compare against EWMA baselines, classify deviations by severity, and post insight cards via Messages. Tracks signal persistence and recovery across runs. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 9am with optional mid-day recheck.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_detect_and_post","title":"Detect and Post","description":"Query the analytics tool for the latest window, compare against EWMA baselines, classify deviations by severity, and post insight cards via Messages. Tracks signal persistence and recovery across runs. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 9am with optional mid-day recheck.","capability_summary":"Daily anomaly detection with EWMA baselines, severity classification, and persistence tracking.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 9:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["analytics"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Cards ship without review. Zero-event + data-pipeline flags route through review because they could reflect instrumentation drift rather than product reality."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`baselines.json` (per-metric EWMA), `signal_history.json` (day-by-day flag set for persistence detection). 14-run convergence window before baselines are considered stable."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"signal.detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { metric, severity, baseline, current, delta_pct, trend, suggested_investigation, analytics_chart_url }. Emitted when a previously flagged metric returns within normal bounds."}],"error_handling":"Analytics down \u2192 cached baselines + staleness label. Conservative = >25% only. Balanced = >15% (default). Standard = + affected funnel/feature + 1-line hypothesis. recipes.name: uc_ticket_critical
recipes.description: For Critical signals and Warnings persistent for 3+ consecutive runs, open an investigation ticket in the user's ticketing tool. Deduplicates against existing open tickets on the same metric (last 7 days) — comments rather than re-creating. Event-chained on `signal.detected`.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_ticket_critical","title":"Ticket Critical Signals","description":"For Critical signals and Warnings persistent for 3+ consecutive runs, open an investigation ticket in the user's ticketing tool. Deduplicates against existing open tickets on the same metric (last 7 days) \u2014 comments rather than re-creating. Event-chained on `signal.detected`.","capability_summary":"Auto-create investigation tickets for Critical + persistent-Warning signals, with duplicate detection.","category":"automation","enabled_by_default":false,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"signal.detected"},"description":"Fires on each Critical signal + on Warnings that have persisted 3+ consecutive runs. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["ticketing"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Auto-ticketing runs without gate for Critical signals by default. Teams that want approval-before-ticket can switch review_policy to `always` via the approval question."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-metric last-ticket timestamp \u2014 enables 7-day dedup window. Accept/reject of auto-tickets feeds severity-rubric sharpening over time."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"signal.detected","direction":"listen","description":"Source: uc_detect_and_post. Filtered to severity Critical OR (severity Warning AND consecutive_runs >= 3)."},{"event_type":"signal.ticket_opened","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { signal_metric, ticket_id, ticket_url, priority, created_new OR commented_on_existing }. Consumed by downstream reporting / escalation workflows."}],"error_handling":"Ticketing auth failure \u2192 note in a Messages card that ticket creation failed; user can reauthorize. Missing ticketing connector at runtime \u2192 skip silently (capability auto-disables when connector absent).","input_schema":[{"name":"warning_persistence_runs","type":"number","default":3,"min":1,"max":10,"description":"Number of consecutive runs a Warning must persist before it auto-escalates to a ticket. Default false for Critical (fast autonomy); some teams prefer always-approve."}],"sample_input":{"warning_persistence_runs":"{{param.aq_warning_persistence}}","approval_required":"{{param.aq_approval_required}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"c1","type":"start","label":"signal.detected received"},{"id":"c2","type":"decision","label":"Critical OR Warning persistent >= N?"},{"id":"c3","type":"connector","label":"Search for duplicate ticket (7d window)","connector":"ticketing_tool"},{"id":"c4","type":"decision","label":"Duplicate exists?"},{"id":"c5","type":"connector","label":"Comment on existing ticket","connector":"ticketing_tool"},{"id":"c6","type":"connector","label":"Create new ticket (priority from delta)","connector":"ticketing_tool"},{"id":"c7","type":"event","label":"Emit signal.ticket_opened"},{"id":"c8","type":"end","label":"Ticket cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"c1","target":"c2"},{"source":"c2","target":"c3","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"c2","target":"c8","variant":"no","label":"Skip"},{"source":"c3","target":"c4"},{"source":"c4","target":"c5","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"c4","target":"c6","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"c5","target":"c7"},{"source":"c6","target":"c7"},{"source":"c7","target":"c8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_baseline_refresh

Keeps detection thresholds current as business patterns evolve. Default every 6 hours — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_baseline_refresh","title":"Baseline Refresh","description":"Scheduled capability. recipes.name: uc_event_routing
recipes.description: Webhook-driven capability. Parses each Supabase row event, classifies by table + operation, enriches via REST fetches, posts formatted messaging layout cards to topic-specific messaging channels, sends welcome / confirmation emails via email with dedup, and runs inline anomaly detection with severity-tiered alerts. Event-driven; not configurable at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_event_routing","title":"Event Routing & Anomaly Detection","description":"Webhook-driven capability. Parses each Supabase row event, classifies by table + operation, enriches via REST fetches, posts formatted messaging layout cards to topic-specific messaging channels, sends welcome / confirmation emails via email with dedup, and runs inline anomaly detection with severity-tiered alerts. Event-driven; not configurable at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Real-time classify + enrich + route + email + anomaly-scan per Supabase webhook event.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"webhook","config":{"source":"supabase","tables":["users","orders","feature_flags"],"events":["INSERT","UPDATE","DELETE"]},"description":"Supabase database webhook. Event-driven \u2014 not configurable at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["supabase","messaging","email"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"slack","description":"Topic-specific channel routing (#new-signups / #orders / #engineering / #alerts)."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Anomaly severity \u2265 HIGH routes to manual_review when aq_anomaly_review_level is set accordingly. Standard events bypass review."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Learns: peak hours (to damp spike alerts), enterprise domains (accumulated from signups), known-good VIP customer IDs, recurring false-positive signatures (e.g., batch-imported orders that look like spikes)."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"db.user.created","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { clerk_id?, user_id, email_domain_type (standard|enterprise), plan, signup_source }."},{"event_type":"db.order.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { order_id, user_id, total, items_count }."},{"event_type":"db.flag.changed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { flag_name, old_value, new_value, updated_by }."},{"event_type":"db.anomaly.detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { severity, anomaly_type, table, record_snippet, recommendation }."}],"error_handling":"Supabase 401 \u2192 halt + alert. Supabase 404 \u2192 proceed with partial. messaging channel_not_found \u2192 fall back to #ops-alerts. email auth failure \u2192 log critical, do not retry. Duplicate webhook \u2192 use `state/processed_webhook_ids.json` to skip. Malformed payload \u2192 log raw + alert + skip. Unknown table \u2192 log + skip.","input_schema":[{"name":"channel_routing","type":"enum","options":["separate_by_type","separate_by_severity","single_ops_channel","team_specific"],"default":"separate_by_type","description":"How to route messaging notifications. separate_by_type uses distinct channels per event kind; separate_by_severity routes by LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL; single_ops_channel funnels everything into one; team_specific maps to growth / engineering / ops."},{"name":"anomaly_sensitivity","type":"enum","options":["strict","moderate","loose","disabled"],"default":"moderate","description":"Order-value anomaly multiplier. Strict: >2\u00d7 mean. Moderate: >3\u00d7 mean. Loose: >5\u00d7 mean. Disabled turns the detector off."},{"name":"enrichment_depth","type":"enum","options":["minimal","standard","rich","adaptive"],"default":"adaptive","description":"Notification detail. Minimal: event + table + timestamp. Standard: + key fields. Rich: full enriched payload. Adaptive: brief for routine events, rich for anomalies."}],"sample_input":{"channel_routing":"{{param.aq_channel_routing}}","anomaly_sensitivity":"{{param.aq_anomaly_sensitivity}}","enrichment_depth":"{{param.aq_enrichment_depth}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","gmail_send","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"e1","type":"start","label":"Supabase webhook fires"},{"id":"e2","type":"action","label":"Parse + classify (table + operation)"},{"id":"e3","type":"connector","label":"Enrich via Supabase REST","connector":"supabase"},{"id":"e4","type":"decision","label":"Anomaly detected?"},{"id":"e5","type":"connector","label":"Post #alerts card + emit db.anomaly.detected","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"e6","type":"connector","label":"Post to topic channel (signups/orders/engineering)","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"e7","type":"decision","label":"Email-triggering event?"},{"id":"e8","type":"connector","label":"Send welcome / confirmation email","connector":"email"},{"id":"e9","type":"event","label":"Emit db.user.created /.order.completed /.flag.changed"},{"id":"e10","type":"end","label":"Event handled"}],"edges":[{"source":"e1","target":"e2"},{"source":"e2","target":"e3"},{"source":"e3","target":"e4"},{"source":"e4","target":"e5","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"e4","target":"e6","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"e5","target":"e6"},{"source":"e6","target":"e7"},{"source":"e7","target":"e8","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"e7","target":"e9","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"e8","target":"e9"},{"source":"e9","target":"e10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_offer_approval
recipes.description: When a candidate reaches the offer stage, draft the congratulations email and hold it for human review. On approval, dispatch and post a messaging confirmation; on rejection, discard with the reason logged. Never auto-sends.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_offer_approval","title":"Offer Approval & Dispatch","description":"When a candidate reaches the offer stage, draft the congratulations email and hold it for human review. On approval, dispatch and post a messaging confirmation; on rejection, discard with the reason logged. Never auto-sends.","capability_summary":"Draft offer email, route for human approval, dispatch on approval.","category":"recruiting_ops","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"hr.recruiting.offer_ready"},"description":"Fires when uc_stage_transitions detects an offer-stage move. recipes.name: uc_stage_transitions
recipes.description: Poll HR platform for candidate stage changes. For each transition, send the stage-appropriate personalized email (acknowledgment, interview prep, rejection) via email and post a privacy-safe update to the hiring messaging channels. Offer-stage transitions are handed to the offer-approval capability instead of auto-sending. Default polls every 5 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_stage_transitions","title":"Stage Transition Processing","description":"Poll HR platform for candidate stage changes. For each transition, send the stage-appropriate personalized email (acknowledgment, interview prep, rejection) via email and post a privacy-safe update to the hiring messaging channels. Offer-stage transitions are handed to the offer-approval capability instead of auto-sending. Default polls every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Poll HR platform, send stage-appropriate candidate email, post messaging update.","category":"recruiting_ops","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/5 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["hr","email","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Rejection emails are held for human review when the auto_send_rejection flag is off. Interview prep emails are held when a critical field (interviewer name, date) is missing from HR platform."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Candidate stage ledger and send dedup set prevent double-sends across polling cycles. messaging threads map preserves conversation continuity per candidate."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"hr.recruiting.stage_changed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { candidate_id, prior_stage, new_stage, role_title, transition_type, detected_at }. channels."},{"name":"email_tone","type":"enum","options":["warm_conversational","professional_concise","highly_personalized","template_bound"],"default":"warm_conversational","description":"Tone and
