complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"s1","target":"s2"},{"source":"s2","target":"s3"},{"source":"s3","target":"s4"},{"source":"s4","target":"s5","variant":"yes","label":"Offer"},{"source":"s4","target":"s6","variant":"no","label":"Other"},{"source":"s5","target":"s7"},{"source":"s6","target":"s7"},{"source":"s7","target":"s8"},{"source":"s8","target":"s9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_weekly_funnel_report
recipes.description: Compile 7-day recruiting metrics from HR platform — funnel counts, stage conversion rates, time-in-stage, week-over-week deltas. Deliver via the messaging channel + email and archive a snapshot for trend analysis. Default Monday 09:00 local — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_funnel_report","title":"Weekly Funnel Report","description":"Compile 7-day recruiting metrics from HR platform \u2014 funnel counts, stage conversion rates, time-in-stage, week-over-week deltas. Deliver via the messaging channel + email and archive a snapshot for trend analysis. Default Monday 09:00 local \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Weekly HR platform funnel metrics: counts, conversions, trends, delivered to hiring team.","category":"reporting","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default Monday 09:00 local \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["hr","email","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"metrics_history.json stores weekly snapshots \u2014 applications, screens, interviews, offers, acceptances, rejections, conversion rates, avg time-in-stage. Used for week-over-week trend deltas in each new report."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"hr.recruiting.funnel_delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { week_start, applications, screens, interviews, offers, accepted, rejected, pipeline_health }. Emitted after successful messaging + email delivery."}],"error_handling":"HR platform API failure \u2192 generate partial report from cached snapshots, mark incomplete in the header. messaging post failure \u2192 still send email, note messaging delivery failed. Email send failure \u2192 still post to the messaging channel, retry email next hour.","input_schema":[{"name":"retention_policy","type":"enum","options":["30_days","90_days","1_year","indefinite"],"default":"90_days","description":"How long to retain closed-candidate data in metrics_history for re-engagement and compliance reviews."},{"name":"report_recipients","type":"text","default":"recruiting-team@company.com","description":"Distribution list for the emailed weekly report."}],"sample_input":{"retention_policy":"{{param.aq_retention_policy}}","report_recipients":"{{param.aq_report_recipients}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","gmail_send","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"w1","type":"start","label":"Monday 09:00 tick"},{"id":"w2","type":"connector","label":"Fetch 7-day candidate + job data","connector":"greenhouse"},{"id":"w3","type":"action","label":"Compute funnel + conversions + trends"},{"id":"w4","type":"action","label":"Build report"},{"id":"w5","type":"connector","label":"Post to the messaging channel hiring channel","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"w6","type":"connector","label":"Email to recruiting list","connector":"email"},{"id":"w7","type":"action","label":"Archive snapshot"},{"id":"w8","type":"event","label":"Emit hr.recruiting.funnel_delivered"},{"id":"w9","type":"end","label":"Report delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"w1","target":"w2"},{"source":"w2","target":"w3"},{"source":"w3","target":"w4"},{"source":"w4","target":"w5"},{"source":"w5","target":"w6"},{"source":"w6","target":"w7"},{"source":"w7","target":"w8"},{"source":"w8","target":"w9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_digest
recipes.description: Fetch top posts from configured subreddits, dedup against a 30-day seen-posts index, cluster into themes with sentiment labels, assemble messaging-flavored markdown, and post to the configured channel. Default daily 09:00 UTC — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_digest","title":"social platform Trend Digest","description":"Fetch top posts from configured subreddits, dedup against a 30-day seen-posts index, cluster into themes with sentiment labels, assemble messaging-flavored markdown, and post to the configured channel. Default daily 09:00 UTC \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Scheduled social platform \u2192 themed messaging digest with dedup, clustering, sentiment labeling.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * *","timezone":"UTC"},"description":"Default daily 09:00 UTC \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step. Align with the team's morning standup for maximum utility."},"connectors":["social","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"When human_review_enabled is true at adoption, the assembled digest is submitted as manual_review before delivery. Reviewer marks valuable / not valuable; rejection reasons persist in memory under `digest_learning` for tone calibration on future runs. When disabled (default), the digest ships directly."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-run memory entries (subreddits, cluster count, top theme, sentiment skew) plus optional reviewer feedback. Enables trend analysis across digest history and tone calibration when human review is enabled.","learning_threshold":3},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"reddit.digest.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: subreddits, cluster_count, time_window, channel, delivered_at. Emitted after every successful digest delivery. Useful for downstream analytics agents or cross-posters."},{"event_type":"reddit.digest.empty","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: subreddits, time_window. Emitted on a zero-cluster run (the one-line 'no new activity' message still ships)."}],"error_handling":"social platform 429 \u2192 60s backoff + 1 retry, else abort. messaging `channel_not_found` \u2192 draft locally, warn user, do NOT update state. messaging 5xx \u2192 retry once after 10s, then draft fallback. Empty subreddits param \u2192 abort with user_message.","input_schema":[{"name":"subreddits","type":"text","description":"Comma-separated subreddit names (no /r/ prefix). The agent fetches top posts from each on every run."},{"name":"time_window","type":"enum","options":["hour","day","week","month","year","all"],"default":"day","description":"Maps directly to social platform's `t=` query parameter. Match to the digest cadence (daily cron + day window, weekly cron + week window)."},{"name":"posts_per_subreddit","type":"number","default":25,"min":5,"max":100,"description":"Top posts pulled from each subreddit before dedup and clustering. Higher = richer themes, more API budget."},{"name":"max_clusters","type":"number","default":6,"min":1,"max":12,"description":"Max thematic clusters per digest. Agent ships fewer on quiet days \u2014 never pads."},{"name":"slack_channel","type":"text","description":"Target messaging channels (include leading `#`). The bot must already be invited (`/invite @YourBot`)."},{"name":"include_nsfw","type":"boolean","default":false,"description":"Include posts flagged over_18 by social platform. Default off."},{"name":"human_review_enabled","type":"boolean","default":false,"description":"When true, the digest is submitted for manual_review before delivery; rejections persist to memory as tone calibration."}],"sample_input":{"subreddits":"{{param.aq_subreddits}}","time_window":"{{param.aq_time_window}}","posts_per_subreddit":"{{param.aq_posts_per_subreddit}}","max_clusters":"{{param.aq_max_clusters}}","slack_channel":"{{param.aq_slack_channel}}","include_nsfw":"{{param.aq_include_nsfw}}","human_review_enabled":"{{param.aq_human_review_enabled}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"d1","type":"start","label":"Scheduled tick"},{"id":"d2","type":"action","label":"Load seen_posts.json (30-day dedup)"},{"id":"d3","type":"connector","label":"Fetch top posts per subreddit","connector":"social_feed"},{"id":"d4","type":"action","label":"Dedup + filter NSFW/stickied + score + cluster"},{"id":"d5","type":"action","label":"Synthesize themes + sentiment + assemble messaging markdown"},{"id":"d6","type":"connector","label":"POST to the messaging channel (unfurl disabled)","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"d7","type":"action","label":"Update seen_posts + prune >30d + save memory entry"},{"id":"d8","type":"event","label":"Emit reddit.digest.delivered"},{"id":"d9","type":"end","label":"Digest delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"d1","target":"d2"},{"source":"d2","target":"d3"},{"source":"d3","target":"d4"},{"source":"d4","target":"d5"},{"source":"d5","target":"d6"},{"source":"d6","target":"d7"},{"source":"d7","target":"d8"},{"source":"d8","target":"d9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_source_health
recipes.description: Track per-subreddit fetch health in `state/source_health.json`. After 3 consecutive failures, emit `reddit.source.unhealthy` and include a header line in the next digest recommending removal. Runs inline with uc_digest on every fetch.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_source_health","title":"Source Health Tracker","description":"Track per-subreddit fetch health in `state/source_health.json`. After 3 consecutive failures, emit `reddit.source.unhealthy` and include a header line in the next digest recommending removal. Runs inline with uc_digest on every fetch.","capability_summary":"Per-subreddit failure tracking with unhealthy-source events and header warnings.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event","config":{"event":"reddit.fetch.failed"},"description":"Event-triggered: fires whenever uc_digest records a subreddit fetch failure. Not independently schedulable."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`state/source_health.json` \u2014 per-subreddit `consecutive_failures`, `last_success`, `total_posts_seen`, `last_error_code`."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"reddit.source.unhealthy","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: subreddit, consecutive_failures, last_success, last_error_code. Lets a maintenance agent prune dead subs from the subreddits list."}],"error_handling":"Corrupted source_health.json \u2192 reinitialize empty; source quality history is lost but not critical.","input_schema":[],"sample_input":{},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"h1","type":"start","label":"Fetch failure event"},{"id":"h2","type":"action","label":"Load source_health.json"},{"id":"h3","type":"action","label":"Increment consecutive_failures for the subreddit"},{"id":"h4","type":"decision","label":"Failures >= 3?"},{"id":"h5","type":"event","label":"Emit reddit.source.unhealthy"},{"id":"h6","type":"action","label":"Flag for next-digest header warning"},{"id":"h7","type":"end","label":"Health state updated"}],"edges":[{"source":"h1","target":"h2"},{"source":"h2","target":"h3"},{"source":"h3","target":"h4"},{"source":"h4","target":"h5","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"h4","target":"h7","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"h5","target":"h6"},{"source":"h6","target":"h7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_feed_scanning
recipes.description: Scheduled scan of configured RSS/Atom feeds. Deduplicates, age-filters, and runs each new item through the curation pipeline. Caps per run to keep API usage predictable. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 8am.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_feed_scanning","title":"Feed Scanning","description":"Scheduled scan of configured RSS/Atom feeds. Deduplicates, age-filters, and runs each new item through the curation pipeline. Caps per run to keep API usage predictable. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 8am.","capability_summary":"Daily RSS/Atom feed scan \u2192 batched curation with age + dedup filters.","category":"curation","enabled_by_default":false,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 8 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 8:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["knowledge_base"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Same as manual curation: low-confidence summaries route to manual_review."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Shares state files with uc_manual_curation (processed_urls, taxonomy, graph). Also maintains per-feed yield stats."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"kb.curation.feed_scan_completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { feeds_checked, new_items, duplicates_skipped, age_filtered, pages_created, errors }. Consumed by weekly-maintenance and any downstream reporting."},{"event_type":"kb.curation.page_created","direction":"emit","description":"Same shape as manual-curation emission \u2014 one per page created during the scan."}],"error_handling":"Feed fetch failure \u2192 log error, skip that feed, continue with others. 3+ consecutive failures for the same feed \u2192 include warning in the run summary (feed likely dead). KB rate limit during batch \u2192 slow down + queue overflow. Same partial-page / 404 / non-article rules as manual curation.","input_schema":[{"name":"max_article_age_days","type":"number","default":7,"min":1,"max":90,"description":"Articles older than this from RSS feeds are skipped. Doesn't affect manual URL submission."},{"name":"batch_size","type":"number","default":20,"min":1,"max":100,"description":"Maximum number of new articles to curate per scan. When feeds produce more, the most recent win."},{"name":"feed_urls","type":"text","description":"One RSS/Atom feed URL per line. Seeded from `state/feed_config.json`; can be overridden per run."}],"sample_input":{"max_article_age_days":"{{param.aq_max_article_age}}","batch_size":"{{param.aq_batch_size}}","feed_urls":"{{param.aq_feed_urls}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"f1","type":"start","label":"Daily tick"},{"id":"f2","type":"action","label":"Fetch all configured feeds"},{"id":"f3","type":"action","label":"Dedup + age-filter + cap at batch_size"},{"id":"f4","type":"action","label":"Curate each item (summarize, tag, cross-ref, create page)"},{"id":"f5","type":"event","label":"Emit kb.curation.page_created per page"},{"id":"f6","type":"event","label":"Emit kb.curation.feed_scan_completed"},{"id":"f7","type":"end","label":"Scan delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"f1","target":"f2"},{"source":"f2","target":"f3"},{"source":"f3","target":"f4"},{"source":"f4","target":"f5"},{"source":"f5","target":"f6"},{"source":"f6","target":"f7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_manual_curation
recipes.description: User submits one or more URLs; persona fetches, summarizes, tags, discovers cross-references, and creates a structured KB page for each. Trigger is manual — invoked on demand.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_manual_curation","title":"Manual Curation","description":"User submits one or more URLs; persona fetches, summarizes, tags, discovers cross-references, and creates a structured KB page for each. Trigger is manual \u2014 invoked on demand.","capability_summary":"On-demand URL \u2192 structured KB page with three-tier summary + cross-references.","category":"curation","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 user invokes with one URL, a list, or a pasted batch."},"connectors":["knowledge_base"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Pages with `low` summary_confidence (short abstract, non-English, ambiguous claims) route to manual_review so the user can verify before the page is finalized. High/medium confidence pages ship without gate."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Processed URLs (dedup), taxonomy index (controlled vocab), cross-reference graph. All state files read-merge-write per run."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"kb.curation.page_created","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { page_id, provider, url, title, tags, cross_reference_count, content_type }. Consumed by downstream digest / analytics workflows."},{"event_type":"kb.curation.taxonomy_updated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { new_tag, dimension: domain|method, triggering_page_id }. Emitted when a new tag is added to the controlled taxonomy."}],"error_handling":"Duplicate URL \u2192 ask user before re-processing. Paywall \u2192 partial page with status badge. 404 \u2192 skip + report. Corrupted state \u2192 load `.bak`.","input_schema":[{"name":"urls","type":"text","description":"One or more URLs to curate. Newline-separated for batches."},{"name":"curation_intent","type":"text","description":"Free-form textarea: what taxonomy dimensions matter most, how to weigh entities, what tone for summaries (academic / pragmatic / skeptical). Read at each run."}],"sample_input":{"urls":"","curation_intent":"{{param.aq_curation_intent}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"m1","type":"start","label":"URLs received"},{"id":"m2","type":"action","label":"Validate + dedup-check"},{"id":"m3","type":"action","label":"Fetch page + extract content"},{"id":"m4","type":"action","label":"Summarize (three-tier) + classify + tag"},{"id":"m5","type":"connector","label":"Query KB for cross-references","connector":"knowledge_base"},{"id":"m6","type":"connector","label":"Create KB page","connector":"knowledge_base"},{"id":"m7","type":"action","label":"Update state (processed_urls, taxonomy, graph)"},{"id":"m8","type":"event","label":"Emit kb.curation.page_created + taxonomy_updated if new tag"},{"id":"m9","type":"end","label":"Page(s) curated"}],"edges":[{"source":"m1","target":"m2"},{"source":"m2","target":"m3"},{"source":"m3","target":"m4"},{"source":"m4","target":"m5"},{"source":"m5","target":"m6"},{"source":"m6","target":"m7"},{"source":"m7","target":"m8"},{"source":"m8","target":"m9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_weekly_maintenance
recipes.description: Weekly audit: orphaned-page detection, taxonomy consolidation suggestions, curation stats. Doesn't mutate automatically — surfaces suggestions via Messages for human action. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Friday 6pm.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_maintenance","title":"Weekly Maintenance","description":"Weekly audit: orphaned-page detection, taxonomy consolidation suggestions, curation stats. Doesn't mutate automatically \u2014 surfaces suggestions via Messages for human action. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Friday 6pm.","capability_summary":"Weekly KB health report: orphans, taxonomy suggestions, stats.","category":"maintenance","enabled_by_default":false,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 18 * * 5","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default Friday 6:00 PM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["knowledge_base"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Maintenance suggestions are informational \u2014 the user applies merges manually. No auto-mutation."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Maintenance history (orphans over time, taxonomy sprawl metric per week) for trend detection."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"kb.curation.maintenance_report","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { orphan_count, near_duplicate_tag_pairs, stats: { pages_this_week, tags_added, cross_refs_created } }."}],"error_handling":"KB query failure \u2192 skip that audit section, note in the summary. State file missing \u2192 initialize empty, report.","input_schema":[],"sample_input":{},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"w1","type":"start","label":"Weekly tick"},{"id":"w2","type":"connector","label":"Query KB for all pages + relations","connector":"knowledge_base"},{"id":"w3","type":"action","label":"Detect orphans (zero inbound refs)"},{"id":"w4","type":"action","label":"Audit taxonomy for near-duplicate tags"},{"id":"w5","type":"action","label":"Compile weekly stats"},{"id":"w6","type":"event","label":"Emit kb.curation.maintenance_report + deliver via Messages"},{"id":"w7","type":"end","label":"Maintenance delivered"}],"edges":[{"source":"w1","target":"w2"},{"source":"w2","target":"w3"},{"source":"w3","target":"w4"},{"source":"w4","target":"w5"},{"source":"w5","target":"w6"},{"source":"w6","target":"w7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_paper_discovery
recipes.description: Query configured academic databases for papers matching keyword groups since the last scan. Dedup across databases, summarize with PMR framework, tag, cross-reference, and index. Flags low-confidence summaries for human review. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 6am.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_paper_discovery","title":"Paper Discovery","description":"Query configured academic databases for papers matching keyword groups since the last scan. Dedup across databases, summarize with PMR framework, tag, cross-reference, and index. Flags low-confidence summaries for human review. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default daily 6am.","capability_summary":"Daily multi-source academic discovery with PMR summaries and cross-references.","category":"research","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 6 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily 6:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"High/medium confidence summaries are indexed directly. Low-confidence (missing abstract, non-English, very short, ambiguous claims) route to manual_review. Retractions are auto-flagged and excluded from trend analysis."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`paper_index.json` (normalized paper records), `scan_state.json` (per-database timestamps), `keyword_groups.json` (query config). Three-run convergence before trend lines are considered stable."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"research.paper.indexed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { id, title, topic_tags, relevance_score, summary_confidence, keyword_group }. Emitted per paper added to the index."},{"event_type":"research.scan.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { databases_queried, keyword_groups, papers_found, papers_indexed, duplicates_skipped, filtered_below_threshold }. Emitted once per run."}],"error_handling":"Per-database failure \u2192 skip that DB, continue with others. Empty abstract \u2192 low confidence + review flag. Corrupted index \u2192 load backup or reinit with alert.","input_schema":[{"name":"keyword_groups","type":"textarea","description":"One group per line in the form 'group_name: term1, term2, term3'. Each group will be run against every enabled database. E.g. `transformer_architectures: transformer, attention mechanism, self-attention`."},{"name":"enabled_databases","type":"enum","options":["arxiv_only","pubmed_only","arxiv_pubmed","all"],"default":"all","description":"Which academic databases to query. arXiv strong for CS/Physics/Math; PubMed for biomedical; Semantic Scholar for broad coverage + citation data."},{"name":"min_relevance_score","type":"number","default":0.6,"min":0.1,"max":0.95,"description":"Papers below this score are discarded. Score = keyword overlap between abstract and group terms, IDF-weighted. Lower = wider net."},{"name":"max_papers_per_scan","type":"number","default":50,"min":5,"max":200,"description":"Batch cap across all keyword groups per run. Prevents runaway processing when a broad group returns hundreds."}],"sample_input":{"keyword_groups":"{{param.aq_keyword_groups}}","enabled_databases":"{{param.aq_enabled_databases}}","min_relevance_score":0.6,"max_papers_per_scan":50},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"p1","type":"start","label":"Daily tick"},{"id":"p2","type":"action","label":"Load keyword groups + scan state + index"},{"id":"p3","type":"action","label":"Query arXiv / PubMed / Semantic Scholar per group"},{"id":"p4","type":"action","label":"Dedup across DBs + apply relevance threshold + cap"},{"id":"p5","type":"action","label":"Extract metadata + generate PMR summary + tag + score"},{"id":"p6","type":"decision","label":"Summary confidence high/medium?"},{"id":"p7","type":"action","label":"Write to index + build cross-references"},{"id":"p8","type":"action","label":"Flag for manual_review (keep in index, excluded from trends)"},{"id":"p9","type":"event","label":"Emit research.paper.indexed per paper"},{"id":"p10","type":"event","label":"Emit research.scan.completed"},{"id":"p11","type":"end","label":"Scan complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"p1","target":"p2"},{"source":"p2","target":"p3"},{"source":"p3","target":"p4"},{"source":"p4","target":"p5"},{"source":"p5","target":"p6"},{"source":"p6","target":"p7","variant":"yes","label":"High/Med"},{"source":"p6","target":"p8","variant":"no","label":"Low"},{"source":"p7","target":"p9"},{"source":"p8","target":"p9"},{"source":"p9","target":"p10"},{"source":"p10","target":"p11"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_trend_analysis
recipes.description: Weekly index maintenance + trend detection. Dedupes preprint→published pairs, refreshes cross-references and citation counts, compares 30-day topic frequencies to the prior 30 to surface rising, new, declining, and consistent topics. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Monday 9am.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_trend_analysis","title":"Trend Analysis","description":"Weekly index maintenance + trend detection. Dedupes preprint\u2192published pairs, refreshes cross-references and citation counts, compares 30-day topic frequencies to the prior 30 to surface rising, new, declining, and consistent topics. Cadence is managed at the trigger-composition step; default Monday 9am.","capability_summary":"Weekly maintenance + research trend report (rising / new / declining topics).","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default Monday 9:00 AM \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Shares `paper_index.json` with uc_paper_discovery. Maintains `trend_history.json` for longitudinal comparison; weekly snapshots persist indefinitely."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"research.trends.detected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { rising_topics[], new_topics[], declining_topics[], consistent_topics[], period, representative_papers }."},{"event_type":"research.index.maintained","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { duplicate_merges, cross_ref_updates, citation_refreshes, total_papers, total_topics }."}],"error_handling":"Dedup audit Jaccard ambiguity (near-threshold) \u2192 keep both papers, flag pair for manual_review. Citation-count refresh failure \u2192 skip the refresh step, proceed with current counts. recipes.name: uc_alert_and_outreach
recipes.description: Event-driven: on threshold crossings posts contextual messaging alerts (channel + owner DM) and drafts personalized email outreach (retention for churn, consultative upgrade for expansion) with 14-day suppression. Persists predictions and outreach to memory for monthly reconciliation.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_alert_and_outreach","title":"Alert & Outreach","description":"Event-driven: on threshold crossings posts contextual messaging alerts (channel + owner DM) and drafts personalized email outreach (retention for churn, consultative upgrade for expansion) with 14-day suppression. recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_monthly_calibration","title":"Monthly Revenue Report & Calibration","description":"Compiles the month's MRR waterfall from Stripe, health distribution from local state, and prediction accuracy from the log. recipes.name: uc_payment_event_scan
recipes.description: Polls Stripe for payment events, enriches with CRM customer context, computes churn risk and expansion readiness scores, and detects threshold crossings. Emits downstream events for alerting and outreach. Default every 5 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_payment_event_scan","title":"Payment Event Scan & Scoring","description":"Polls Stripe for payment events, enriches with CRM customer context, computes churn risk and expansion readiness scores, and detects threshold crossings. Emits downstream events for alerting and outreach. Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Short-interval Stripe polling with CRM enrichment and composite scoring.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"*/5 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["stripe","crm"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`account_health.json` \u2014 current scores, status, and history per account. recipes.name: uc_daily_summary

recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_daily_summary","title":"Daily Revenue Summary","description":"Compiles yesterday's revenue from Stripe balance transactions, enriches with spreadsheet context, computes trends against 7-day and 30-day baselines, and delivers an HTML report with anomaly detection. recipes.name: uc_payment_recovery
recipes.description: Event-driven: on each payment failure, reads customer failure history and sends the tier-appropriate email (friendly → urgent → final). Updates spreadsheet dunning state. Reverses state if a payment succeeds mid-sequence. Stops immediately on cancellation.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_payment_recovery","title":"Payment Recovery Sequence","description":"Event-driven: on each payment failure, reads customer failure history and sends the tier-appropriate email (friendly \u2192 urgent \u2192 final). Updates spreadsheet dunning state. Reverses state if a payment succeeds mid-sequence. Stops immediately on cancellation.","capability_summary":"3-tier escalating dunning sequence with mid-sequence reversal handling.","category":"communication","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"revenue.payment.failed"},"description":"Fires on every payment failure from uc_subscription_sync. Not user-configurable \u2014 event triggers bypass the composition picker."},"connectors":["stripe","spreadsheet","email"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"email","description":"Tier-appropriate dunning emails to the customer with Stripe billing-portal link."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Tier 3 (final warning) can be set to require human approval before sending via the aq_escalation_mode setting. Tiers 1\u20132 always auto-send within suppression windows."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`dunning_state.json` \u2014 per-customer tier + timestamps. Memory learns plans and payment methods with high failure rates \u2014 feeds future alerting."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"revenue.payment.failed","direction":"listen","description":"Failure event incoming from uc_subscription_sync."},{"event_type":"revenue.payment.recovered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: customer_id, tier_at_recovery. Fires when a payment succeeds mid-dunning \u2014 resets state + sends success email."},{"event_type":"revenue.payment.escalated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: customer_id, tier (1|2|3), attempt_count. Fires per tier-3 escalation."}],"error_handling":"email send fail for dunning \u2192 critical; retry once; queue locally on second failure and emit a Slack-equivalent alert. spreadsheet dunning state write fail \u2192 retry; on failure, queue to `pending_airtable_ops.jsonl`. Customer cancels mid-sequence \u2192 stop immediately; mark Canceled in spreadsheet. Payment succeeds mid-sequence \u2192 reset dunning_tier to 0, restore Active, send success email.","input_schema":[{"name":"escalation_mode","type":"enum","options":["auto_send_all_tiers","human_approval_for_tier_3","alert_team_at_tier_2","never_escalate"],"default":"human_approval_for_tier_3","description":"Controls how aggressive the automated recovery is. Tier 3 is the final warning email; human_approval_for_tier_3 means the team reviews the draft before sending."},{"name":"tone","type":"enum","options":["warm_empathetic","direct_urgent","neutral_transactional"],"default":"warm_empathetic","description":"Tone of the dunning email copy generated at each tier."}],"sample_input":{"escalation_mode":"{{param.aq_escalation_mode}}","tone":"{{param.aq_tone}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","gmail_send","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"revenue.payment.failed received"},{"id":"r2","type":"connector","label":"Read failure history from spreadsheet","connector":"spreadsheet"},{"id":"r3","type":"decision","label":"Which tier?"},{"id":"r4","type":"connector","label":"Generate Stripe billing portal link","connector":"stripe"},{"id":"r5","type":"connector","label":"Send tier-appropriate email","connector":"email"},{"id":"r6","type":"connector","label":"Update spreadsheet dunning state","connector":"spreadsheet"},{"id":"r7","type":"event","label":"Emit revenue.payment.escalated (tier 3 only)"},{"id":"r8","type":"end","label":"Recovery step complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"r1","target":"r2"},{"source":"r2","target":"r3"},{"source":"r3","target":"r4","label":"1st / 2nd / 3rd"},{"source":"r4","target":"r5"},{"source":"r5","target":"r6"},{"source":"r6","target":"r7"},{"source":"r7","target":"r8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_subscription_sync
recipes.description: Polls Stripe for subscription and payment events since the last cursor, classifies each, and reconciles the spreadsheet revenue tracker. Emits per-event signals so downstream capabilities (recovery, reporting) can react. Default every 5 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_subscription_sync","title":"Subscription Event Sync","description":"Polls Stripe for subscription and payment events since the last cursor, classifies each, and reconciles the spreadsheet revenue tracker. recipes.name: uc_classify_and_route
recipes.description: Receives webhook payloads, classifies source/event/priority via three-tier logic, loads the matching routing rule, transforms the payload for each destination, and fan-outs. Logs every event for traceability.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_classify_and_route","title":"Classify and Route","description":"Receives webhook payloads, classifies source/event/priority via three-tier logic, loads the matching routing rule, transforms the payload for each destination, and fan-outs. Logs every event for traceability.","capability_summary":"Webhook \u2192 three-tier classify \u2192 rule match \u2192 multi-destination fan-out.","category":"automation","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"webhook","config":{},"description":"Universal webhook endpoint accepting any POST payload. recipes.name: uc_manage_rules

recipes.name: uc_insight_documentation
recipes.description: Take the analysis output, rank findings by potential revenue impact, and compose a structured knowledge base report with executive summary, win/loss patterns, trend analysis, and ranked recommendations. Persist each significant finding as a memory entry so next month's trend detection has data.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_insight_documentation","title":"Insight Documentation","description":"Take the analysis output, rank findings by potential revenue impact, and compose a structured knowledge base report with executive summary, win/loss patterns, trend analysis, and ranked recommendations. Persist each significant finding as a memory entry so next month's trend detection has data.","capability_summary":"knowledge base report + per-finding memory for longitudinal intelligence.","category":"reporting","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 1 * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default monthly on the 1st at 09:00 (shared tick with multidim_analysis) \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["knowledge_base"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-finding memory entries with month + dimension + numbers. recipes.name: uc_multidim_analysis
recipes.description: Query the CRM for closed deals in the analysis window. Run seven-dimension segmentation (size, industry, rep, lead source, stakeholders, cycle length, stage progression), cross-dimensional interaction checks for significant findings, and trend comparison against trailing averages from memory. Flag low-confidence findings for manual review. Default monthly on the 1st at 9am — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_multidim_analysis","title":"Multi-Dimensional Analysis","description":"Query the CRM for closed deals in the analysis window. Run seven-dimension segmentation (size, industry, rep, lead source, stakeholders, cycle length, stage progression), cross-dimensional interaction checks for significant findings, and trend comparison against trailing averages from memory. Flag low-confidence findings for manual review. Default monthly on the 1st at 9am \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"7-dimension win/loss segmentation + cross-dimensional interactions + trend detection against trailing averages.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 1 * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default monthly on the 1st at 09:00 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["crm"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Findings below minimum sample size or below confidence threshold are routed to manual review. Personnel-sensitive rep findings always route through review regardless of confidence."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Period summary for trailing-average trend detection. Per-finding memory entries indexed by month + dimension for cross-month pattern tracking."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"sales.analysis.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { period, total_deals, win_rate, insights_count, high_confidence_count }."},{"event_type":"sales.analysis.pattern_discovered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { pattern_description, dimensions, confidence, recommended_action }. Emitted for patterns not seen in prior memory."},{"event_type":"sales.analysis.trend_alert","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { metric, current, trailing_avg, deviation_pct, direction }. Emitted when deviation >10%."},{"event_type":"sales.analysis.coaching_opportunity","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { rep_name, win_rate, team_avg, weakness_stage }. Rep is 10+pp below team average with sufficient sample."}],"error_handling":"CRM failure \u2192 retry 3\u00d7 exponential backoff, then emit error + log to memory. Incomplete records \u2192 include in totals, exclude from dimensional analyses; report completeness rate. Memory failure \u2192 omit Trend Analysis entirely; do not fabricate averages.","input_schema":[{"name":"analysis_period_days","type":"number","default":30,"min":7,"max":365,"description":"Lookback window from trigger date. 30 = monthly, 14 = biweekly, 90 = quarterly."},{"name":"min_sample_size","type":"number","default":5,"min":3,"max":50,"description":"Minimum deals per segment before a finding is considered statistically meaningful."},{"name":"confidence_threshold","type":"number","default":15,"min":5,"max":30,"description":"Minimum pp deviation from baseline to flag a finding as significant."}],"sample_input":{"analysis_period_days":"{{param.aq_analysis_period}}","min_sample_size":"{{param.aq_min_sample}}","confidence_threshold":"{{param.aq_confidence_threshold}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"a1","type":"start","label":"Monthly tick (shared)"},{"id":"a2","type":"connector","label":"Query closed deals in window","connector":"crm"},{"id":"a3","type":"action","label":"Validate sample + completeness"},{"id":"a4","type":"action","label":"7-dim segmentation + cross-dim interactions"},{"id":"a5","type":"action","label":"Load trailing averages; classify trends"},{"id":"a6","type":"decision","label":"Low-confidence findings?"},{"id":"a7","type":"action","label":"Route to manual review"},{"id":"a8","type":"event","label":"Emit analysis events"},{"id":"a9","type":"end","label":"Analysis ready for report"}],"edges":[{"source":"a1","target":"a2"},{"source":"a2","target":"a3"},{"source":"a3","target":"a4"},{"source":"a4","target":"a5"},{"source":"a5","target":"a6"},{"source":"a6","target":"a7","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"a6","target":"a8","variant":"no","label":"All high-confidence"},{"source":"a7","target":"a8"},{"source":"a8","target":"a9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_change_monitor
recipes.description: Poll the CRM for modified Opportunities, compare against stored state, classify urgency per change, and send contextual alerts with business impact and suggested actions. Closed Lost deals trigger a loss-reason manual review. Default every 3 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_change_monitor","title":"Change Monitor","description":"Poll the CRM for modified Opportunities, compare against stored state, classify urgency per change, and send contextual alerts with business impact and suggested actions. Closed Lost deals trigger a loss-reason manual review. Default every 3 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Real-time deal change detection with urgency-graded alerts.","category":"monitoring","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/3 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 3 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["crm","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Closed Lost deals prompt a loss-reason manual review with options {'Reviewed', 'Skip Review'}. Outcome persists in memory for loss pattern analysis."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`deal_states.json` snapshot keyed by Opportunity id. `transition_history.json` rolling 90-day record of stage changes for velocity analytics."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"sales.deal.stage_changed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { opportunity_id, deal_name, account_name, old_stage, new_stage, direction, amount, owner, probability, close_date }."},{"event_type":"sales.deal.closed_won","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: deal details + cycle time + stage transitions. Consumed by quota-tracking and celebration workflows."},{"event_type":"sales.deal.closed_lost","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: deal details + stage before loss + days in pipeline + regressions. Consumed by loss analysis."},{"event_type":"sales.deal.at_risk","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: deal details + risk_factors array (regression, close_date_slip, amount_drop, stall)."},{"event_type":"sales.deal.large_created","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: new-deal details, emitted when a new Opportunity above $100K enters the pipeline."}],"error_handling":"Auth 401 \u2192 refresh token; on refresh failure pause polling, alert user. Missing Amount \u2192 treat as $0 for thresholds, flag in alert. First run \u2192 baseline only, no alerts.","input_schema":[{"name":"poll_interval_minutes","type":"number","default":3,"min":1,"max":60,"description":"Poll frequency. Lower is faster detection but more API usage."},{"name":"notification_threshold_usd","type":"number","default":0,"min":0,"max":1000000,"description":"Minimum deal value to trigger immediate notifications. 0 = notify on all."}],"sample_input":{"poll_interval_minutes":"{{param.aq_poll_interval}}","notification_threshold_usd":"{{param.aq_notification_threshold}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"m1","type":"start","label":"Poll tick"},{"id":"m2","type":"action","label":"Load stored states + last_poll_ts"},{"id":"m3","type":"connector","label":"Query modified Opportunities","connector":"crm"},{"id":"m4","type":"action","label":"Detect stage / amount / close-date / new-deal changes"},{"id":"m5","type":"action","label":"Classify urgency per change"},{"id":"m6","type":"connector","label":"Send contextual alerts","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"m7","type":"decision","label":"Any Closed Lost?"},{"id":"m8","type":"action","label":"Manual review: loss reason"},{"id":"m9","type":"action","label":"Update states + transition history"},{"id":"m10","type":"event","label":"Emit stage_changed + targeted events"},{"id":"m11","type":"end","label":"Cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"m1","target":"m2"},{"source":"m2","target":"m3"},{"source":"m3","target":"m4"},{"source":"m4","target":"m5"},{"source":"m5","target":"m6"},{"source":"m6","target":"m7"},{"source":"m7","target":"m8","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"m7","target":"m9","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"m8","target":"m9"},{"source":"m9","target":"m10"},{"source":"m10","target":"m11"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_daily_summary
recipes.description: Compile a daily pipeline snapshot: stage distribution, total / weighted values, movement since yesterday, velocity metrics from 90-day transition history, at-risk deals, and top deals to watch. Default 09:00 daily — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_daily_summary","title":"Daily Summary","description":"Compile a daily pipeline snapshot: stage distribution, total / weighted values, movement since yesterday, velocity metrics from 90-day transition history, at-risk deals, and top deals to watch. Default 09:00 daily \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Daily pipeline snapshot with velocity + at-risk detection.","category":"reporting","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default daily at 09:00 \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["crm","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Daily snapshot for tomorrow's comparison. Pattern insights (bottleneck stages, rep velocity) persisted as knowledge annotations."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"sales.pipeline.summary","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { total_deals, total_value, weighted_value, deals_advanced, deals_regressed, deals_won, deals_lost, net_pipeline_change }."}],"error_handling":"CRM unavailable during summary \u2192 use cached snapshot from last successful poll, note 'data stale' in the summary. recipes.name: uc_stage_response
recipes.description: Detect CRM stage transitions, send stage-appropriate personalized emails (with duplicate-check), and post a contextual team message per transition. Backward moves → team message only; skipped stages → final-stage email. Default every 5 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_stage_response","title":"Stage Response","description":"Detect CRM stage transitions, send stage-appropriate personalized emails (with duplicate-check), and post a contextual team message per transition. Backward moves \u2192 team message only; skipped stages \u2192 final-stage email. Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Stage-specific email + team message per CRM transition.","category":"outreach","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/5 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["crm","email","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"Closed Won and Closed Lost emails can be queued for rep review before sending (adoption-configurable). All other stages auto-send after duplicate-check."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`deal_states.json` \u2014 keyed by deal id: last-known stage + last-email-sent stage to prevent double-sends. Contact preferences over time."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"sales.deal.stage_changed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { deal_id, deal_name, old_stage, new_stage, amount, owner }. Emitted per detected transition."},{"event_type":"sales.deal.won","direction":"emit","description":"Emitted when a deal moves to Closed Won. Consumed by onboarding / quota / celebration workflows."},{"event_type":"sales.deal.lost","direction":"emit","description":"Emitted when a deal moves to Closed Lost. Consumed by loss-analysis / re-engagement workflows."}],"error_handling":"CRM 429 \u2192 backoff, resume. Email send failure \u2192 do NOT auto-retry; log + messaging alert. recipes.name: uc_stale_watch
recipes.description: Flag deals that haven't moved in N+ days. Tiered escalation: channel alert at 14 days, additional owner DM at 30 days. Only re-alert if the deal crosses the next tier. Default every 5 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_stale_watch","title":"Stale Deal Watch","description":"Flag deals that haven't moved in N+ days. Tiered escalation: channel alert at 14 days, additional owner DM at 30 days. Only re-alert if the deal crosses the next tier. Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Tiered stale-deal escalation (channel \u2192 owner DM).","category":"monitoring","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/5 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 5 minutes (runs alongside stage_response) \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["crm","messaging"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`stale_alerts.json` tracks last-alerted tier per deal so we don't re-alert at the same tier."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"sales.deal.stale","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { deal_id, tier (14/30/60), days_since_move, amount, owner }. Emitted when a deal crosses into a new stale tier."}],"error_handling":"Messaging failure \u2192 queue alerts, retry next cycle. User lookup fails \u2192 fallback to channel alert only (no DM). recipes.description: Monday morning pipeline health report: total value, weighted value, stage conversion rates, deals won / lost / created this week, notable patterns. Default Monday 08:00 — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_weekly_report","title":"Weekly Pipeline Report","description":"Monday morning pipeline health report: total value, weighted value, stage conversion rates, deals won / lost / created this week, notable patterns. recipes.name: uc_proposal_generation
recipes.description: Detect newly qualified deals in the CRM, research prospect company + industry + competitors + contact, compose a tiered knowledge base proposal (startup / standard / enterprise), and flag for human review. Default every 5 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_proposal_generation","title":"Proposal Generation","description":"Detect newly qualified deals in the CRM, research prospect company + industry + competitors + contact, compose a tiered knowledge base proposal (startup / standard / enterprise), and flag for human review. Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.","capability_summary":"Tiered proposal generation with live research + knowledge base delivery + mandatory review gate.","category":"generation","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"cron":"*/5 * * * *","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default every 5 minutes \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["crm","knowledge_base"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every generated proposal requires human review before client delivery. Medium severity for standard tier, high for enterprise (>$100K)."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Successful proposal patterns indexed by industry + tier. Research quality scores per proposal."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"sales.proposal.created","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { proposal_id, deal_id, company, deal_value, template_tier, notion_url }."},{"event_type":"sales.proposal.deal_incomplete","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { deal_id, missing_fields[] }. Triggers CRM hygiene workflows."}],"error_handling":"Incomplete deal \u2192 emit deal_incomplete + log, no retry.
