recipes.name: uc_journal_reflection
recipes.description: Watches the configured Obsidian vault's `Daily/` folder. When a new daily note appears or an existing one grows by enough characters, reads the entry, walks the vault for grounded context, checks pattern memory for recurring themes, and appends a single `## Coach` section back into the same note. The reflection is the entire output — no Messages, no event spam.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_journal_reflection","title":"Journal Reflection","description":"Watches the configured Obsidian vault's `Daily/` folder. When a new daily note appears or an existing one grows by enough characters, reads the entry, walks the vault for grounded context, checks pattern memory for recurring themes, and appends a single `## Coach` section back into the same note. The reflection is the entire output \u2014 no Messages, no event spam.","capability_summary":"Reads new daily journal entries, grounds against the vault, writes a coach reflection back into the same note.","category":"personal_productivity","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"polling","config":{"interval_seconds":120,"watch_path":"{vault_root}/Daily","watch_pattern":"*.md","fire_on":["create","extend"]},"description":"Polls the vault's `Daily/` folder every 2 minutes. Fires on new note creation OR when an existing note grows by >= min_chars_to_trigger characters since the last pass. The 5-minute settle delay (in error_handling) ensures the user has stopped writing before the coach pass runs."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":"The coach reflection is the output, written directly into the user's note. There is no review gate \u2014 the user reads the coach section in Obsidian whenever they reopen the daily note. If the user disagrees with a reflection, they delete the section and the next pass treats the entry as fresh (per coached_entries.json + length-delta rule)."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Persists struggle-keyword fingerprints (NOT verbatim journal text) per entry as agent_memory rows with category=pattern, tags=[journal, struggle-fingerprint, {date}]. These are the ground truth for cross-temporal pattern detection. The platform's memory-injection loop also surfaces them on future runs, which means the agent itself learns the user's recurring themes over time."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"journal.coach.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { date, tone, grounding_count, pattern_flagged }. Emitted once per successful coach write. Downstream personas (e.g., a weekly retrospective agent) can subscribe to count delivered reflections."}],"error_handling":"Vault not configured \u2192 single setup message, halt. Entry too short \u2192 skip silently. Entry edited within 5 min \u2192 defer. obsidian_graph_append_daily_note fails \u2192 manual_review + pending_coach_writes.json fallback. Same-day re-run within length-delta floor \u2192 idle.","input_schema":[],"sample_input":{},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"j1","type":"start","label":"File watcher fires (new or extended Daily note)"},{"id":"j2","type":"decision","label":"Entry length >= min_chars AND last edit > 5 min ago?"},{"id":"j3","type":"action","label":"Read daily note via file_read"},{"id":"j4","type":"action","label":"Extract struggle keywords (\u22645 per entry)"},{"id":"j5","type":"action","label":"Vault semantic walk \u2192 top-3 references"},{"id":"j6","type":"action","label":"Read pattern memories (last N weeks)"},{"id":"j7","type":"decision","label":"Pattern threshold met AND no progress-language?"},{"id":"j8","type":"action","label":"Compose Coach section in user's chosen tone"},{"id":"j9","type":"decision","label":"\u22651 vault reference OR pattern flagged?"},{"id":"j10","type":"action","label":"obsidian_graph_append_daily_note(date, 'Coach', body)"},{"id":"j11","type":"action","label":"Persist struggle-keyword fingerprint to agent_memory"},{"id":"j12","type":"action","label":"Update coached_entries.json"},{"id":"j13","type":"event","label":"Emit journal.coach.delivered"},{"id":"j14","type":"end","label":"Idle (silent on thin entries)"},{"id":"j15","type":"end","label":"Coach reflection appended"}],"edges":[{"source":"j1","target":"j2"},{"source":"j2","target":"j3","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"j2","target":"j14","variant":"no","label":"No \u2192 idle"},{"source":"j3","target":"j4"},{"source":"j4","target":"j5"},{"source":"j5","target":"j6"},{"source":"j6","target":"j7"},{"source":"j7","target":"j8"},{"source":"j8","target":"j9"},{"source":"j9","target":"j10","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"j9","target":"j14","variant":"no","label":"No \u2192 silent"},{"source":"j10","target":"j11"},{"source":"j11","target":"j12"},{"source":"j12","target":"j13"},{"source":"j13","target":"j15"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_journal_rescan
recipes.description: Manual capability. User invokes against a specific date — typically after they've added new content to a daily note that was already coached and want a fresh reflection. Replaces the existing `## Coach` section in place rather than appending a duplicate.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_journal_rescan","title":"Journal Rescan","description":"Manual capability. User invokes against a specific date \u2014 typically after they've added new content to a daily note that was already coached and want a fresh reflection. Replaces the existing `## Coach` section in place rather than appending a duplicate.","capability_summary":"Manually re-run the reflection on a specific date and refresh the Coach section in place.","category":"personal_productivity","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 user invokes when they've meaningfully extended an already-coached note and want a refreshed reflection without creating a duplicate Coach section."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":"Same as uc_journal_reflection \u2014 the rewritten Coach section IS the output."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Updates the same struggle-keyword fingerprint memory for the date being rescanned (replaces, does not duplicate). Updates coached_entries.json with the new post-pass length."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"journal.coach.refreshed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { date, tone, grounding_count, pattern_flagged, prior_coached_at }. Emitted on each successful in-place rewrite."}],"error_handling":"Date has no daily note \u2192 respond with a one-line message, do not invent the entry. Daily note has no existing Coach section \u2192 fall back to append behavior (same as uc_journal_reflection). Concurrent rescan for same date \u2192 second invocation idles if first completed within 60s.","input_schema":[{"name":"target_date","type":"text","description":"Date of the daily note to rescan, in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today if omitted."}],"sample_input":{"target_date":""},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"User invokes with target_date"},{"id":"r2","type":"decision","label":"Daily note exists for that date?"},{"id":"r3","type":"action","label":"Read daily note + locate existing Coach section"},{"id":"r4","type":"action","label":"Re-run grounding + pattern check (same as uc_journal_reflection)"},{"id":"r5","type":"action","label":"Replace Coach section in place via obsidian_brain markdown helpers"},{"id":"r6","type":"action","label":"Update coached_entries.json + replace pattern memory for date"},{"id":"r7","type":"event","label":"Emit journal.coach.refreshed"},{"id":"r8","type":"end","label":"Coach section refreshed"},{"id":"r9","type":"end","label":"No-op (date has no daily note)"}],"edges":[{"source":"r1","target":"r2"},{"source":"r2","target":"r3","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"r2","target":"r9","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"r3","target":"r4"},{"source":"r4","target":"r5"},{"source":"r5","target":"r6"},{"source":"r6","target":"r7"},{"source":"r7","target":"r8"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_pattern_digest
recipes.description: Optional capability — only runs when enable_messages_digest is true. Once a week, walks pattern memories from the last N weeks, clusters by keyword overlap, surfaces clusters that exceed the recurrence floor and haven't been digested before, and ships a single Messages summary highlighting slow-burn themes the user might not see in any single coach pass.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_pattern_digest","title":"Weekly Pattern Digest","description":"Optional capability \u2014 only runs when enable_messages_digest is true. Once a week, walks pattern memories from the last N weeks, clusters by keyword overlap, surfaces clusters that exceed the recurrence floor and haven't been digested before, and ships a single Messages summary highlighting slow-burn themes the user might not see in any single coach pass.","capability_summary":"Optional weekly digest of recurring journal themes. Off by default.","category":"personal_productivity","enabled_by_default":false,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 20 * * 0","timezone":"local"},"description":"Default Sunday 20:00 local \u2014 final cadence set at the trigger-composition step. Use case exits silently if enable_messages_digest is false, so the schedule firing does no harm when the user opts out."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":"Digest is informational. The user can mute the use case at any time by toggling enable_messages_digest off."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Reads pattern memories produced by uc_journal_reflection. Persists last_pattern_digest.json (cluster IDs already digested) to prevent repeating the same digest week-over-week."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"journal.pattern.digested","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { week_ending, cluster_count, distinct_entries }. Emitted once per non-empty digest run."}],"error_handling":"enable_messages_digest=false \u2192 exit silently. No pattern memories yet \u2192 first-run mode, skip with no message. recipes.name: uc_asset_generation
recipes.description: Load the design.md brief, compose a prompt from the design DNA + memory layer, generate images via the image AI, evaluate with the multimodal AI in a quality loop (max 3 cycles), deliver via Messages, and gate on human review (max 3 iterations). Memory accumulates approved prompt phrasings without modifying the brief.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_asset_generation","title":"Brand Asset Generation","description":"Load the design.md brief, compose a prompt from the design DNA + memory layer, generate images via the image AI, evaluate with the multimodal AI in a quality loop (max 3 cycles), deliver via Messages, and gate on human review (max 3 iterations). Memory accumulates approved prompt phrasings without modifying the brief.","capability_summary":"Per-request asset generation with brief-grounded prompts, quality loop, human review.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Runs on manual request (user describes the asset: hero image, social card, icon set, background, etc.) or on `brand.brief.generated` to produce a first-round asset after the brief lands."},"connectors":["codebase","image_generation","vision"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every generated asset goes through manual_review with the preview, prompt, and multimodal AI score visible. User approves (asset finalized; prompt phrasing saved to memory) or rejects with specific feedback (persisted as categorized negative-prompt fragments). Max 3 human iterations \u2014 after that, request a reference image."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`asset_prompts.json` \u2014 approved prompt phrasings per asset type; after 5+ approvals per type the agent has a strong per-type template. `rejections.json` \u2014 categorized rejection patterns (color | composition | style | mood) converted to negative-prompt fragments. Memory refines the prompt on top of the brief; the brief itself never changes at runtime."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"brand.brief.generated","direction":"listen","description":"Optional trigger for a first-round asset after the brief lands at build time."},{"event_type":"brand.asset.generated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: asset_type, prompt_used, vision_score, cycle_count, preview_url. Emitted when an image passes the quality evaluation and is ready for human review."},{"event_type":"brand.asset.approved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: asset_type, final_prompt, final_asset_url. Emitted on human approval \u2014 downstream asset-cataloging personas can subscribe."},{"event_type":"brand.asset.rejected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: asset_type, category (color | composition | style | mood), reason. Emitted on human rejection \u2014 feeds memory refinement."}],"error_handling":"Missing design.md (on-demand mode) \u2192 fall back to live codebase analysis and note the limitation in delivery. Image AI 401/403 \u2192 Messages credential warning, halt. Image AI content policy \u2192 rephrase and report blocked terms. Multimodal AI failure \u2192 skip auto-scoring, proceed to human review with note. Max 3 cycles without threshold \u2192 present best result with note. Max 3 human rejections \u2192 request reference image. Messages failure \u2192 save to `latest_asset.json`.","input_schema":[{"name":"asset_request","type":"text","description":"What to create: hero image, social media card, icon set, UI illustration, background. Include dimensions / aspect ratio if specific."},{"name":"asset_type","type":"enum","options":["hero","social_card","icon_set","background","illustration","brand_kit","mixed"],"default":"mixed","description":"Shapes memory lookup and per-type prompt templates."},{"name":"quality_threshold","type":"number","default":7,"min":5,"max":10,"description":"Minimum multimodal AI score before the asset proceeds to human review. Higher = more auto-iteration cycles."}],"sample_input":{"asset_request":"","asset_type":"{{param.aq_asset_type}}","quality_threshold":"{{param.aq_quality_threshold}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"a1","type":"start","label":"Asset request received"},{"id":"a2","type":"action","label":"Load design.md brief + memory"},{"id":"a3","type":"action","label":"Compose prompt from brief (sensory + palette + layout + do's/don'ts) + memory layer"},{"id":"a4","type":"connector","label":"Generate image via AI (2-3 variations)","connector":"image_ai"},{"id":"a5","type":"connector","label":"Evaluate with multimodal AI (score 1-10)","connector":"multimodal_ai"},{"id":"a6","type":"decision","label":"Score >= threshold?"},{"id":"a7","type":"action","label":"Refine prompt with vision feedback, regenerate (max 3 cycles)"},{"id":"a8","type":"action","label":"Deliver via Messages + submit for manual_review"},{"id":"a9","type":"event","label":"Emit brand.asset.approved or brand.asset.rejected"},{"id":"a10","type":"action","label":"Update memory (prompt phrasing or rejection pattern)"},{"id":"a11","type":"end","label":"Asset cycle complete"}],"edges":[{"source":"a1","target":"a2"},{"source":"a2","target":"a3"},{"source":"a3","target":"a4"},{"source":"a4","target":"a5"},{"source":"a5","target":"a6"},{"source":"a6","target":"a8","variant":"yes","label":"Score met"},{"source":"a6","target":"a7","variant":"no","label":"Below"},{"source":"a7","target":"a4"},{"source":"a8","target":"a9"},{"source":"a9","target":"a10"},{"source":"a10","target":"a11"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_brief_generation
recipes.description: Produce the structured design.md brief (five sections: empathy, sensory aesthetic, four-role color hierarchy, typography hierarchy, layout metaphor + do's/don'ts) stored at `design_context.design_files['design.md']`. Runs once at persona build time; re-runnable on demand from the persona overview. Default one-shot at build — manual re-runs via the capability trigger.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_brief_generation","title":"Design Brief Generation","description":"Produce the structured design.md brief (five sections: empathy, sensory aesthetic, four-role color hierarchy, typography hierarchy, layout metaphor + do's/don'ts) stored at `design_context.design_files['design.md']`. Runs once at persona build time; re-runnable on demand from the persona overview. Default one-shot at build — manual re-runs via the capability trigger. When brief_mode is user-pasted AND brief_content is provided, use brief_content VERBATIM as design.md (do not re-extract from a codebase or source) — normalize it into the five-section structure only if sections are missing, otherwise store it unchanged at design_context.design_files['design.md']. Only auto-extract from the source/codebase when brief_mode is auto-extract.","capability_summary":"One-shot build-time brief generator; source: auto-from-codebase / user-pasted / on-demand.","category":"content","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Runs once at persona build. Re-runnable manually from the persona overview when brand direction evolves."},"connectors":["codebase"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"The generated brief is presented for human review before it's committed to `design_context.design_files['design.md']`. The user can accept, edit in-place, or regenerate with different sourcing mode. Accepted briefs become the source of truth for every asset generation."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"brand.brief.generated","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: sourcing_mode (auto-from-codebase | user-pasted | on-demand), stored_path, section_count. Emitted after the brief lands in design_files. On-demand mode → skip at build; log that the brief is deferred.","input_schema":[{"name":"brief_source_intent","type":"text","description":"Where the brief should be extracted from — a local file/folder path, a registered codebase, or a pasted-in design.md."},{"name":"brief_mode","type":"enum","options":["auto_from_codebase","user_pasted","on_demand"],"default":"auto_from_codebase","description":"How Step 0 runs at build time. Auto-extract reads the source above; user-pasted accepts a brief verbatim; on-demand defers."},{"name":"brief_content","type":"text","ui_component":"TextArea","required":false,"description":"The user's own design.md / brand brief pasted verbatim (from Stitch, Figma, Gemini, or hand-written). Used as-is when brief_mode is 'I'll paste my own design.md'; ignored otherwise."}],"sample_input":{"brief_source_intent":"{{param.aq_brief_source_intent}}","brief_mode":"{{param.aq_brief_mode}}","brief_content":"{{param.aq_brief_content}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"b1","type":"start","label":"Build-time trigger"},{"id":"b2","type":"decision","label":"Sourcing mode?"},{"id":"b3","type":"connector","label":"auto: read CSS/Tailwind/theme","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"b4","type":"action","label":"pasted: accept verbatim"},{"id":"b5","type":"action","label":"Assemble 5-section brief (empathy, sensory, colors, typography, layout)"},{"id":"b6","type":"action","label":"Route to human review (accept / edit / regenerate)"},{"id":"b7","type":"action","label":"Write to design_context.design_files['design.md']"},{"id":"b8","type":"event","label":"Emit brand.brief.generated"},{"id":"b9","type":"end","label":"Brief is source of truth for asset generation"}],"edges":[{"source":"b1","target":"b2"},{"source":"b2","target":"b3","variant":"yes","label":"auto"},{"source":"b2","target":"b4","variant":"no","label":"pasted"},{"source":"b3","target":"b5"},{"source":"b4","target":"b5"},{"source":"b5","target":"b6"},{"source":"b6","target":"b7"},{"source":"b7","target":"b8"},{"source":"b8","target":"b9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_cannibalization_watch
recipes.description: Cross-reference paid keyword bids with organic ranking positions. When a keyword already ranks top-3 organically, the paid spend is likely cannibalizing — surface with calculated weekly savings opportunity.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_cannibalization_watch","title":"Paid-Organic Cannibalization Watch","description":"Cross-reference paid keyword bids with organic ranking positions. When a keyword already ranks top-3 organically, the paid spend is likely cannibalizing \u2014 surface with calculated weekly savings opportunity.","capability_summary":"Weekly detection of paid spend on keywords already winning organically.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Weekly Monday 9:00 AM (shared)."},"connectors":["advertising","analytics"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_low_confidence","context":"When organic rank is exactly 3 or paid conversion path can't be cleanly separated from organic, route to human review. recipes.name: uc_free_research
recipes.description: Discovers free promotion surfaces — forums, subreddits, newsletters, indie-dev communities, Hacker News threads, Product Hunt waitlists — grounded in the app's own codebase README + package metadata so suggestions actually match what the product does. User tags each source good/bad; memory tightens future discovery.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_free_research","title":"Free Promotion Source Discovery","description":"Discovers free promotion surfaces \u2014 forums, subreddits, newsletters, indie-dev communities, Hacker News threads, Product Hunt waitlists \u2014 grounded in the app's own codebase README + package metadata so suggestions actually match what the product does. User tags each source good/bad; memory tightens future discovery.","capability_summary":"Weekly discovery of free promotion surfaces grounded in the app's README + package metadata, with good/bad tagging memory.","category":"growth","enabled_by_default":false,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Weekly Monday 9:00 AM (shared)."},"connectors":["codebase"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every discovered source is reviewed. User marks good (keep, explore deeper) or bad (noisy, off-topic, already tried). Decisions persist in `free_source_patterns.json` and tighten future discovery \u2014 3+ bad-tags of a category suppress it; good-tagged sources compound into ROI-tracked anchors."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`free_source_patterns.json` \u2014 what to market (derived from README title/description + package metadata), per-source quality score (accept/reject ratio), per-source ROI proxy (clicks or mentions over time when observable). Updated after each review round.","learning_threshold":3},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"marketing.free_source.discovered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: source_id, type (forum|subreddit|newsletter|community|directory), url, relevance_score, rationale. Emitted per candidate source at generation time."},{"event_type":"marketing.free_source.accepted","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: source_id, user_notes?. Emitted on good-tag \u2014 the source is added to the ROI-tracked accepted set."},{"event_type":"marketing.free_source.rejected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: source_id, reason (noisy|off_topic|already_tried|other). Emitted on bad-tag \u2014 memory tightens future discovery for this source's category."}],"error_handling":"Codebase connector unavailable \u2192 skip this capability for the week, surface a one-line note in the combined briefing suggesting reconnection. README missing \u2192 fall back to package metadata (package.json/Cargo.toml description + keywords). Memory unavailable \u2192 run with generic indie-dev benchmarks, note in report that discovery will sharpen after the next review round.","input_schema":[{"name":"discovery_count","type":"string","default":"Leave up to LLM","enum":["Leave up to LLM","3","5","8","12"],"description":"Target candidate sources per week. 'Leave up to LLM' \u2192 size to signal density (more when the codebase reveals a fresh niche, fewer when memory has already mapped the obvious surfaces)."}],"sample_input":{"discovery_count":"{{param.aq_proposal_count}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write","web_search"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"f1","type":"start","label":"Monday tick (shared)"},{"id":"f2","type":"connector","label":"Read README + package metadata","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"f3","type":"action","label":"Derive what to market (problem, audience, tone)"},{"id":"f4","type":"action","label":"Load free_source_patterns memory"},{"id":"f5","type":"action","label":"Web-search candidate surfaces (forums, subreddits, newsletters, communities)"},{"id":"f6","type":"action","label":"Apply memory filter (suppress bad-tagged categories)"},{"id":"f7","type":"event","label":"Emit marketing.free_source.discovered per candidate"},{"id":"f8","type":"action","label":"Route to human review"},{"id":"f9","type":"event","label":"Emit accepted / rejected per decision"},{"id":"f10","type":"action","label":"Update free_source_patterns memory"},{"id":"f11","type":"end","label":"Free-research section ready for combined briefing"}],"edges":[{"source":"f1","target":"f2"},{"source":"f2","target":"f3"},{"source":"f3","target":"f4"},{"source":"f4","target":"f5"},{"source":"f5","target":"f6"},{"source":"f6","target":"f7"},{"source":"f7","target":"f8"},{"source":"f8","target":"f9"},{"source":"f9","target":"f10"},{"source":"f10","target":"f11"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_optimization_proposals
recipes.description: Turn the performance scan into 5-8 specific, actionable optimization proposals. Each carries data-grounded rationale, expected impact estimate, and priority. Presented for human review; accepted items enter the user's backlog via the emitted event.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_optimization_proposals","title":"Optimization Proposals","description":"Turn the performance scan into 5-8 specific, actionable optimization proposals. Each carries data-grounded rationale, expected impact estimate, and priority. Presented for human review; accepted items enter the user's backlog via the emitted event.","capability_summary":"5-8 weekly data-grounded optimization proposals with human accept/reject.","category":"strategy","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Weekly Monday 9:00 AM (shared)."},"connectors":["advertising","analytics"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Every proposal is reviewed by the human before it enters the backlog. Accept/reject decisions with category tagging persist in `proposal_patterns.json` and shape next week's generation (3+ rejections of a category suppresses it unless impact > 30%)."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`proposal_patterns.json` \u2014 running count of accepted / rejected per category (Budget, Targeting, Creative, Bidding, SEO, Landing Page, Keyword). Drives memory-informed filtering and outcome-grounded impact estimates (e.g. 'last Keyword Pause saved $420').","learning_threshold":3},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"marketing.optimization.proposed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: proposal_id, category, priority, expected_impact, rationale. Emitted per proposal at generation time."},{"event_type":"marketing.optimization.accepted","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: proposal_id, user_notes?. Emitted on human accept \u2014 downstream backlog-tracking personas can subscribe."},{"event_type":"marketing.optimization.rejected","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: proposal_id, reason. Emitted on human reject \u2014 for memory training and rejection analytics."}],"error_handling":"No scan data \u2192 skip proposals this week, flag in combined briefing. Memory unavailable \u2192 generate with industry benchmarks only, note in report.","input_schema":[{"name":"proposal_count","type":"string","default":"Leave up to LLM","enum":["Leave up to LLM","3","5","6","8","10"],"description":"Target proposals per week. 'Leave up to LLM' \u2192 size to signal density (aim 5-8 when data is rich, fewer when thin). A numeric string pins the count (cast to int at runtime)."}],"sample_input":{"proposal_count":"{{param.aq_proposal_count}}"},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"o1","type":"start","label":"Performance scan complete"},{"id":"o2","type":"action","label":"Load proposal_patterns memory"},{"id":"o3","type":"action","label":"Generate candidate proposals from scan data"},{"id":"o4","type":"action","label":"Apply memory filter (category suppression rules)"},{"id":"o5","type":"action","label":"Rank by priority, take top N"},{"id":"o6","type":"event","label":"Emit marketing.optimization.proposed per proposal"},{"id":"o7","type":"action","label":"Route to human review"},{"id":"o8","type":"event","label":"Emit accepted / rejected per decision"},{"id":"o9","type":"action","label":"Update proposal_patterns memory"},{"id":"o10","type":"end","label":"Proposals section ready for combined briefing"}],"edges":[{"source":"o1","target":"o2"},{"source":"o2","target":"o3"},{"source":"o3","target":"o4"},{"source":"o4","target":"o5"},{"source":"o5","target":"o6"},{"source":"o6","target":"o7"},{"source":"o7","target":"o8"},{"source":"o8","target":"o9"},{"source":"o9","target":"o10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_performance_scan
recipes.description: Weekly scan of paid campaign and organic analytics metrics. Computes WoW deltas against a 4-week rolling baseline and produces the performance section of the Monday briefing. Does not propose changes — hands off to uc_optimization_proposals.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_performance_scan","title":"Cross-Channel Performance Scan","description":"Weekly scan of paid campaign and organic analytics metrics. Computes WoW deltas against a 4-week rolling baseline and produces the performance section of the Monday briefing. Does not propose changes \u2014 hands off to uc_optimization_proposals.","capability_summary":"Weekly paid + organic metrics scan with WoW delta flagging.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","timezone":"local"},"description":"Weekly Monday 9:00 AM (shared across all three capabilities via trigger_composition: shared)."},"connectors":["advertising","analytics"],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"`performance_history.json` \u2014 4-week rolling baselines per campaign and per landing page. Enables WoW comparisons and declining-trend detection."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"marketing.report.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: week_ending, overall_trend (Improving | Stable | Declining), paid_summary, organic_summary, flagged_metrics[]."},{"event_type":"marketing.performance.declining","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: week_ending, declining_metrics[], magnitude. Emitted only when the overall trend is Declining \u2014 downstream alert workflows can subscribe."}],"error_handling":"Ad platform down \u2192 paid section labeled unavailable; organic still processes. Deep: +per-keyword + per-page breakdowns."}],"sample_input":{"report_depth":"{{param.aq_report_depth}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"p1","type":"start","label":"Monday tick (shared)"},{"id":"p2","type":"connector","label":"Fetch paid metrics (7d)","connector":"ad_platform"},{"id":"p3","type":"connector","label":"Fetch organic metrics (7d)","connector":"analytics_tool"},{"id":"p4","type":"action","label":"Compute WoW deltas vs 4-week baseline"},{"id":"p5","type":"action","label":"Flag >15% paid / >20% organic moves"},{"id":"p6","type":"event","label":"Emit marketing.report.delivered"},{"id":"p7","type":"decision","label":"Overall trend Declining?"},{"id":"p8","type":"event","label":"Emit marketing.performance.declining"},{"id":"p9","type":"end","label":"Performance section ready for combined briefing"}],"edges":[{"source":"p1","target":"p2"},{"source":"p2","target":"p3"},{"source":"p3","target":"p4"},{"source":"p4","target":"p5"},{"source":"p5","target":"p6"},{"source":"p6","target":"p7"},{"source":"p7","target":"p8","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"p7","target":"p9","variant":"no","label":"No"},{"source":"p8","target":"p9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_competitor_compare
recipes.description: Score competitor URLs with the same 8-category weighted system and produce a side-by-side comparison section appended to the audit report. Highlights where the target beats competitors and where it falls behind. Only runs when competitor URLs are provided at adoption.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_competitor_compare","title":"Competitor Comparison","description":"Score competitor URLs with the same 8-category weighted system and produce a side-by-side comparison section appended to the audit report. Highlights where the target beats competitors and where it falls behind. Only runs when competitor URLs are provided at adoption.","capability_summary":"Side-by-side 8-category scoring of target vs competitor URLs.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":false,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 runs alongside uc_standard_audit when competitor URLs are configured."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":false,"context":null},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"audit.comparison.delivered","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: target_url, competitor_urls, score_delta_summary. recipes.name: uc_standard_audit
recipes.description: Fetch a target URL and key subpages, score 8 conversion categories, classify gaps by severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), produce a prioritized gap report with revenue-impact framing, deliver via Messages, and learn from valuable/not-valuable human review decisions. Runs on-demand per user request.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_standard_audit","title":"Website Conversion Audit","description":"Fetch a target URL and key subpages, score 8 conversion categories, classify gaps by severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), produce a prioritized gap report with revenue-impact framing, deliver via Messages, and learn from valuable/not-valuable human review decisions. Runs on-demand per user request.","capability_summary":"8-category weighted conversion audit with revenue-impact prioritization and human review learning.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Manual \u2014 user triggers each audit with a target URL and business type."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Each finding is presented for human review (valuable / not valuable). Valuable items can carry implementation notes; not-valuable items persist as category-level rejection patterns. After 3+ rejections in a category for a business type, it's deprioritized in future audits; after 3+ acceptances, detail depth expands."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Per-category accept/reject counts keyed by business type + gap category + severity. Drives memory-informed filtering: expand categories accepted 3+ times, deprioritize categories rejected 3+ times. Audit-over-audit trend tracking via `audit_history.json`.","learning_threshold":3},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"audit.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: target_url, business_type, overall_score, gap_count, critical_count. Useful for dashboard agents or reporting pipelines."},{"event_type":"audit.critical_gap_found","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: target_url, category, gap_summary, severity=critical. Emitted per critical-severity gap discovered during the audit. Enables alerting agents to escalate urgent findings."}],"error_handling":"Site unreachable \u2192 Messages with downtime-as-finding framing; emit critical gap with reason site_unreachable. Bot protection \u2192 partial audit from headers + limitation note. JS-rendered SPA \u2192 limitation note in report. Empty HTML \u2192 Critical finding. Messages failure \u2192 `latest_audit_report.json` fallback, retry once.","input_schema":[{"name":"target_url","type":"text","description":"Full URL of the website to audit (e.g. https://example-hvac.com)."},{"name":"business_type","type":"enum","options":["hvac","plumbing","landscaping","roofing","electrical","auto_repair","cleaning","pest_control","painting","general_contractor","other"],"default":"hvac","description":"Type of local service business \u2014 drives industry-specific benchmarks."},{"name":"audit_depth","type":"enum","options":["quick","standard","deep"],"default":"standard","description":"Quick = homepage only. recipes.name: uc_classification
recipes.description: AI-classifies each ingested error across four dimensions: category (one of 7), root cause (pattern + dependency + temporal correlation), impact (blast radius + severity), and remediation (specific actionable fix). Stores classification back into the error index. Fires on `workflow.error.ingested` events.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_classification","title":"Error Classification","description":"AI-classifies each ingested error across four dimensions: category (one of 7), root cause (pattern + dependency + temporal correlation), impact (blast radius + severity), and remediation (specific actionable fix). Stores classification back into the error index. Fires on `workflow.error.ingested` events.","capability_summary":"7-category classification with root cause, impact, and remediation for every error.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"workflow.error.ingested"},"description":"Fires on every ingested error. recipes.name: uc_ingestion
recipes.description: Subscribes to platform error events from every persona and polls the execution API every 10 minutes to catch silent failures. Normalizes each error into a structured record, deduplicates within a 1-hour window, and appends to the 90-day rolling error index. Default poll every 10 minutes — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_ingestion","title":"Error Event Ingestion","description":"Subscribes to platform error events from every persona and polls the execution API every 10 minutes to catch silent failures. recipes.name: uc_pattern_detection
recipes.description: Runs four pattern checks on each classified error: recurring (same pattern 3+ in 1h), cascading (dependent persona fails within 15m), time-based clustering, service-wide outage (3+ personas on same service in 30m). Sends real-time critical alerts and emits pattern events for downstream automation. Fires on `workflow.error.classified` events.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_pattern_detection","title":"Cross-Workflow Pattern Detection","description":"Runs four pattern checks on each classified error: recurring (same pattern 3+ in 1h), cascading (dependent persona fails within 15m), time-based clustering, service-wide outage (3+ personas on same service in 30m). Sends real-time critical alerts and emits pattern events for downstream automation. Fires on `workflow.error.classified` events.","capability_summary":"Recurring / cascading / time-cluster / service-outage pattern detection with real-time alerting.","category":"analysis","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"event_listener","config":{"event_type":"workflow.error.classified"},"description":"Fires on every classified error. recipes.name: uc_reporting
recipes.description: Compiles the daily error digest (totals, per-persona, per-category, trending, top remediation) and the weekly reliability report (error rate per persona, MTTR by category, week-over-week delta, top 3 recommendations, dependency risk map). Posts to messaging channel and archives. Default daily 9 AM + weekly Monday 8 AM — final cadence set at the trigger-composition step.

Default 9 AM local."}],"sample_input":{"daily_digest_hour":"{{param.aq_daily_digest_hour}}"},"tool_hints":["http_request","file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"r1","type":"start","label":"Daily 9 AM OR Monday 8 AM tick"},{"id":"r2","type":"action","label":"Load error_index + patterns + reliability state"},{"id":"r3","type":"action","label":"Compute metrics, rankings, trends, recommendations"},{"id":"r4","type":"connector","label":"Post report to messaging channel","connector":"messaging"},{"id":"r5","type":"action","label":"Archive to digests/ or weekly_reports/"},{"id":"r6","type":"event","label":"Emit workflow.report.delivered"},{"id":"r7","type":"end","label":"Report delivered + archived"}],"edges":[{"source":"r1","target":"r2"},{"source":"r2","target":"r3"},{"source":"r3","target":"r4"},{"source":"r4","target":"r5"},{"source":"r5","target":"r6"},{"source":"r6","target":"r7"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_cut_edit
recipes.description: Takes raw filmed footage + approved script. VFR normalize → Deepgram transcribe → Pass 1 retake removal (keep final match per script sentence) → Pass 2 n-gram phrase-repeat detection → Pass 3 silence polish. Runs FFmpeg locally.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_cut_edit","title":"3-Pass Cut Edit","description":"Takes raw filmed footage + approved script. VFR normalize \u2192 Deepgram transcribe \u2192 Pass 1 retake removal (keep final match per script sentence) \u2192 Pass 2 n-gram phrase-repeat detection \u2192 Pass 3 silence polish. Runs FFmpeg locally.","capability_summary":"Local 3-pass FFmpeg edit with Deepgram-guided retake removal.","category":"editing","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Creator provides raw footage path after filming."},"connectors":["deepgram","desktop"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Edit progress + final stats (original \u2192 final duration)"}],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"cut_tolerance.json: how aggressive the creator wants retake removal (aggressive/conservative/off), per-pass cut volumes over time."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"youtube.edit.complete","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: original duration, final duration, seconds cut per pass, file path."}],"error_handling":"FFmpeg missing \u2192 HARD STOP with install instructions. VFR detect hangs \u2192 skip normalization + warn. Concat empty \u2192 conservative fallback (keep all). Audio extraction fails \u2192 skip Deepgram, Pass 1 script-only. Deepgram 401 \u2192 Pass 2 skipped, Pass 1 degraded. Zero-byte file \u2192 ask for re-record.","input_schema":[{"name":"raw_path","type":"text","description":"Path to filmed footage"},{"name":"retake_mode","type":"enum","options":["aggressive","conservative","off"],"default":"aggressive"},{"name":"silence_trim_floor_ms","type":"number","default":200,"min":100,"max":800}],"sample_input":{"raw_path":"raw/episode-12.mp4","retake_mode":"{{param.aq_retake_mode}}","silence_trim_floor_ms":200},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"n1","type":"start","label":"Creator provides footage"},{"id":"n2","type":"connector","label":"VFR normalize + extract audio","connector":"desktop_terminal"},{"id":"n3","type":"connector","label":"Deepgram transcribe (optional)","connector":"deepgram"},{"id":"n4","type":"action","label":"Pass 1: retake removal (keep final)"},{"id":"n5","type":"action","label":"Pass 2: n-gram phrase-repeat"},{"id":"n6","type":"action","label":"Pass 3: silence polish"},{"id":"n7","type":"connector","label":"Compose final via FFmpeg","connector":"desktop_terminal"},{"id":"n8","type":"event","label":"Emit youtube.edit.complete"},{"id":"n9","type":"end","label":"Ready for publish prep"}],"edges":[{"source":"n1","target":"n2"},{"source":"n2","target":"n3"},{"source":"n3","target":"n4"},{"source":"n4","target":"n5"},{"source":"n5","target":"n6"},{"source":"n6","target":"n7"},{"source":"n7","target":"n8"},{"source":"n8","target":"n9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_outline
recipes.description: Takes an approved topic and produces a 5-section outline (hook/problem → solution → demo → results → outro), three title options (curiosity/benefit/identity), and concrete thumbnail direction.

recipes.name: uc_publish_prep

recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_publish_prep","title":"Publish Prep","description":"From the outline + final video, generate YouTube-ready assets: description (hook-first + chapter timestamps + links), 10-15 tags, chapter markers mapped to final timestamps, end-screen card picks from prior uploads, and a 1-paragraph community post to prime the algorithm.","capability_summary":"YouTube-ready title/description/tags/chapters/community post.","category":"publishing","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Creator triggers after edit complete."},"connectors":["desktop"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Deliver checklist the creator copy-pastes into YouTube Studio"}],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":null},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Archives per-episode publish artifacts in publish/{topic-slug}.md. recipes.name: uc_research
recipes.description: Manual trigger with a topic idea. Runs parallel YouTube + Apify + X queries, applies the niche gate (median view count test), produces 5-10 ranked topic candidates with citations.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_research","title":"Niche Research","description":"Manual trigger with a topic idea. Runs parallel YouTube + Apify + X queries, applies the niche gate (median view count test), produces 5-10 ranked topic candidates with citations.","capability_summary":"Research gate + 5-10 ranked topic candidates from YouTube + Apify + X.","category":"research","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Creator provides a topic idea to research."},"connectors":["youtube_data","apify","social"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Delivers ranked topic candidates and niche-gate decision"}],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Creator reviews the ranked candidates and picks one to proceed to outline."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Stores: niche performance history (median view counts by topic area), rejection patterns (too niche / already covered / off-brand), hook patterns that landed on prior episodes."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"youtube.research.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: median view count, gate decision (GO/CAUTION/STOP), ranked candidates with URLs and view counts."}],"error_handling":"YouTube 403 quota \u2192 Apify fallback silently. recipes.name: uc_script
recipes.description: Writes a 1,800-2,500 word script in the creator's voice from the approved outline. Applies open loops, loss aversion, micro-payoffs, specificity. Includes [PAUSE], [B-ROLL], [SCREEN] markers. Creator flags voice mismatches — each rejection refines the voice_profile.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_script","title":"Teleprompter Script","description":"Writes a 1,800-2,500 word script in the creator's voice from the approved outline. Applies open loops, loss aversion, micro-payoffs, specificity. Includes [PAUSE], [B-ROLL], [SCREEN] markers. Creator flags voice mismatches \u2014 each rejection refines the voice_profile.","capability_summary":"Voice-matched teleprompter script with revision learning.","category":"writing","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Creator triggers after outline approved."},"connectors":[],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Delivers teleprompter script with markers"}],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Creator reads the script aloud and flags any phrase that doesn't sound like them. recipes.name: uc_coverage_scan
recipes.description: Scheduled scan of the registered codebase. Reads memory for prior coverage progress, picks the next lowest-coverage / untested module, writes the missing tests, validates them with run_tests, and persists updated coverage progress to memory. Incremental — each run advances coverage on a new area until the target is met.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_coverage_scan","title":"Codebase Coverage Scan","description":"Scheduled scan of the registered codebase. Reads memory for prior coverage progress, picks the next lowest-coverage / untested module, writes the missing tests, validates them with run_tests, and persists updated coverage progress to memory. Incremental — each run advances coverage on a new area until the target is met.","capability_summary":"Incrementally raise test coverage: scan the codebase, write missing tests for the next uncovered module, validate, and track progress in memory.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * *","cadence":"daily"},"description":"Runs on a schedule (default daily). Each run advances coverage incrementally; cadence is configurable at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["codebase"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Coverage progress summary channel."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"on_request","context":"Newly written tests can be surfaced for human review, or accepted automatically once validated by run_tests."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"REQUIRED. Persist incremental coverage progress ACROSS runs: per-module status (untested / partial / covered), last-scanned timestamp, tests written, modules still pending, and per-module test framework + fixture patterns. Each run reads memory first to pick the next uncovered area and to avoid redoing covered modules — this is what makes coverage chase forward instead of repeating."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"qa.coverage.improved","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { modules_covered[], tests_added[], coverage_delta, remaining_untested_count }. Emitted after a successful coverage pass."}],"error_handling":"Codebase not mounted / not accessible → report 'codebase not accessible' and stop (no value possible — surfaces as precondition_failed). run_tests unavailable → write tests but record them as UNVALIDATED in memory + the summary. failure.","input_schema":[{"name":"target_codebase","type":"connector_ref","ui_component":"CodebaseSelector","connector":"codebase","required":true,"description":"Which registered codebase to scan and raise coverage on."},{"name":"max_modules_per_run","type":"number","default":3,"min":1,"max":20,"description":"How many uncovered modules to write tests for per scheduled run (keeps each run bounded)."},{"name":"coverage_target","type":"number","default":80,"min":1,"max":100,"description":"Target line/branch coverage % to chase incrementally."}],"sample_input":{"target_codebase":"{{param.aq_target_codebase}}","max_modules_per_run":3,"coverage_target":80},"tool_hints":["file_read","file_write","search_code","run_tests"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"c1","type":"start","label":"Scheduled run"},{"id":"c2","type":"action","label":"Read memory: prior coverage progress"},{"id":"c3","type":"connector","label":"Scan codebase for untested / low-coverage modules","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"c4","type":"decision","label":"Untested modules remain?"},{"id":"c5","type":"connector","label":"Write missing tests for the next module(s)","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"c6","type":"connector","label":"run_tests to validate","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"c7","type":"action","label":"Persist updated coverage progress to memory"},{"id":"c8","type":"event","label":"Emit qa.coverage.improved"},{"id":"c9","type":"action","label":"Report 'coverage target met this cycle' + state"},{"id":"c10","type":"end","label":"Done"}],"edges":[{"source":"c1","target":"c2"},{"source":"c2","target":"c3"},{"source":"c3","target":"c4"},{"source":"c4","target":"c5","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"c4","target":"c9","variant":"no","label":"Fully covered"},{"source":"c5","target":"c6"},{"source":"c6","target":"c7"},{"source":"c7","target":"c8"},{"source":"c8","target":"c10"},{"source":"c9","target":"c10"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_bug_hunt
recipes.description: Scheduled scan of the registered codebase for likely defects (null/None derefs, missing error handling, unhandled edge cases, resource leaks, security gaps). Reads memory for already-reported issues to avoid duplicates, files each new finding as a human-review item for triage, and records it in memory. Incremental — each run focuses a different area.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_bug_hunt","title":"Codebase Bug Hunt","description":"Scheduled scan of the registered codebase for likely defects (null/None derefs, missing error handling, unhandled edge cases, resource leaks, security gaps). Reads memory for already-reported issues to avoid duplicates, files each new finding as a human-review item for triage, and records it in memory. Incremental — each run focuses a different area.","capability_summary":"Find bugs in the codebase, file new findings for human triage, and track reported issues in memory to avoid duplicates.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 13 * * *","cadence":"daily"},"description":"Runs on a schedule (default daily, offset from the coverage scan). Cadence configurable at the trigger-composition step."},"connectors":["codebase"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Bug-finding summary channel."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"always","context":"Each suspected bug is filed as a human-review item so a person confirms it before it becomes a backlog task — keeps false positives from flooding the backlog."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"REQUIRED. Persist reported findings (file:line + a stable signature) to avoid re-reporting the same bug across runs; track per-module scan history + recurring defect patterns to focus future scans. Read memory first every run."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"qa.bug.found","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { file, line, severity, category, description, suggested_fix }. Dev Clone can subscribe to triage / implement fixes for confirmed findings."}],"error_handling":"Codebase not mounted / not accessible → report 'codebase not accessible' and stop (precondition_failed). No new bugs found → report 'no new issues this cycle' WITH the modules scanned — this is value delivered (a clean scan), not a failure.","input_schema":[{"name":"target_codebase","type":"connector_ref","ui_component":"CodebaseSelector","connector":"codebase","required":true,"description":"Which registered codebase to scan for bugs."},{"name":"max_findings_per_run","type":"number","default":5,"min":1,"max":25,"description":"Max new findings to file per scheduled run (avoids flooding the review queue)."},{"name":"severity_floor","type":"enum","options":["low","medium","high"],"default":"medium","description":"Lowest severity worth filing. Higher floor = fewer, higher-signal findings."}],"sample_input":{"target_codebase":"{{param.aq_target_codebase}}","max_findings_per_run":5,"severity_floor":"medium"},"tool_hints":["file_read","search_code"],"test_fixtures":[],"use_case_flow":{"nodes":[{"id":"b1","type":"start","label":"Scheduled run"},{"id":"b2","type":"action","label":"Read memory: already-reported findings"},{"id":"b3","type":"connector","label":"Scan codebase for likely defects","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"b4","type":"decision","label":"New findings above severity floor?"},{"id":"b5","type":"action","label":"File each new finding as a human-review item"},{"id":"b6","type":"action","label":"Record findings in memory (dedupe)"},{"id":"b7","type":"event","label":"Emit qa.bug.found per confirmed finding"},{"id":"b8","type":"action","label":"Report 'no new issues this cycle' + scanned modules"},{"id":"b9","type":"end","label":"Done"}],"edges":[{"source":"b1","target":"b2"},{"source":"b2","target":"b3"},{"source":"b3","target":"b4"},{"source":"b4","target":"b5","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"b4","target":"b8","variant":"no","label":"Clean"},{"source":"b5","target":"b6"},{"source":"b6","target":"b7"},{"source":"b7","target":"b9"},{"source":"b8","target":"b9"}]}}

recipes.name: uc_architecture_review
recipes.description: Periodic architectural health review of the registered codebase: scan the current architecture, trace cross-module impacts, and produce a concise ADR (context / decision / consequences) plus a story-pointed task breakdown. Reads memory for prior decisions so each review builds on the architectural record instead of restating it.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_architecture_review","title":"Scheduled Architecture Review","description":"Periodic architectural health review of the registered codebase: scan the current architecture, trace cross-module impacts, and produce a concise ADR (context / decision / consequences) plus a story-pointed task breakdown. Reads memory for prior decisions so each review builds on the architectural record instead of restating it.","capability_summary":"On a schedule, review codebase architecture and publish an ADR + task breakdown, tracking decisions in memory.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"schedule","config":{"cron":"0 9 * * 1","cadence":"weekly"},"description":"Runs on a schedule (default weekly). Cadence is configurable at the trigger-composition step; can also be run manually."},"connectors":["codebase"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Architecture review summary: ADR title, key decisions, task count + total story points."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":"Architecture reviews are published as advisory ADRs — no human approval gate; the team triages the resulting tasks."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"REQUIRED. Each run reads memory first so it extends the architectural history and avoids re-deriving settled decisions."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"architecture.analysis.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { adr, tasks[], effort_estimate }. recipes.name: uc_idea_architecture_analysis
recipes.description: On-demand architectural evaluation of a proposed change or accepted idea: assess fit against the existing architecture, surface risks and trade-offs, and produce an implementation plan (ADR + scoped, story-pointed tasks) ready for a delivery agent to pick up.
recipes.prompt_template: {"id":"uc_idea_architecture_analysis","title":"Idea Architecture Analysis","description":"On-demand architectural evaluation of a proposed change or accepted idea: assess fit against the existing architecture, surface risks and trade-offs, and produce an implementation plan (ADR + scoped, story-pointed tasks) ready for a delivery agent to pick up.","capability_summary":"Evaluate a proposed idea against the architecture and emit a scoped implementation plan for downstream delivery.","category":"development","enabled_by_default":true,"execution_mode":"e2e","model_override":null,"suggested_trigger":{"trigger_type":"manual","config":{},"description":"Run on demand with an idea to evaluate. Also auto-fires when an upstream agent emits team.idea.accepted — wired via this use case's event subscription, not the primary trigger."},"connectors":["codebase"],"notification_channels":[{"type":"messaging","description":"Implementation plan summary: feasibility verdict, key risks, task count + effort."}],"review_policy":{"mode":"never","context":"Plans are advisory; the team decides whether to schedule the work."},"memory_policy":{"enabled":true,"context":"Persist evaluated ideas + their verdicts so repeat or related proposals are assessed against prior decisions rather than re-analyzed cold."},"event_subscriptions":[{"event_type":"team.idea.accepted","direction":"listen","description":"Payload: { idea_description, requirements, priority }. Triggers an architecture analysis of the accepted idea."},{"event_type":"architecture.analysis.completed","direction":"emit","description":"Payload: { adr, tasks[], effort_estimate, feasibility }. Hands the scoped plan to delivery agents."}],"error_handling":"Codebase not accessible → analyze from the idea description + stated requirements and clearly mark assumptions as UNVERIFIED in the ADR. event.","input_schema":[{"name":"target_codebase","type":"connector_ref","ui_component":"CodebaseSelector","connector":"codebase","required":true,"description":"Which registered codebase this modules","connector":"codebase"},{"id":"i4","type":"decision","label":"Fits current architecture?"},{"id":"i5","type":"action","label":"Draft ADR + scoped tasks (fit path)"},{"id":"i6","type":"action","label":"Draft ADR + risks + alternatives (mismatch path)"},{"id":"i7","type":"event","label":"Emit architecture.analysis.completed"},{"id":"i8","type":"end","label":"Hand plan to delivery"}],"edges":[{"source":"i1","target":"i2"},{"source":"i2","target":"i3"},{"source":"i3","target":"i4"},{"source":"i4","target":"i5","variant":"yes","label":"Yes"},{"source":"i4","target":"i6","variant":"no","label":"Needs
